title: Mortgage Client Support Specialist (Remote)
description:
Full-Time | Long-Term Opportunity



Apply here: 



About the Role



We are seeking a highly organized and proactive Client Service Manager (Mortgage / Finance) to support a Client Service Manager (Mortgage / Finance)mortgage or finance client in managing client communications, coordinating administrative workflows, and ensuring smooth end-to-end service delivery.



This role is ideal for someone with prior experience in mortgage broking, loan processing, or financial services who thrives in a structured, fast-paced virtual environment.



You will act as the primary support professional—ensuring clients, brokers, and internal teams remain aligned and informed throughout the loan lifecycle.



???? Key Responsibilities

Client Communication & Relationship Management



Act as the first point of contact for client inquiries



Manage daily correspondence via
, CRM, and messaging platforms



Provide proactive updates on loan files and documentation status



Maintain strong professional relationships with clients and stakeholders



Administrative & Operations Support



Prepare, update, and track client documents and loan applications



Maintain accurate client records and ensure compliance with data handling protocols



Manage schedules, follow-ups, and status tracking



Create reports, dashboards, and pipeline updates



Process Coordination



Coordinate with brokers, lenders, and third-party providers



Support end-to-end workflows from onboarding to settlement



Ensure compliance with AU/US privacy and finance standards



Identify and recommend process improvements



Customer Experience & Quality



Deliver prompt, courteous, and professional communication



Support client retention and service excellence initiatives



Escalate concerns appropriately when needed



???? What We’re Looking For

Experience



3–5+ years in client service, customer success, or operations



Strong background in mortgage broking, lending, or finance (highly preferred)



Experience in remote or virtual support roles is an advantage



Technical Skills



CRM experience (Salesforce, HubSpot, Zoho, Mercury, ApplyOnline or similar)



Strong Microsoft Office / Google Workspace skills



Comfortable managing multiple platforms and systems



Soft Skills



Excellent written and spoken English



Detail-oriented and highly organised



Able to manage multiple priorities independently



Professional, reliable, and solutions-focused



???? Performance Indicators



Client satisfaction and retention



Accuracy and timeliness of deliverables



Responsiveness within agreed service windows



Compliance with confidentiality and data privacy standards



???? Tools You May Use



CRM: Mercury, ApplyOnline, or equivalent



Communication: Gmail, Zoom, Slack, WhatsApp



File Management: Google Drive / OneDrive



Task Tracking: ClickUp / Asana



???? Engagement & Compensation



Competitive rate based on experience and industry background



Full-time subcontractor engagement



Paid monthly under a formal subcontractor agreement



Long-term opportunity with a growing international team



???? Ideal Candidate



You take ownership of outcomes.

You communicate clearly and confidently.

You enjoy supporting clients in structured financial environments.

You are proactive, dependable, and solutions-driven.

title: Executive Assistant - Nonprofit Operations & Productivity
description:
I'm the founder and Executive Director of a nonprofit. I'm a big-picture, vision-driven leader who generates ideas faster than I can execute them. I'm great at strategy and relationships. Where I need help is the space between vision and follow-through: keeping systems organized, staying on top of priorities, and making sure nothing slips.

I'm looking for an Executive Assistant who thrives on structure and genuinely enjoys making things happen behind the scenes. You won't just be scheduling calls and taking notes. You'll be a real partner in helping me lead well.

We'll start with 
 management and daily productivity support, with clear opportunity to grow into calendar management,
 triage, and donor/fundraising CRM work.



What You'll Do

- 
 and Task Management



-- Own and maintain our 
 boards, keeping tasks updated and priorities clear

--Prepare a daily dashboard so I start each day knowing where to focus

--Proactively flag overdue items and missed follow-ups before they become problems



-Daily Productivity and Accountability Support

--This is the heart of the role. I do my best work when I have a structured daily check-in. You'll join a 60-90 minute call with me  most days Outside that daily call, you'll work async. 



Calendar management and scheduling

ing donors, volunteers, and participants

Donor and fundraising CRM support



What We're Looking For

This is a great fit if you:



Are highly organized and love building systems

Thrive supporting leaders who think big but need help with execution

Are proactive and don't wait to be asked

Communicate clearly and aren't afraid to nudge me when I'm off track

Have experience with 
 or a similar tool (Asana, ClickUp, Notion, etc.)

Have strong written and spoken English

Can overlap for 1-2 hour daily (timing is flexible)



Bonus if you have:

Experience supporting fast-moving, idea-driven executives

Familiarity with Google Workspace

Background in nonprofit or fundraising

Experience supporting someone with ADHD with executive function or productivity challenges





How We'll Work Together



One 60-90minute daily overlap call (timing negotiable)

All other hours are async

Slack for communication


 for CRM and Task Management

Google Workspace for docs

Clear expectations, honest feedback, and real investment in your growth





Compensation and Growth



Starting: $5–$7/hr USD based on experience

Quarterly performance reviews with raise potential

Bonuses for hitting goals

Long-term role with room to growth





How to Apply

Please send me:



A short intro (2–3 paragraphs) about you and why this role fits

Your experience with 
 or similar tools

One example of how you've helped a leader or team stay organized 

Your availability and preferred overlap hours (Philippines time)



I'm not looking for the most impressive resume. I'm looking for the right person. If that's you, I'd love to hear from you.

title: Overall Logistics Manager (Amazon and Shopify)
description:
Overall Logistics Manager (Amazon & Shopify)



About the Role

We are seeking an experienced and dynamic Overall Logistics Manager to lead and unify our Amazon and Shopify logistics operations.

This is a high-impact leadership role responsible for ensuring seamless end-to-end fulfillment across both platforms while building, mentoring, and strengthening a high-performing logistics team.



The ideal candidate is:

A strong people leader





Operationally strategic





Highly structured and process-driven





Experienced in both Amazon and Shopify ecosystems





Calm under pressure with an exceptional personality





This role is about building alignment, accountability, and operational clarity across teams.



Core Responsibility

1. Team Leadership & People Management (Primary Focus)

Lead and manage Amazon and Shopify logistics teams





Foster a culture of accountability, ownership, and collaboration





Conduct weekly operational meetings and performance reviews





Coach, mentor, and develop tea
mbers





Resolve internal conflicts and strengthen cross-team communication





Ensure clear role clarity, KPIs, and workflow structure





Build a strong second layer of leadership within logistics





This role requires someone who is:

 ? Emotionally intelligent

 ? Clear communicator

 ? Approachable but firm

 ? High standards, low ego

 ? Solutions-oriented



2. Multi-Channel Logistics Oversight

Amazon Operations Oversight

Supervise FBA & FBM processes





Monitor IPI, sell-through rates, aged inventory, and stranded stock





Ensure shipment planning and forecasting accuracy





Prevent stockouts and overstock risks





Shopify Fulfillment Oversight

Ensure seamless order routing and fulfillment workflows





Oversee 3PL and warehouse performance





Maintain order accuracy and shipping SLAs





Optimize shipping costs and return processes





3. Operational Structure & Optimization

Create and refine SOPs across both platforms





Standardize reporting across Amazon and Shopify





Introduce performance dashboards and KPI tracking





Improve forecasting, replenishment planning, and cost efficiency





Identify operational bottlenecks and implement solutions







4. Reporting & Strategic Alignment

Deliver structured weekly operational reports





Present inventory health analysis





Align logistics with marketing and sales projections





Partner with Finance on cost control and margin protection







Qualifications

Minimum 5+ years experience in eCommerce logistics management





Strong hands-on experience with:





Amazon Seller Central (FBA & FBM)





Shopify backend & fulfillment workflows





Proven experience managing and scaling logistics teams





Strong understanding of forecasting, inventory management, and supply chain coordination





Experience working with 3PLs and international freight





Excellent leadership and communication skills





Strong data analysis and reporting capability







What We’re Looking For

This role requires someone who can:

Lead with confidence and empathy





Bring structure without micromanaging





Build team morale while maintaining high standards





Think strategically but execute operationally





Balance people leadership with performance accountability





Success in This Role Looks Like

Fully aligned Amazon and Shopify logistics teams





Clear reporting cadence and operational visibility





Reduced errors, stockouts, and operational delays





Improved inventory turnover and cost efficiency





A motivated, accountable, and high-performing team

title: Sales & Client Success Specialist

(Inbound Leads + Account Support + Virtual Professional Coaching)

Remote | Full-Time

If you enjoy calls, structured follow-ups, and holding people accountable — this role is for you.

Conduct structured check-ins

Reinforce accountability

Lead Generation & Growth Support

What We’re Looking For

Experience in sales development, inside sales, or account coordination

Strong spoken English (clear, confident, phone-ready)

Comfortable leading calls and managing conversations

Highly organised and structured

Able to motivate and hold others accountable

Confident working directly with leadership

Bonus Points If You Have:

B2B services experience

Recruitment or virtual team exposure

ClickUp or CRM experience

Experience handling performance check-ins

Why Join Neta Virtual Team?

title: Growth & Operations Specialist (Content + Outreach)
description:
Job Title: Growth & Operations Specialist (Content + Outreach)



The Mission

The Tactical Click is a revenue focused
 marketing consultancy helping growth minded brands turn their
 lists into scalable revenue engines. 



I am hiring a Growth & Operations Specialist to serve as a strategic right hand in driving client acquisition, supporting brand visibility, and keeping core operations organized as the business scales.



This is a long term opportunity. For the right person, this role will grow in responsibility and pay. You will work directly with me, the Founder. I value reliability, clear communication, initiative, and people who execute at a high level without being chased.





What You Will Be Doing



1. Lead Generation & Client Acquisition (The Hunter)



Research and identify qualified founders and decision makers who fit our Ideal Client Profile (ICP).



Execute personalized outreach across LinkedIn and Instagram, as well as other major social media platforms (TikTok, X, FB, etc.) as we scale.



Track all outreach and lead flow inside our CRM.



Support the goal of booking 2 to 4 qualified discovery calls per week.



2. Brand & Content Support (The Voice)



Hook Mastery: Crafting compelling hooks and headlines that stop the scroll and drive engagement across LinkedIn, Instagram, TikTok, X,
, and other major social media platforms.



Draft high authority LinkedIn posts and Instagram captions using provided frameworks.



Repurpose strategic ideas into short form content for various channels.



Manage content scheduling and monitor inbound engagement.



3. Client Support & Operations (The Engine)



Help manage project workflows and documentation inside ClickUp.



Assist with onboarding organization and client deliverables.



Provide weekly performance and activity summaries to ensure the engine is running smoothly.





Working Hours & Compensation



Schedule: Must overlap 6 PM to 10 PM Eastern Time.



Starting Hours: 10 to 12 hours per week to start.



Rate: $5 to $9 USD per hour depending on experience and performance.



Growth: Performance based reviews with potential for increased hours and pay.





What I Am Looking For



Elite Communication: Exceptional written English and the ability to capture a founder's voice.



Proven Experience: Background in outreach, lead generation, appointment setting, or sales support.



Content Strategy: You understand what makes content move. You are comfortable writing for LinkedIn, Instagram, TikTok, X, and
.



Mindset: Proactive, detail oriented, and dependable. You don't just find problems; you bring solutions.





How to Apply

To be considered, you must include the following:



- Resume.



- Portfolio: Samples of outreach or content you have written.



- Loom Video: A 2 to 3 minute video explaining why you are a strong fit for this specific role.



- Outreach Rewrite 1: Rewrite this cold message to improve it: “Hi [Name], I help founders improve their
 revenue. Let me know if you’d like to chat.”



- Outreach Rewrite 2: Rewrite this Instagram DM to make it more personalized: “Hey, I love your content. Would love to connect.”



- Subject Line Requirement: Include the word Velocity in your subject line. Applications without this keyword will not be reviewed.

title: YouTube Packaging Specialist (Thumbnail Design + Title Strategy)
description:
About the Role



We're looking for a YouTube Packaging Specialist who can handle the full packaging process: research what's working, design the thumbnail, and write the title.



Your job is to maximize click-through rate on every video we publish.



This means you need to be both a strategist and a designer. You study what's already performing on YouTube in similar topics, then create the thumbnail and title to match or beat it.



What You'll Do



Research top-performing videos in our niche and adjacent niches

Analyze thumbnail and title patterns that drive high CTR

Design scroll-stopping thumbnails for each video (full graphic design and execution)

Write 3-5 title options per video, ranked by predicted performance

Iterate based on performance data after publish

Requirements



Proven experience designing YouTube thumbnails that get clicks (show us examples)

Strong graphic design skills in Photoshop, Figma, or equivalent tools

Understanding of YouTube CTR principles, packaging strategy, and what makes people click

Ability to study competitors and reverse-engineer what's working

You watch YouTube and understand the platform natively

Fast turnaround, clear communication, reliable deadlines

Bonus



Experience working with business, education, or coaching channels

Familiarity with tools like VidIQ or TubeBuddy for research

Can show before/after CTR improvements from your packaging work

Compensation



Project-based pay per video. Rate depends on experience and quality of work.



How to Apply



Send us:



3-5 thumbnails you've designed (with links to the videos if possible)

A short explanation of the design and title choices you made on one of them

Your per-video rate

If you can't explain why your thumbnails work, this isn't the right fit.

title: Viral-Proven Short Form Video Editor
description:
Review Harvest is a fast-growing SaaS company. You are gonna focus not only on Review Harvest but MAINLY on Clay Lawrence's YouTube channel, to get people to watch his long form videos from the shorts you produce. We publish podcasts, tutorials, and “how to make money online” content. We are hiring a SHORTS-ONLY editor who can consistently pull viral 
nts from long-form videos and turn them into high-performing YouTube Shorts, Instagram Reels, and TikToks.



Main Objective: Your shorts should make viewers want to watch the full long-form video.



What You Will Do

-Watch long-form videos and identify the best 15 to 60 second 
nts

-Create shorts with strong hooks, fast pacing, and high retention

-Remove filler words, long pauses, repeated takes, and unnecessary context

-Add clean captions and on-screen text that improves watch time

-Use simple pattern interrupts when needed (zoom, b-roll, sound hits, quick cuts)

-ADD RELEVANT MUSIC THAT CLIMAXES IN THE PAYOFF OF THE VIDEO

-Deliver platform-ready exports for Shorts/Reels/TikTok

-Follow our workflow in Trello + 
 and hit deadlines



Requirements (Must Have)

-Proven experience editing viral short-form content (Shorts/Reels/TikTok)

-Strong understanding of hooks, pacing, retention, and storytelling

-Comfortable working from podcasts and talking-head content

-Portfolio that clearly shows shorts you personally edited (links and nº views required)



Bonus Points

-You can show shorts you edited that reached 50k, 100k, or 1M+ views

-Experience editing podcast shorts (Devin Jatho style is a plus)

-Motion graphics or clean kinetic text experience

-Understanding of how shorts drive viewers to long-form





Hiring Process (Important)

1. Paid test task: you will receive a long-form clip and create 2 to 3 shorts

2. Interview call: we review your edits and you explain your thinking

We care about your decision-making process, not just editing skills.





To Apply

Send:

-Portfolio link

-3 examples of shorts you edited (include view counts if possible)

-A short Loom-style intro explaining your process for finding viral 
nts, and why Review Harvest should pick you (MAKE SURE TO INCLUDE THIS or we wont be advancing you)



If you are a skilled short-form video editor who is passionate about creating engaging content, and wants to make GREAT MONEY we'd love to hear from you. Performance incentives for videos that hit view milestones

title: Video Editor / Graphics Designer
description:
We are Dreambound, a mission-driven education startup, and we’re looking for a full-time Social Media Content Creator who just "gets it." You aren't just an editor; you’re someone who lives and breathes social media and knows how to turn a simple idea into a post that people actually want to stop and watch.



The Role



We will provide the creative briefs, the brand guidelines, and the strategy. Your job is to bring the magic. You’ll take our concepts and transform them into high-performing short-form videos (TikTok/Reels/Shorts/Ads) and eye-catching graphics that resonate with our audience.



This isn't about just clicking buttons in Premiere or CapCut; it’s about understanding pacing, hooks, and visual storytelling.



Please use the code DreamTeam when applying through the link below.



What You’ll Be Doing

- Creative Execution: Turning our briefs into 3–5 pieces of high-quality content daily (a mix of video and graphics).

- Visual Hook Mastery: Using your "knack" for attention-grabbing visuals to stop the scroll.

- Collaboration: Working closely with our team to refine ideas and iterate based on what the data tells us is working.



You’re the Perfect Fit If...

- You can work U.S. PST hours (west coast schedule)

- You are a Social-Media Native: You know what’s trending, you know why certain videos go viral, and you can replicate that "feeling" in your work.

- You’re a Visual Problem Solver: You can take a text-based brief and instantly see the visual story in your head.

- You Balance Speed and Quality: You thrive in a startup environment where we move fast, but you never sacrifice the brand's look and feel.

- You have the "Knack": You have an intuitive sense for layout, typography, and video pacing.



We offer:

- Competitive salary (negotiable by experience)

- 13th-month pay, internet allowance, U.S. holiday leave

- HMO, PhilHealth, SSS, Pag-Ibig after probation

- Paid sick leave and time-off

- Pay increase possible after 6-month probation based on performance



We only accept applications via this link:

title: Funnelish (Landing Page) Creator - 7 Figure Ecommerce Business
description:
Who we are:



We are an innovative e-commerce company dedicated to the drop shipping business model. In the fast-paced world of online retail, we strive to lead in both innovation and customer satisfaction. Our team is composed of driven, creative individuals who excel in a collaborative and dynamic environment. As our business continues to grow, we are seeking a talented Funnel Builder to join our team and elevate our digital marketing efforts.



Job Responsibilities:

- Design, develop, and optimize sales funnels using Funnelish to maximize conversion rates and generate leads.

- Conduct A/B testing on various funnel stages to determine the most effective strategies and implement necessary improvements.

- Work closely with the marketing and design teams to ensure consistent branding and messaging throughout all funnel stages.

- Analyze funnel performance data to understand customer behavior, identifying bottlenecks and opportunities for optimization.

- Keep abreast of the latest industry trends and technologies in funnel building and e-commerce to recommend and implement new strategies.



Skills & Capabilities:

- Demonstrated experience in building and optimizing product sales funnels, preferably within an e-commerce environment.

- Strong understanding of customer psychology and purchasing behaviors.

- Proficiency in Funnelish and other relevant digital marketing tools and platforms.

- Excellent graphic design skills.

- Creative thinker with a keen eye for detail and a problem-solving mindset.

- Strong communication and collaboration skills, with the ability to work effectively in cross-functional teams.

- Experience with Slack, Click Up, and Canva. If you have read so far, be sure to mention our secret hire word being "Apple" to show us you are very fixed on details. Forgetting details in the sales funnel is a hard no-go for us.



Compensation and Benefits:

- Hourly rate of $5 to $8, based on performance.

- Bonus of up to 30% of your monthly pay, based on company performance.

- Remote work opportunity.

- A dynamic and supportive team environment where your contributions are highly valued and encouraged.

- Opportunities for professional growth and development.

- Access to the latest tools and technologies in digital marketing and e-commerce.



How to Apply:

If you are passionate about creating high-converting sales funnels and have a proven track record in e-commerce, we would love to hear from you. Please submit your resume along with a portfolio of sales funnels you have built or optimized. In your application, please address the following questions:



1. How many funnels have you built in Funnelish?

2. What is your experience with drop shipping?

3. Why do you consider yourself an A-player?

4. In which markets/countries have you sold products?

5. Do you currently have any clients? If so, how many hours per day and week are dedicated to them?

6. What are you looking for in your next role?



Please include a list of funnels you have created for evaluation. If you do not have any funnels to showcase, your application may not be considered.



Thank you!

title: Tax Accountant (AU) Needs to know how to speak Chinese/Mandarin
description:
We are an Australian-based financial and investment management company committed to providing strategic financial solutions and reliable advisory services to our clients. We pride ourselves on a culture of professionalism, integrity, and excellence, helping businesses and individuals make informed financial decisions through expert accounting and tax management support.







Position Overview



We are seeking a detail-oriented and proactive Tax Accountant to join our growing finance team. The ideal candidate will play a key role in preparing and lodging tax returns, maintaining financial records, and ensuring compliance with Australian tax laws and regulations. This role offers the opportunity to work collaboratively in a professional environment that values efficiency, accuracy, and continuous improvement.







Employment Type



Full-time | 40 hours per week

Start Date: As soon as possible







Key Responsibilities



Prepare and lodge tax returns, BAS, and other statutory reports.

Support end-of-month and end-of-year financial reconciliations.

Maintain accurate and organized financial records and supporting documentation.

Assist in preparing financial statements and management reports.

Conduct tax research to ensure compliance with legislative changes.

Liaise with the ATO and other regulatory bodies when necessary.

Provide support during internal audits and contribute to continuous improvement of financial processes.

Offer administrative and accounting assistance to the finance team as required.





Requirements



Essential (Must-Haves)



Proven working knowledge of accounting principles and tax compliance.

Strong attention to detail and accuracy in financial reporting.

Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and accounting software such as Xero or MYOB.

Excellent organizational and time management skills.

Strong communication skills and ability to work effectively within a team environment.





Preferred (Nice-to-Haves)



Mandarin/Chinese-speaking candidate preferred to facilitate smoother communication with the team.

Experience working within Australian-based accounting or finance firms.





Communication Tools



Primary:
, Microsoft Teams





Why Join Us



Be part of a reputable and dynamic financial management firm.

Work with a supportive and professional team.

Opportunity for long-term collaboration and skill development in taxation and compliance.





*****PLEASE APPLY THROUGH THIS LINK:

/job-opportunities/undergraduate-to-senior-accountant/

About Us:

Health and Life Access is a well-established healthcare consulting Chartered Accounting firm organisation specialising in the management of service entities and organizations throughout Australia and overseas. We are committed to creating a sustainable and socially responsible healthcare system.



Job Description:

We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced Virtual Assistant to provide administrative, IT, and accounting support to our organisation and clients. The successful candidate will report to the CEO and relevant supervisors, ensuring the smooth and efficient operation of our business.



Key Responsibilities:

Provide administrative, IT, and accounting support to the CEO and other consultants/managers.

Maintain accurate records, perform bookkeeping, and handle client billing.

Assist with financial reporting, budgeting, and petty cash management.

Manage calendars, appointments, and correspondence.

title: TICKETING & AIRFARES SPECIALIST (Galileo and NDC Experienced)
description:
We are seeking a highly skilled Airfare Specialist with expertise in ticketing, Galileo GDS, and NDC to join our team. The ideal candidate will manage airfare bookings, deliver exceptional client service, and support our ski travel operations.









Responsibilities

Research and present clients with the best available airfare options across both traditional GDS and NDC-sourced inventory

Handle reservations and process changes, refunds, exchanges, and cancellations across GDS and NDC bookings

Develop specialist knowledge of international ski destinations and their gateway airports (e.g. Vancouver, Sapporo, Aspen, Kamloops, Denver, Geneva), advising clients on optimal routing

Provide excellent customer service by addressing client enquiries and concerns in a timely and professional manner

Operate the internal reservation system to generate accurate quotes and produce invoices for clients

Work closely with tea
mbers to ensure seamless operations and client satisfaction

Demonstrated experience working with NDC-enabled booking channels and an understanding of how NDC differs from traditional GDS distribution

Strong knowledge of airline industry regulations, fare rules, and ticketing procedures

Familiarity with international ski destinations and key mountain resort airports across Europe, North America and Japan (Not required but highly regarded)

Excellent communication and customer service skills with a client-first mindset

Ability to work efficiently in a fast-paced environment and manage multiple tasks simultaneously

Team player with a positive attitude and willingness to learn and adapt

High school diploma or equivalent required; additional certifications or training in travel and tourism preferred (e.g. IATA, Galileo certification)

title: Webflow Developer (Full Stack)
description:
We are looking for a high-caliber Webflow Developer who lives at the intersection of design and data. We don't just build static sites; we build high-performance web applications. If you are an "A+ Player" who thrives on turning complex logic into seamless user experiences, we want to talk to you.



The Role

You will be responsible for developing, launching, and maintaining sophisticated web applications using the WWX Stack (Webflow, Wized, and Xano). This isn't just about dragging and dropping elements—it’s about building scalable backends, managing authentication flows, and ensuring every interaction is snappy and reliable.



What You’ll Be Doing

Webflow Development: Building pixel-perfect, responsive frontends with clean class structures (Client-First or similar naming conventions).

Wized Integration: Connecting the Webflow frontend to the backend, managing state, and handling complex UI logic.

Xano Backend Management: Architecting databases, creating efficient API endpoints, and managing business logic.

System Optimization: Ensuring fast load times, secure data handling, and cross-browser compatibility.

Delivery: Owning the project lifecycle from the first build to the final bug bash.



Who You Are (Required Skills)

Technical Mastery: Proven experience with Webflow, Wized (v2/v3), and Xano. You should be comfortable with REST APIs and JSON.

The "A+ Player" Mindset: You don't settle for "good enough." You double-check your work, optimize for performance, and care about the details.

Reliability is Your Brand: When you commit to a deadline, you meet it. We value clear communication and transparency above all else.

Trustworthy & Professional: You will be handling sensitive data and core business logic; high integrity is a non-negotiable requirement.

Problem Solver: You don't just flag issues; you come to the table with solutions.



Why Join Us?

Work on cutting-edge low-code/no-code stacks.

Clear project scopes and direct communication.

A culture that respects your expertise and autonomy.

Opportunity for long-term collaboration on exciting builds.



How to Apply

We are looking for the best, so we’ve skipped the cluttered inbox. Please complete our official application form here:

title: DA VINCI resolve Editor
description:
Please do not apply unless you consider your edits to be truly EPIC! Experienced editors with good taste only please!



If you really want to speed up the process and are prepared to do a trial edit, select one of the 3 editing types below, I will provide you some clips, and you can spend 30 minutes to create a short reel.

- Or, even better - just take a couple of reels off my instagram, make a creative 15s edit. Impress me, instead of just sending another ChatGPT message with a portfolio link ;)



I need an epic short form editor to join my team! Currently it's me doing everything - i am running a video business, i do all the filming, finding clients from various niches, but I need a solid editor for on-going employment as I continue to grow. Currently the number of clients coming in is way more than I can handle, and I'm just getting started. I plan to build a team of 3-4 full time editors over the coming 6 months



There is a wide variety of edits I will need help with, including: engaging podcast edits, cinematic montages, fast paced ADs, funny skits. It is not necessary that you are great at everything - but being a master of 1 or 2 styles is helpful as I continue to hire more editors.



It is ideal if you use Da vinci resolve, but if you are good at what you do then any software will be fine. Ultimately I will be hiring many editors and I will help maintain the quality control over everything! My clients love me for my filming & editing style - I am always trying to improve and push the boundaries of how we tell stories with visuals - anyone joining my team must be serious about becoming a truly great editor!



Your role will be to help me produce a higher volume of quality content for a wide range of clients. Saving me time in my own editing process. Also helping me create BTS reels and all sorts of things, but I will rather learn where your skills are best and give you more work there.



As for how to test applicants, there will be a first interview. Then, you will create 4 reels in 4 hours. This will be a paid trial.



- 1 hour: a 'cinematic montage' reel - 10-15s

This is a fast-paced dynamic edit using my camera clips, visual & musical, 10-15seconds length. But don't just choose cool clips, tell a story with the order of the clips. You have one hour to create a scroll stopping, visually engaging short reel that makes people want to watch again. Make it pop with a few sound effects as well!



- 1 hour: a 'story' reel: 30s

I provide a 30 second interview snippet (that I have already edited the pacing of) and b-roll clips, you will place the clips to help tell the story that is being spoken. You have one hour to create as much emotional impact with the clip selection with the story. This isn't about fancy effects - this is about carefully choosing the right camera clips, matching the action, emotional impact of the clips, zooms and crops to make the footage flow smoothly. Cinematic bro. Haha



- 1 hour: a 'podcast' reel - 1:30-2 mins

I provide a podcast clip (usually 1:30-2 mins in length) that I have already edited for pacing. You will edit over the top, adding engaging visuals that compliment the conversation. You have one hour to take my initial podcast edit, and give it an engaging & complimentary visual experience. Aim for roughly 60/40: 60% of the time the conversation is on the screen, and 40% cutting away to other clips and visuals. Be a bit creative here...



- 1 hour: 'wildcard' reel - 30s

Make whatever you want, just make it cool! Use camera clips from a shoot to make one reel. 30s



Now, this of course isn't enough time to make the best reels in the world! this is just for me to see how well you can work with timeframes, as we are creating such a high volume of reels we need to have predictable systems to know how long a job will take. For example, I know that on average it takes me about 10 hours to edit 15 reels for some of my client packages. We will have to be flexible with timeframes, as different clients will be paying more for higher quality reels - those will require more effort. Sometimes we are provided 20+ reels to a client at a lower price, these must be completed in less time! In these cases, its more about having good taste than just mindless editing.



Check out some of my work on

title: Revenue Manager – STR Dynamic Pricing & Distribution
description:
Job Title: Revenue Manager – STR Dynamic Pricing & Distribution (Key Getaways)

Type of Employment: Part-time

Hours: 25 Hours

Wage/Salary per Month: $6/hr - $9/hr USD(DOE)



About Us:

Key Getaways is a premier property management firm founded by a former futures trader who applies high-level market precision to the vacation rental space. Based in the Smoky Mountains, our culture combines "family-style" leadership with the precision of a high-growth tech company. We value individual ownership, blunt honesty, and stability.



Accountability:

* RevPAR & Occupancy Growth: Own the daily revenue performance across Airbnb, VRBO, and direct booking sites.

* Dynamic Pricing Mastery: Expertly manage PriceLabs, ensuring automated logic is validated against real-world market performance and seasonal spikes.

* OTA Performance: Optimize listing health for maximum visibility and conversion.

* Market Intelligence: Actively monitor local events (festivals, rod runs, etc.) to front-run the algorithm and capture premium rates before the market reacts.



Tasks:

* Daily Pricing Audits: Review PriceLabs daily to identify conversion drops, capture unbookable "orphan nights," and adjust pricing manually when the algorithm falls short.

* Calendar Integrity: Strictly monitor calendar syncing between PMS and OTAs to prevent overlaps.

* Market Research: Leverage AI tools to summarize competitor data and building market performance reports.

* Cross-Functional Collaboration: Align with the Operations Lead to ensure maintenance blocks or guest relocations are handled with zero revenue leakage.



Expectations:

* STR Industry Expertise: 3+ years of experience specifically in Short-Term Rental Revenue Management.

* Technical Proficiency: Deep, high-level experience with PriceLabs is mandatory. Proficiency in Guesty or similar PMS preferred.

* Analytical Mindset: You must be comfortable making independent financial decisions and explaining the "why" behind a price shift.

* Attention to Detail: Mandatory. Secret Code: KGRM030326.



Tools (Experience Preferred, Not Required)

* Airbnb, VRBO

* PriceLabs or similar pricing tools

* Google Workspace

* Process documentation tools (Notion, Google Docs, etc.)



Nice-to-Have

* Prior experience leading projects or people (formally or informally)

* Background in operations, property management, or startups

* Experience building workflows from zero



Salary & Schedule:

* Position: Contractor (Remote) – Part-Time (20-25 Hours/Week).

* Rate: $6 - $9/hr USD (Depending on Experience).

* Schedule Hours Minimum: 20 hours (Must Track Hours)

* Schedule Hours Maximum: 25 hours (Anything above needs approval)

* Pay Schedule: Monthly via Wise or preferred method with the submission of hours

worked

period)

title: Executive Assistant & Accountability Partner (Full Time)
description:
Executive Assistant & Accountability Partner

MatterCorp Automation

Type: Full Time

Compensation: $800–1,000/month

Hours: 40 hours/week, aligned to U.S. Central Time



About the Role

I run a legal tech consulting practice called MatterCorp Automation. After 18+ years in enterprise IT at companies like AT&T and MasterCard, I moved into the legal tech space and now help law firms systematize their operations. I'm working to scale the business beyond my current client base — and I need the right person beside me to make that happen.

The core of this role is simple: you keep me organized, on track, and accountable. If things slip through the cracks, the business doesn't grow. You're the person who makes sure that doesn't happen.



What You'll Do

Your number one function is to be my accountability partner. That means:



Own my calendar. Not just scheduling — making sure every meeting has context and prep so I know exactly why I'm there when I walk in.

Own my inbox. Triage, categorize, draft responses, and make sure nothing important gets buried.

Run a daily 15-minute video standup every morning. We align priorities, surface what's slipping, and you hold me honest about what I committed to the day before. This is non-negotiable — I need face-to-face accountability, not chat messages.

Track every open commitment across clients, projects, and personal items — and follow up relentlessly. When something has been dropped, you say so directly. Not a hint. Not waiting to be asked.

Document everything as we build it. I move fast and leave breadcrumbs of documentation scattered across folders. Your job is to capture, organize, and make everything findable.

Handle research and follow-through on whatever I delegate — booking flights, finding contractors, coordinating travel, preparing client materials.



This isn't limited to business tasks. Work and life overlap in this role, and you'll help systematize both.



Where This Goes

This role starts with me, but what you're really growing into is a process engineer.

To be clear: process engineer here means operational workflows, documentation, and execution cadence — not coding or building automations. I have a separate technical hire for that.

I also run technology and operations for a personal injury law firm. They have processes they know instinctively but have never documented. My vision is to take what you learn from systematizing my world and apply it to client offices — observing, documenting, and building structure around their operations.

Strong performers can grow into an Operations Lead or Chief of Staff position.



What I Expect



Microsoft Teams is our primary communication tool. We also use Zoom for recorded meetings.

I'll teach you Kanban boards and Agile methodology for tracking projects. You don't need to know these now, but you need to be willing to learn.

I want the people who work with me to grow. Everything I teach you will be transferable to your career — even if that eventually means you outgrow this role. That said, I'm looking for someone who commits for at least one to two years.

I'm direct and informal. I drop the occasional F-bomb — it's never directed at you and never out of anger. If that bothers you, we're probably not a fit.





Requirements



3+ years supporting an executive, founder, or business owner remotely. Real partnership — not just task completion.

You can think on your feet. During our interview, you will be given a live scenario you can't rehearse. I'm looking for calm triage and clear prioritization.

Respectfully direct communication. I need someone who will push back when they see a problem — not just say "yes sir."

Strong written English. You'll draft
s to attorneys and clients on my behalf.

Reliable equipment. Working camera, stable internet, quiet workspace. Our daily standup is on video.

Full 8-hour days aligned to U.S. Central Time (8 AM – 4 PM CT / roughly 9 PM – 5 AM Philippines). Night shift experience strongly preferred.

No competing full-time roles. During scheduled work hours, this must be your only active commitment.





Compensation



$800–1,000/month starting, based on experience. This range is firm.

This role is budgeted strictly within this range. Applications requesting compensation outside this range will be automatically disqualified.

Weekly pay for the first month, biweekly after that.

30-day check-in and 90-day evaluation — if we both want to move forward, we discuss a salary adjustment.

13th month bonus is standard. All software and tools provided.

Healthcare support is a goal I'm actively exploring; not guaranteed yet.





How to Apply

Include ALL of the following in your application:

1. Include the phrase "structure creates calm" somewhere in your response.

2. Answer these two questions in writing:



What executive responsibilities have you managed? Name the tools, describe what a typical day looked like, and tell me about a time something went wrong and how you handled it.

Tell me about a time you disagreed with or pushed back on a boss, client, or authority figure. What happened and what was the outcome?



3. Record a short video (2–3 minutes, Loom or Google Drive or YouTube unlisted) answering this scenario:

"It's Monday morning. Your boss has 47 unread
s, three client calls he hasn't prepped for, a flight to book for next week, and he missed a deadline last Friday. He's panicking. What do you do first and why?"

Walk me through your priorities step by step. I want to see how you think under pressure.

4. State your salary expectation and earliest start date.

Applications missing the passphrase or the video will not be reviewed.

title: Ads Manager
description:
Meta Ads Manager (Product Testing) — The Business Builders (Sydney Time)

Remote (Philippines-based) | Full-time | Sydney (AEST) hours | Paid holidays



We’re hiring a killer Meta Ads Manager who loves one thing:

- launching product tests fast

- finding winners

- killing losers ruthlessly



We run 
 — we build and scale eCommerce stores for clients, and we’re obsessed with performance. If you’re the type who lives inside Ads Manager, makes clean decisions from data, and can handle volume, you’ll fit right in.



What We Do (and why it’s fun)

- We launch and test products constantly to find winners, then we roll those winners into client stores and scale them hard.

- You won’t be stuck “managing one brand forever.”

- You’ll be part of a system that tests, learns, and moves FAST.

- If you want a role where your skills directly create wins every week — this is it.



Your Mission

- Launch daily product tests (Meta)

- Monitor performance + metrics hourly/daily

- Kill losers early using clear rules

- Identify winners and push them further

- Report results clearly to the team

- Keep accounts clean, organized, and scalable



You’re a Fit If You…

- Have managed real eCommerce ad accounts (not theory)

- Know how to test products quickly (ABO/CBO)

- Can read the data and make decisions without emotions

- Understand how to work with multiple creatives + angles

- Are consistent, reliable, and can work Sydney hours



What You’ll Be Managing

- High-volume product testing

- Multiple stores / multiple tests per week

- Fast creative iteration

- Clear performance benchmarks

- A team that moves quickly and backs you up



Work Setup

- Full-time

- Sydney (AEST) aligned hours

- Remote (Philippines-based)

- Paid holidays

- Stable long-term role for the right person



Pay

Competitive PH-based salary (based on experience) + room to grow quickly when you perform.



**REQUIRED TO APPLY: LOOM PROOF (Non-Negotiable)**

To apply, you must send a LOOM video showing a current eCommerce client/account you are managing.

Your LOOM must show:



- Proof you have access (your name/email visible in BM/Ads Manager access is fine)

- Spend

You may blur store name if needed

- What are your kill rules (spend thresholds + key metrics)?

How to Apply

title: Low Voltage Construction Estimator (Div. 27 & 28
description:
The Role: Technical Partner in Proposal Excellence

We are a specialized training and compliance firm that bridges the gap between complex construction and operational excellence. We are looking for a precision-driven Low Voltage Estimator to own the technical scope analysis for our Division 27 (Communications) and Division 28 (Electronic Safety & Security) projects.



In this role, you aren’t just a "numbers person." You are the technical foundation of our bidding process. You will partner directly with our Proposal Leadership team, providing the detailed quantity takeoffs and blueprint reviews that allow us to build world-class, winning proposals.



Key Responsibilities

Trade-Level Scope Analysis: Perform deep-dive reviews of construction documents and specifications for Division 27 (Fiber, Structured Cabling, CCTV) and Division 28 (Access Control, Fire Alarm, Intrusion).



Precision Takeoffs: Generate accurate material and labor counts (conduit runs, fiber strand counts, terminations, device placement) 



Blueprint Review: Identify design gaps, potential "clashes" (e.g., 2" RMC routing issues), and value-engineering opportunities.



Compliance Alignment: Ensure every estimate accounts for the labor hours required to meet high-level SOP and Safety certification standards.



Strategic Collaboration: Provide raw data and technical insights to Proposal Leadership to help craft a persuasive, compliant project narrative.

title: Research Insights & Publications Strategist
description:
Position: 

Black Millennial Cafe (BMC)

Position Overview

Black Millennial Cafe (BMC) is seeking a Research Insights & Publications Strategist to translate our original research into compelling publications that inform leaders, influence public conversation, and advance the work of the Black Church and broader community.

This role sits at the intersection of data analysis, storytelling, and thought leadership. The strategist will interpret findings from BMC surveys, studies, and research initiatives and transform them into monographs, research briefs, white papers, and visual data insights that equip churches, organizations, and leaders with actionable intelligence.

The ideal candidate understands how to move from raw data to narrative insight, producing research-backed publications that are both intellectually rigorous and accessible to practitioners.

Key Responsibilities

Research Interpretation

• Analyze quantitative and qualitative data from BMC studies and surveys

• Identify key themes, patterns, and insights within research findings

• Translate complex data into clear narratives and strategic conclusions

• Collaborate with the research team to ensure accuracy and integrity of analysis

Publication Development

• Write and develop BMC publications including:

Research monographs

White papers

Executive summaries

Insight briefs

Reports for partners and clients

• Structure reports to highlight key insights, implications, and recommended actions

Data Storytelling

• Transform research findings into clear, engaging narratives

• Identify the most important insights for leaders and decision-makers

• Ensure all publications maintain BMC’s voice, authority, and thought leadership

Visual Data Collaboration

• Work with designers to translate research findings into visual formats such as:

Infographics

Data visualizations

Research dashboards

Presentation decks

• Provide clear direction on which insights should be visualized and why

Thought Leadership Development

• Contribute to BMC’s reputation as a leading research voice on faith, community, and culture

• Help shape the narrative around key findings emerging from BMC’s studies

• Identify opportunities to produce insight-driven publications from existing data

Key Deliverables

The Research Insights & Publications Strategist will regularly produce:

• Research monographs

• White papers

• Executive summaries

• Insight briefs

• Infographic content outlines

• Publication-ready reports for partners and clients

Qualifications

Required

• Strong ability to interpret and synthesize research data

• Experience writing research reports, policy briefs, or analytical publications

• Exceptional writing and storytelling skills

• Ability to translate complex research into accessible insights

• Experience working with quantitative and/or qualitative data

Preferred

• Background in sociology, public policy, theology, social sciences, or research methods

• Experience with survey research or research institutes

• Familiarity with data visualization and research communications

• Experience producing publications for thought leadership organizations

Ideal Candidate Profile

The ideal candidate is someone who can look at a dataset and immediately begin asking the right questions, uncovering the deeper story within the numbers. They understand that research is not just about reporting findings, but about revealing meaning and implications for real-world impact.

They are equally comfortable analyzing data, writing research reports, and collaborating with designers to bring insights to life visually.

About Black Millennial Cafe

Black Millennial Cafe (BMC) is a leading research and consulting organization focused on Black faith, community, and culture. Through original studies, data insights, and strategic consulting, BMC equips churches, organizations, and leaders with the knowledge needed to navigate a rapidly changing world.

Our work sits at the intersection of faith, research, and social impact, producing insights that inform leadership, shape strategy, and influence the future of the Black Church and community. Check us out at

title: Performance Marketing + Tracking & Analytics Specialist  (Google Ads / Meta / GoHighLevel)
description:
Performance Marketing + Tracking & Analytics Specialist

 (Google Ads / Meta / GoHighLevel)



Company: Allied Health Consulting (AHC)

Location: Remote (Offshore)

Engagement: Full-Time Contractor (Aligned to Australian Business Hours)



GREAT BENEFITS + PERKS! POTENTIAL SPONSORSHIP.



About Allied Health Consulting



Allied Health Consulting partners with leading dental and allied health clinics across Australia to build measurable, systemised growth engines.

We operate as the outsourced marketing and analytics department for multi-site clinics — focusing on predictable patient acquisition, clean tracking, automation, and ROI visibility.

We build systems, not short-term campaigns.



Role Summary



You will own the full patient acquisition performance loop:

Ad Spend ? Lead ? Booking ? Patient Revenue ? Optimisation.

This is a senior, hands-on technical role responsible for:

Paid traffic performance (Google + Meta)

Conversion tracking integrity

Automation buildout in GoHighLevel

ROI reporting across multiple clinics

You are accountable for cost per booked patient and tracking accuracy across every channel.



Core Responsibilities



1. Paid Advertising (Google + Meta)

Build and manage Google Search and Performance Max campaigns

Execute Meta campaigns with structured retargeting flows

Segment campaigns by clinic, suburb, and service line (e.g. emergency, Invisalign, general)

Deploy localised offers and creative testing frameworks

Continuously reduce cost per booked patient

2. GHL Automation & Lead Systems

Build landing pages, forms, pipelines, and automations in GoHighLevel

Design structured SMS/email follow-up systems

Standardise lead handling workflows across clinics

Reduce speed-to-lead gaps and booking leakage



3. Tracking & Attribution Ownership

GA4 setup and validation

Google Tag Manager implementation

Call tracking configuration

Form tracking and booking attribution

Rapid troubleshooting of broken tracking



4. ROI Reporting & Dashboards



Build simple, action-focused dashboards (Spend ? Leads ? Bookings ? Cost per Patient)

Deliver weekly performance summaries with clear priorities

Present monthly ROI reviews with budget reallocation recommendations

Compare clinic and channel performance transparently



5. Structured Campaign Optimisation



Run systematic tests across ads, landing pages, and retargeting

Expand negatives, refine geos, eliminate poor lead sources

Shift budget toward high-performing services and suburbs

Maintain disciplined account hygiene



Core Deliverables



Live, optimised Google + Meta campaigns per clinic/service

Fully documented tracking setup and logic

Functional GHL pipelines and automations

Weekly performance summary with next actions

Monthly ROI review and budget allocation plan

Live cross-clinic dashboard with cost per booked patient



Required Skills



Advanced Google Ads (Search + PMax)

Strong Meta Ads execution and retargeting strategy

GoHighLevel automation expertise

GA4 + GTM implementation and troubleshooting

Call tracking integration experience

Funnel psychology and buyer intent understanding

Analytical decision-making discipline

Extreme attention to tracking integrity

Healthcare or dental marketing experience is advantageous but not required.



Working Environment



Full-time, aligned with Australian business hours

Remote role with structured reporting

Regular sync meetings with leadership

High autonomy, high accountability



Long-Term Benefits & Stability



Paid annual leave entitlements

13th month pay

Structured salary progression pathway

Year 3 loyalty benefit: Paid holiday for employee + 1 additional person

Long Service Savings Arrangement (commencing Year 4):

 Employer + Employee co-contribution of $50/week

 Lump sum payout at end of Year 8

Australian Sponsorship Pathway between Years 8–10

 (Subject to performance and legal eligibility)

This is a long-term growth role, not a short contract cycle.



Who Should Apply



Technical performance operators who think in ROI, not impressions

Data-driven marketers who value clean tracking

Independent executors who solve problems without supervision

Operators who care about outcomes more than activity



Application Requirements



Submit:

CV + Cover Letter

Portfolio of relevant Google and Meta campaigns

Case study explaining how you reduced cost per booked lead using ads + automation

Brief summary of tracking stack you have personally implemented

Your 16personalities result (type + percentages)



Only complete applications will be reviewed. This is an outcome-based role. Results define progression.

title: Accounting Assistant
description:
GH Logistics is a high performance freight brokerage and asset based logistics company specializing in dry van and reefer freight. We move quickly, but we move with structure. Our operation is built on real time visibility, disciplined execution, and financial accuracy at every stage. We take pride in keeping freight organized, billing clean, and revenue protected from pickup to payment.



If you’re someone who enjoys precision, financial accountability, and being part of a fast moving logistics environment where numbers must align and documentation must be complete, you’ll feel right at home here.



Role Overview

As an Accounting Assistant, you serve as a financial control point within our operation. Your responsibility is to ensure freight invoices are accurate, compliant, supported by documentation, and collected in a timely manner.



If you thrive behind the scenes protecting revenue, reconciling discrepancies, and maintaining clean financial records in a fast paced environment, this role is an excellent fit.



What You’ll Be Doing

• Generating accurate freight invoices including base rates and approved accessorial charges

• Verifying invoices against rate confirmations, PODs, BOLs, and TMS data

• Uploading invoices and supporting documents to customer portals

• Applying correct billing codes for detention, TONU, lumper fees, fuel surcharges, and adjustments

• Recording and reconciling incoming ACH, wire, check, and factoring payments

• Monitoring aging reports and following up on overdue balances

• Investigating short pays, chargebacks, and disputes using proof documentation

• Posting approved credits, write offs, and adjustments accurately in the system

• Reconciling AR subledger with the general ledger

• Preparing weekly AR aging and cash flow reports for leadership

• Coordinating with dispatch and operations teams to resolve billing discrepancies

• Supporting month end and year end AR reconciliation processes

• Maintaining organized financial and load documentation for audit readiness



What Success Looks Like

• Invoices are submitted accurately and on time

• Customer portals are compliant and rejection free

• Aging reports are monitored consistently and collections are proactive

• Short pays and disputes are resolved quickly with clean documentation

• AR balances reconcile cleanly with the general ledger

• Financial reporting is accurate and reliable

• Communication with customers is professional and timely

• Revenue leakage is minimized through strong attention to detail



Who We’re Looking For

• Has an accounting or finance background (required)

• Has accounts receivable or accounts payable experience (logistics experience is a strong plus)

• Proficient in QuickBooks and comfortable with reconciliation processes

• Highly organized and detail driven

• Understands financial accuracy and documentation discipline

• Communicates clearly and professionally via

• Can manage multiple invoices and accounts without losing precision

• Works independently with minimal supervision

• Follows structured processes and values accountability

• Coachable, team oriented, and open to feedback



Why Join GH Logistics?

• Structured systems and clear expectations

• Hands on leadership and direct feedback

• Defined KPIs and measurable growth

• Opportunity to grow within a scaling freight brokerage

• Performance based advancement

• Permanent remote work setup



Schedule & Work Setup

• Full Time Remote Role | Direct Hire to US Company

• Monday – Friday 7 AM – 5 PM CST (San Antonio time)

• Zoom presence (camera on) required

• Time tracking software used for accountability and performance support



This role is built for someone who genuinely enjoys clean books, organized records, accurate billing, and proactive collections. If you like protecting revenue, resolving discrepancies before they escalate, and ensuring numbers align from dispatch to payment, you’ll fit right in.



Apply Here: 



Visit us:

title: WordPress Blog SEO & Content Optimization Specialist for Honest Pathology
description:
Job Title: WordPress Blog SEO & Content Optimization Specialist for Honest Pathology



Honest Pathology is a modern pathology practice focused on delivering accurate, transparent, and patient-centered diagnostic services. We are building our online presence to educate clinicians, patients, and healthcare partners through high-quality blog content.We are looking for a detail-oriented WordPress Blog SEO & Content Optimization Specialist to help us properly publish and fully optimize our blog posts.



To apply send a 1 min video explaining how you can preform SEO for our blogs and other areas as well as your resume



Important:

This is NOT a blog writing position. The blog content will already be written. Your role is to professionally upload, format, enhance, and optimize each post for SEO and performance.



Responsibilities:

Upload pre-written blog content into WordPress

Properly format headings (H1, H2, H3), spacing, and clean layout

Select relevant, professional medical or laboratory-related images

Embed images naturally throughout the content

Resize and compress images for optimal web speed (WebP preferred)

Add SEO-friendly ALT tags to all images

Create optimized meta titles and meta descriptions

Ensure proper keyword placement and strong on-page SEO

Light grammar and readability improvements (medical accuracy must be preserved)

Add appropriate internal and external links (medical references when applicable)

Optimize posts using Rank Math, Yoast, or similar SEO plugins

Ensure each post meets modern SEO and healthcare content standards



Requirements:

Strong experience with WordPress

Proven on-page SEO experience

Experience using Rank Math, Yoast, or similar tools

Strong English grammar and editing skills

Experience optimizing images for web performance

Detail-oriented and organized

Ability to follow SOPs and checklists

Experience with medical, healthcare, or scientific content is highly preferred

title: Sales Operations Manager (Part-Time)
description:
We are a business funding and credit consulting company seeking a highly organized and proactive Pipeline & Sales Operations Manager.



Your primary responsibility is to ensure no opportunities are lost inside our CRM. You will own follow-up, no-show recovery, and opportunity management inside GoHighLevel.



This is not a general assistant role.

This is a revenue-protection role.



CORE RESPONSIBILITIES:



1. No-Show Recovery (Daily)

 • Pull daily no-show list from GoHighLevel

 • Text no-show leads

 • Rebook directly onto the CEO’s calendar

 • Continue follow-up until rebooked or marked inactive



2. Post-Call Follow-Up (Unclosed Deals)



For every call that does not close:

 • Review call notes

 • Send structured follow-up within 24–48 hours

 • Execute 7-day follow-up sequence

 • Execute 30-day reactivation sequence



3. Opportunity Section Ownership (GoHighLevel)



You will fully manage follow-up inside the Opportunities tab.



Daily and weekly follow-up on:



Agreements Sent

 • Follow up on unsigned agreements

 • Follow up on unpaid invoices (24–48 hours after sent)

 • Track status until closed or lost



High Priority Leads

 • Daily follow-up on high-probability prospects



Warm Leads

 • Weekly structured follow-up



Credit Repair Leads

 • Follow up on prospects offered credit repair



No opportunity goes untouched.



4. Invoice Follow-Up

 • Follow up on unpaid invoices

 • Confirm when payment is received

 • Update CRM status to “Paid”



5. Weekly KPI Report (Every Monday)



You will provide:

 • Total booked calls

 • Show-up rate

 • No-shows recovered

 • Open opportunities count

 • Agreements sent vs signed

 • Revenue closed

 • Follow-up completion rate

 • Reactivated leads count



REQUIREMENTS:

 • Strong written and spoken English

 • Professional communication skills

 • Comfortable sending texts and making occasional calls (10–15% of role)

 • Experience with CRM systems (GoHighLevel preferred)

 • Highly organized and detail-oriented

 • Able to work independently without constant supervision

 • Available 1PM – 6PM EST & hours will increase to full time once you show that you are capable.

title: Instagram/TikTok Outreach Specialist (NO EXPERIENCE NEEDED) - 4
description:
TURN YOUR SOCIAL MEDIA SCROLLING INTO A REMOTE JOB (Influencer Research + DM VA)

If you spend way too much time on Instagram/TikTok checking gym creators, this might be the easiest job you ever land.



We’re a Gen-Z–run app studio building a fast-growing fitness app, and we’re hiring VAs to help us research, reach out to, and build relationships with influencers.



- No experience required.

- No resume required.

- Just strong English + good judgment + social media instincts.

- Must work NYC timezones! (in between 9am to 5pm)



If you understand gym culture, talk like a human, and type like a native English speaker, you’re already ahead of 99% of applicants.





WHAT YOU’LL DO

This role is part lead generation, part DM outreach, part relationship management.



Your daily tasks:

- Find new fitness creators (gym/lifting niche only)

- Add them to our Google Sheet with the correct info (username, followers, country,
, etc.)

- Evaluate their profile quality (are they legit, on-brand, and worth reaching out to?)

- DM influencers using our scripts

- Handle the conversation in a friendly, natural, professional way

- Answer questions, keep the convo alive, and push creators toward collaboration

- Follow up consistently

- Track responses and organize leads properly



You’ll basically be the person discovering new influencers and bringing them into the brand.

We’ll teach you everything, you just need strong English and social media instincts.





YOU’RE A FIT IF YOU

- Have very strong written English (this is the #1 requirement)

- Can communicate clearly and confidently

- Know the gym/fitness niche (huge bonus)

- Are organized and detail-oriented

- Can follow instructions EXACTLY

- Are comfortable reaching out to people on social media

- Have good judgment (can spot fake/farm accounts instantly)

- Are under 28 (our team is young)

- Want part-time remote work you can do from anywhere



We don’t care about degrees. We care about output, consistency, and attitude.





WHAT WE OFFER

- Remote work

- Fast replies, fast onboarding

- Fun Gen-Z team

- Simple tasks anyone smart can do

- Performance-based promotions

- The chance to handle creator deals + negotiations once you prove yourself





TEST 1 (WHEN APPLIYING) — Influencer Sheet Review + Research



Use this Google Sheet template (make a copy of the sheet to modify it): 
/drive/folders/1hDVQyxHEi-ZmaKfmGk1KWSzqrxKSM-Q7?usp=sharing



You must complete:

Rows 3–13 — PASS or FAIL



Look at the creators already listed and ONLY fill the PASS / FAIL column (1st column of the table).

Base your decision on:

- Fitness/gym relevance (are they a gym influencer?)

- Their country (our target audience is North American countries and 1st world countries)

- High number of views (100 000 median views minimum)

*Little tip, less than 50% are good :)*



Rows 14–23 — Add 10 New Fitness Creators (based on the same criterias that were used for rows 3-13)

Add:

- Username

- Instagram profile link

- Number of followers

- Median views per reel (approximately)

- Full name

-
 (if public)

- Country



These must be real gym/lifting creators. No deep digging. Just fast and accurate.





TEST 2 (AFTER YOU GOT SELECTED FOR THE 2ND ROUND) — 1-3 Minutes Introduction Video



Record a simple phone video (no editing needed) and answer:

- Who you are

- Any experience with customer support jobs, social media or research

- How comfortable you are chatting with influencers through DMs

- Why you’re a good fit for this role



Just speak clearly and naturally.





HOW TO APPLY

Reply to this job post with:

A Google Drive link containing:

- Your completed Google Sheet (for TEST 1 tasks)



Answers to these short questions (in text form in the message you send when applying):

- How many hours/day or week can you work?

- Are you comfortable with NYC TIME hours full-time?

- Are you comfortable handling DM conversations?



Applications missing either test 1 OR answers to the questions will be ignored automatically.

Write “Philippines #1” at the end of your last question's answer so we know you actually read this :)
