title: Spreadsheet Wizard
description:
What you’ll do

You’ll build and maintain clean, reliable spreadsheets that act like lightweight internal tools: dashboards, trackers, reporting systems, and automation-ready templates.

This is not “formatting cells.” You’ll be solving messy spreadsheet problems, designing simple systems, and making them hard to break.



Core responsibilities

Build dashboards (monthly KPIs, performance summaries, rollups, trend views)

Create and maintain tracking systems (invoices, expenses, pipeline, ops logs, QA logs)

Write and debug formulas: QUERY, FILTER, ARRAYFORMULA, SUMIFS, XLOOKUP/VLOOKUP, INDEX/MATCH, LET, LAMBDA (Excel), REGEX, TEXT, DATE, IFERROR, etc.

Clean and structure data (consistent schemas, validations, naming, tab logic)

Build automation-ready sheets (structured tables, inputs vs outputs separation)

Google Apps Script for automations (invoice generation, buttons, data pulls, exports)



What “great” looks like

You ask the right clarifying questions, then ship a working version fast.

Sheets are readable: consistent formatting, labels, protected ranges, validations.

You can explain your logic clearly and leave notes so others can maintain it.



Required skills

Strong Google Sheets + Excel skills (advanced formulas)

Ability to design systems (not just follow instructions)

Strong attention to detail (no silent errors)

Clear communication: you can summarize what you built, how it works, and what assumptions you made



Nice to have

Experience with Notion

title: Sales and Customer Service Agent for Cleaning Services Company
description:
We are a well-established commercial and residential cleaning company serving the San Francisco Bay Area, California. With a strong reputation for quality services including office cleaning, house cleaning, window washing, solar panel cleaning, and more, we're expanding our remote team to deliver exceptional customer experiences. We're looking for dedicated, high-performing agents to join us in driving sales and supporting our clients. If you're passionate about building relationships and closing deals in the service industry, this is your opportunity to grow with a dynamic company!



Job Type: Full-Time, Remote



Salary: Competitive base pay starting at US$600.00  to  US$800.00 per month. plus performance-based commissions and bonuses.



Hours: Flexible schedule aligned with US Pacific Time (PST), typically Monday to Friday, 8 AM - 5 PM PST (which is 11 PM - 8 AM PHT—perfect for night owls or those preferring evening shifts).



Start Date: Immediate



Key Responsibilities:



Handle inbound and outbound calls/emails from potential and existing clients, providing friendly and professional customer service.



Sell our cleaning services by identifying client needs, presenting tailored solutions, and closing sales effectively.



Schedule appointments and coordinate cleaning jobs using our booking systems.



Manage customer relationships through our CRM platform (experience with Zoho CRM or similar is a plus), updating records, tracking leads, and following up on inquiries.



Respond to leads from various channels like Yelp, Google, websites, and phone calls, ensuring quick and accurate follow-through.



Collaborate with the team to resolve issues, process quotes, and ensure high customer satisfaction.



Meet or exceed monthly sales targets while maintaining a commitment to excellent service.



Requirements:



At least 2-3 years of experience in sales and customer service, preferably in the service industry (e.g., cleaning, home services, or similar).



Proven track record in selling services over the phone/email, with strong closing skills and the ability to handle objections.



Expertise in scheduling appointments and managing calendars/tools for efficient coordination.



Solid experience with CRM systems (e.g., Zoho CRM, Salesforce, or equivalent) for lead tracking, data entry, and reporting.



Native-level English proficiency (both written and spoken) with excellent communication skills—clear, confident, and persuasive.



High level of commitment, reliability, and a positive attitude; we're seeking long-term tea
mbers who take ownership of their role.



Comfortable working remotely with a stable internet connection (at least 20 Mbps), a quiet workspace, and reliable computer/headset.



Availability to work US hours (PST) and flexibility for occasional weekends if needed.



Bachelor's degree or equivalent experience preferred.



What We Offer:



Competitive salary with uncapped commissions, top performers earn significantly more!



Comprehensive training on our services, systems, and sales techniques.



Opportunities for growth, including promotions to senior roles or team leads.



Remote work perks: no commute, flexible breaks, and a supportive virtual team environment.



Paid time off, health benefits, and performance incentives.



A collaborative culture where your ideas are valued and your success is celebrated.



If you're a motivated professional ready to bring your A-game to a growing company, apply now! Please submit your resume, a cover letter explaining why you're a great fit, and examples of your sales achievements or CRM experience. Shortlisted candidates will be invited for a video interview.



We can't wait to hear from you, let's build something amazing together!



"Please title your application message with the subject line:  Cleaning Pros 2"

title: Experienced B2B Cold Caller
description:
* PLEASE READ THE ENTIRE DESCRIPTION BEFORE APPLYING *





IMPORTANT:



- We are ONLY looking for candidates with previous B2B cold calling experience.

- If you have only worked warm leads, inbound calls, or appointment setting from ads, do NOT apply.



COMPANY INFO:



- My name is Jordan. I am the founder of a fast-growing company that helps small businesses never miss a call using an A.I. Receptionist.

- This is a simple, high-demand service that business owners immediately understand. We are looking for 1–2 strong cold callers to help introduce it to small business owners across the U.S.

- We are not a large corporate call center.  We are a small team with an owner focussed on helping the team get real results.



WHAT YOU WILL DO:



- Source your own B2B leads

- Cold call small business owners

- Book them for a free consultation

- Ensure they show up to the call

- That's it!  You do not close deals. Our closing team handles everything, your only job is to get them to show-up.



MUST HAVE (DO NOT APPLY IF THIS DOES NOT DESCRIBE YOU):



- Proven B2B cold calling experience

- Strong English with no heavy accent

- Reliable internet and a quiet workspace

- Comfortable making high-volume outbound calls

- Put the phrase “Dial And Smile” in your subject line so we know you read this



COMPENSATION:



-$2/hour base 

-$25 per attended show-up

- $100 per closed deal

- Monthly performance bonuses



HOURS:



- Part-time (20 hours per week) with the option to transition to full time

- Schedule: 2:00 AM – 6:00 AM Philippine Time



HOW TO APPLY:



- Do not send a generic message.

- In your application, include 2 things: Your specific B2B cold calling experience AND why this role fits you

- Do not use chat GPT or similar responses, those will be rejected.  We read each application and looking for a genuine person to reach out.

title: Video Editor — DTC Ad Creatives (Meta/TikTok) | Part-Time
description:
We're a fast-moving DTC e-commerce brand selling cleaning products across AU, NZ, UK, and EU markets. We run paid social hard — Meta is our primary channel — and we need a video editor who gets ads, not just editing.

What this actually looks like:



Editing UGC-style video ad creatives for Meta (Reels/Stories/Feed)

Working from mash-up footage + AI voiceover (ElevenLabs) to produce scroll-stopping hooks

Executing batch creative production — we test multiple hooks, angles, and formats per cycle

Iterating fast on winning concepts: resizing, recuts, new hooks on existing bodies

Delivering clean exports ready to upload — no back-and-forth on basics



You're the right fit if you:



Have real experience editing direct-response Meta ads for DTC/e-commerce brands

Understand hook structure, problem-agitate-solution, and why the first 2 seconds d
 everything

Can work from a creative brief without needing your hand held

Are comfortable with CapCut, Premiere, or similar — tool matters less than output

Have a portfolio with actual ad creatives, not just brand videos or organic content



Bonus points:



Experience with ugly ads / lo-fi UGC style

Can suggest angles or hook variations, not just execute

EU/UK market exposure



The role:



Part-time, ongoing

Remote, async-friendly

We move fast — turnaround matters

Long-term for the right person



To apply, send your portfolio + 2-3 examples of Meta ad creatives you've edited. Tell me what the ad was for and whether it ran.

title: WordPress & Marketing Automation Specialist
description:
We're looking for a highly capable WordPress & Marketing Automation Specialist to manage and optimize our funnel infrastructure, CRM automations, and website stability.



This is not a beginner VA role.



You'll be responsible for building and maintaining structured automation systems inside Keap and Go High Level, as well as managing our WordPress + WooCommerce ecosystem.



If you love clean tagging structures, preventing automation chaos, and building scalable systems — this will suit you.





WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING

------------------------------------------------------------



Marketing Automation & CRM (Keap + GHL)



- Build and maintain structured automation workflows

- Implement cohort-based challenge funnels 
 + SMS)

- Set up buyer routing and suppression logic

- Ensure clean tagging taxonomy and segmentation

- Integrate GHL ? Keap with proper duplicate prevention

- Configure goal-based exits and lifecycle management

- QA and test full customer journeys

- Maintain database hygiene and reporting clarity



Funnel & Website Maintenance (WordPress)



- Maintain WordPress site performance and stability

- Manage WooCommerce + Subscriptions

- Work with FunnelKit, AccessAlly, and related plugins

- Troubleshoot checkout, tagging, and webhook issues

- Monitor plugin conflicts and system reliability

- Implement landing pages and minor layout updates (no heavy design work)

- Ensure clean staging ? production deployments



Systems & Optimization



- Improve automation efficiency

- Reduce tag bloat and campaign conflicts

- Create reusable campaign frameworks

- Document processes for duplication and scaling

- Identify and fix edge-case breakdowns





OUR CURRENT STACK

------------------------------------------------------------



- WordPress

- WooCommerce + Subscriptions

- FunnelKit (Cart + Automations)

- AccessAlly

- Keap (CRM & Campaign Builder)

- Go High Level (Forms & Lead Capture)

- Stripe / PayPal

- SMS via Keap provider

- Custom WordPress plugins



Experience with this type of ecosystem is essential.





WHO THIS IS PERFECT FOR

------------------------------------------------------------



You:



- Think in systems, not just tasks

- Understand CRM lifecycle architecture

- Know how to prevent automation conflicts

- Have strong troubleshooting ability

- Can debug webhooks and purchase triggers

- Understand membership/subscription logic

- Care about clean naming conventions and scalability

- Don't panic when something breaks — you diagnose

- Uses AI tools as a core part of your workflow — not optional (ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, Claude Code, Cursor, or similar)



You've likely worked on:



- Info product businesses

- Membership programs

- Coaching funnels

- Challenge funnels

- Subscription products





WHAT WE DON'T NEED

If you spend way too much time on Instagram/TikTok checking gym creators, this might be the easiest job you ever land.



We’re a Gen-Z–run app studio building a fast-growing fitness app, and we’re hiring VAs to help us research, reach out to, and build relationships with influencers.



- No experience required.

- No resume required.

- Just strong English + good judgment + social media instincts.

- Must work NYC timezones! (in between 9am to 5pm)



If you understand gym culture, talk like a human, and type like a native English speaker, you’re already ahead of 99% of applicants.

, etc.)

YOU’RE A FIT IF YOU

- Have very strong written English (this is the #1 requirement)

- Know the gym/fitness niche (huge bonus)

- Are organized and detail-oriented

- Can follow instructions EXACTLY

- Are comfortable reaching out to people on social media

- Have good judgment (can spot fake/farm accounts instantly)

- Are under 28 (our team is young)

- Want part-time remote work you can do from anywhere



We don’t care about degrees. We care about output, consistency, and attitude.





WHAT WE OFFER

- Fast replies, fast onboarding

- Fun Gen-Z team

- Simple tasks anyone smart can do

- The chance to handle creator deals + negotiations once you prove yourself

title: Thumbnail Designer
description:
We’re looking for a high-skill YouTube thumbnail designer who can consistently create scroll-stopping, high-CTR thumbnails using Adobe Photoshop. You should understand visual hierarchy, emotion, contrast, and mobile-first design, and be able to iterate fast based on feedback and performance data.



This is for ongoing work. Quality and reliability matter more than speed, but you must be able to execute with pace once direction is clear.



Responsibilities

Design YouTube thumbnails that are optimized for CTR and mobile viewing

Create multiple concepts/variations per video (typically 2–6)

Do strong photo compositing (cutouts, lighting, shadows, integration)

Handle retouching (skin, objects, cleanup) and enhance clarity

Build strong typography only when needed (clean, minimal, readable)

Deliver layered PSD files with organized groups and editable text



Iterate quickly based on:

Creative direction

A/B testing results

CTR / audience signals



Required Skills

Expert-level Adobe Photoshop



Strong understanding of:

Composition and visual hierarchy

Lighting, color, contrast, and depth

Facial expression emphasis and “emotion reads”

Clean cutouts (hair included when needed)

Mobile-first readability (small size clarity)

Able to follow a consistent brand style while still producing fresh concepts

Strong attention to detail and clean file organization



Nice to Have

YouTube thumbnail experience with proven results (CTR lift, wins, etc.)

Familiarity with MrBeast-style pacing, kids thumbnails, or education packaging (depending on niche)

Ability to generate quick mockups from rough references

Basic understanding of A/B testing and why thumbnails win/lose

title: Marketing Mgmt Associate
description:
About the Role



We are seeking a proactive and creative Marketing Manager Associate to help drive brand growth and increase revenue through strategic marketing initiatives. The ideal candidate has hands-on experience in digital marketing, social media management, and advertising, with the ability to turn insights into engaging campaigns that deliver measurable results.



Key Responsibilities

-Develop and execute effective sales and marketing strategies to boost revenue and brand awareness.

-Track industry trends, competitor activities, and consumer insights to identify growth opportunities.

-Design and manage marketing flyers, social media posts, and promotional materials for digital and offline channels.

-Create and optimize Google and Meta Ads campaigns to maximize reach and conversions.

-Collaborate with the marketing team to plan and execute creative, engaging campaigns aligned with brand objectives.

-Analyze sales data and marketing metrics to evaluate performance and improve strategies.

-Provide exceptional customer support to ensure satisfaction and encourage repeat business.



Requirements

-Strong organizational and time management skills with the ability to handle multiple projects efficiently.

-Excellent communication and negotiation skills for effective stakeholder engagement.

-Proven strategic thinking, problem-solving, and creativity in developing marketing initiatives.

-Experience with marketing design tools like Canva, social media management, Google Ads, and Meta Ads.

-Proactive attitude with the ability to work independently and as part of a team.





How to Apply

1. Submit your updated resume and a cover letter outlining your relevant experience and interest in the position.

2. Include a screenshot of your results from this Myers-Briggs Personality Test: 
/free-personality-test

.



Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for an interview.

title: Marketing Assistant
description:
Marketing Assistant (Remote) — Borrow Well (Adelaide, Australia)



Borrow Well is a growing mortgage broking business based in Adelaide, South Australia. We’re looking for a remote Marketing Assistant to help us produce and distribute content consistently, run simple paid campaigns, and improve our marketing and lead quality through better data and follow-up systems.



What you’ll do

1) Social media content production and publishing

Edit short-form videos for Instagram/TikTok and long-form videos for YouTube.

Add captions, text overlays, simple motion/effects, and polish for platform style.

Create thumbnails and simple graphics (Canva preferred; Adobe optional).

Publish posts and stories daily across our platforms.

Repurpose content (one recording ? multiple clips, formats, and captions).

Maintain a simple content calendar so we stay consistent.



2) Paid ads (Meta)



Turn our best-performing content into Meta ads (Reels/Stories/Feed placements).

Build ad creatives, variations, and basic A/B tests (hooks, thumbnails, captions).

Monitor performance and report weekly on what’s working (CPL, CTR, leads, quality).



3)
 marketing + automations



Build and maintain automated
 campaigns for leads and customers.

Improve conversion and lead quality through better nurture sequences.

Keep messaging clear, simple, and compliant (education-first, no promises).



4) Data and process improvement



Track lead sources and performance by channel.

Identify drop-off points and propose improvements (forms, booking flow, follow-ups).

Provide simple weekly reporting with insights and next actions.



4) Script writing + content ideas

Come up with ideas for new posts and content. 

Plan content strategies

Content and business are related is property, mortgages, finance and investment.



Tools we use (or similar)

Canva (required)

Video editing: CapCut / Premiere Pro / Final Cut (any is fine if output quality is strong)

 platform: Brevo

Google Drive + Sheets (required)



What we’re looking for



Strong English writing and editing skills.

Confident video editing with a “social-first” style (tight pacing, strong hooks).

Experience supporting Meta ads campaigns (even small budgets is fine).

Comfortable working to daily output targets and weekly reporting.

High attention to detail and ability to follow a brand style guide.



Bonus (nice to have)

Experience in finance, property, or professional services marketing.

Basic understanding of funnels: lead capture,  nurture,  booking,  conversion.

Copywriting for ads and
 sequences.

title: Broker Support Officer
description:
Join Borrow Well as a Broker Support Officer (Mortgage Broking)



We’re hiring a remote Broker Support Officer to join Borrow Well in Adelaide. This is a hands-on operations role supporting our brokers end-to-end across active client files, from initial triage through to settlement.



Borrow Well is built around clear process, fast communication, and high service standards—particularly for investors, self-employed clients, and complex income scenarios. If you like being the person who keeps everything moving (without things slipping), you’ll fit right in.



What You’ll Do



You’ll support the broker across the full application lifecycle, including:



Managing loan lodgements and keeping files progressing through each stage



Liaising with lenders (assessment teams, BDMs, credit, valuations) and following up consistently



Client communication 
s, calls, SMS) to request documents, clarify details, and keep clients updated



Document review and file prep (correctness, completeness, suitability for submission)



Ordering valuations and coordinating any valuation follow-ups



Conducting credit checks and confirming key details before submission



Supporting settlements (tracking milestones, chasing outstanding items, ensuring nothing blocks settlement)



CRM and workflow maintenance so that the whole team can work as well as possible.



What to Expect



You’ll typically help manage multiple files at once and keep progress visible at all times.



The standard is same-day acknowledgement and proactive follow-up—clients and lenders should not be wondering what’s happening.



You’ll work within a defined workflow, but you’ll also be expected to spot issues early and escalate them with options, not problems.



The Skillset You’ll Need



To do well here, you must have:



Strong written and verbal communication in English (clear, fast, and professional)



High attention to detail (you notice what others miss)



Strong organisation and follow-through (nothing gets dropped)



Confidence with follow-ups and “difficult” conversations when needed



Comfort working in modern systems (CRM, lender portals, online docs, e-sign, checklists)



A bias toward action—progress matters, but accuracy is non-negotiable



Reliability: you don’t miss
s, calls, or time-sensitive lender requests



Who This Suits



This role suits someone who is:



Proactive, ready to take on a range of tasks to ensure client success



Calm under pressure and able to manage competing priorities



Process-driven and enjoys improving systems over time



Experience:

Mortgage or banking experience is helpful, but not required. If you’re a strong operator with the right mindset, we’ll train you.

title: Video Editor
description:
We’re hiring a YouTube-first video editor who can turn raw footage into fast, clean, retention-driven long-form videos. This is not basic cutting. We need someone who understands pacing, story structure, and how to keep viewers watching minute-to-minute.



What You’ll Do

Edit long-form YouTube videos from raw footage into a polished final cut

Build tight pacing, remove dead space, and maintain energy throughout

Improve clarity and flow using b-roll, screen recordings, captions, and light motion graphics

Design and apply simple but consistent visual systems (lower thirds, callouts, zooms, highlights)

Sync and mix audio cleanly (levels, noise reduction, music/SFX balance)

Implement feedback quickly and accurately with minimal revision loops

Deliver organized project files and exports on schedule



What “Good” Looks Like

The first 30–60 seconds are strong and clear

Cuts feel intentional, not random

Visuals support the story, not distract from it

Notes get executed correctly the first time

Videos ship consistently without chaos



Requirements

Strong experience editing YouTube long-form content (portfolio required)

Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro (After Effects is a plus)

Strong sense of timing, rhythm, and narrative structure

Clean audio habits and understanding of basic sound design

Ability to follow style references and match an existing editing voice

Reliable communication and on-time delivery



Nice to Have

After Effects (simple motion graphics, compositing, tracking)

Familiarity with YouTube retention and pacing best practices

Experience editing educational, documentary, or personality-driven content

Ability to build reusable templates for faster production



Workflow + Tools

You’ll receive raw footage, a brief, and references

Feedback is given via timecoded notes (
, Google Docs, or similar)

Editors must keep projects organized and easy to hand off



Deliverables

First cut (with placeholder b-roll/graphics where needed)

Revised cut(s) based on notes

Final exports (4K/1080p as needed) + project files on request

title: Cold Caller / SDR — US B2B Outbound (Part-Time, 30 hrs/wk)
description:
WHO WE ARE



Small US-based digital marketing agency serving ecommerce brands. We manage paid advertising (Google Ads, Meta Ads) and help clients grow profitably. We're expanding our outbound sales team and need a dedicated cold caller.



THE ROLE



You will cold call US-based ecommerce business owners and marketing directors to book 20-minute discovery meetings. That is the entire job — book meetings. You are not closing deals, writing proposals, or managing accounts.



This is HIGH-VOLUME outbound dialing. If you prefer
 outreach, research, or consultative selling, this is not the role.



WHAT YOU'LL DO



- Cold call
US prospects per day using a power dialer (Kixie)

- Follow a provided script (you will be trained, not left to figure it out)

- Book discovery meetings via Calendly

- Log activity in a shared tracking sheet

- Leave pre-recorded voi
s and send templated follow-up texts

- Join brief daily check-ins and weekly 1:1s via video



SCHEDULE



- 30 hours per week (Mon-Fri, 6 hours/day)

- Must overlap with US business hours (Pacific or Eastern time zone)

- Consistent schedule required — no shifting hours week to week



COMPENSATION



- $5/hour base (30 hrs/wk = ~$650/month)

- $75 bonus per booked meeting that is attended by the prospect

- $250 bonus when a meeting converts to a signed client

- Path to $6/hour at 90 days based on performance

- 13th month pay in December



Realistic earnings: $750-$1,000/month including bonuses once ramped.



REQUIREMENTS



- Excellent spoken English (C1 minimum — you will be voice tested)

- Previous cold calling experience strongly preferred (B2B preferred, not required)

- Comfortable with rejection — 95%+ of calls will be "no" and that is normal

- Reliable high-speed internet + quiet workspace for calls

- Backup internet (mobile hotspot) required

- Available for video check-ins 2x/week

- Laptop or desktop with headset (no mobile-only setups)



WHAT WE PROVIDE



- Full cold call script and objection handling playbook

- Power dialer (Kixie) — no personal phone needed

- Lead lists — you do not source your own leads

- Training during your first week (mock calls, script practice, tool setup)

- 2-week paid trial at full base rate



TO APPLY — READ THIS CAREFULLY



Applications without ALL of the following will not be reviewed:



1. Record a 60-second voice memo introducing yourself as if you are cold calling a business owner. Say: "Hi [Name], I'm calling from a US digital marketing agency. We help ecommerce brands get better results from their advertising. I had a quick question about your ad spend — do you have 30 seconds?" Upload to Vocaroo or Google Drive and include the link.



2. Answer this question: How many cold calls did you make per day in your most recent calling role? If you have no cold calling experience, say so honestly and tell us what relevant experience you do have.



3. Tell us in 2-3 sentences: Why do you want this role?



We review voice memos first. If your English is clear, natural, and energetic, you will be invited to a Zoom interview with a live mock call.

title: Senior Staff Accountant
description:
I am hiring a Senior Staff Accountant, preferably someone with background in the US healthcare industry.



Responsibilities:

- Oversee the full-cycle accounting process, including journal entries, reconciliations, and adjustments.

- Manage the month-end and year-end close processes, ensuring accuracy and timeliness.

- Prepare and review monthly, quarterly, and annual financial statements.

- Analyze financial data to provide insights and recommendations for decision-making.

- Collaborate with other departments to ensure compliance with internal controls and accounting standards.

- Assist in budgeting, forecasting, and variance analysis.

- Support audit processes and prepare necessary documentation.

- Develop and maintain accounting policies and procedures.



Qualifications:

- Bachelor’s degree in Accounting is required; CPA designation is an advantage.

- At least 5 years of experience in accounting, including month-end close and financial reporting.

- Proficiency in various accounting software and advanced Excel skills.

- Strong knowledge of GAAP and full-cycle accounting processes.

- Experience in the healthcare industry is an advantage.

- Experience with healthcare-specific accounting tasks, such as managing billing systems or patient account reconciliations, is a plus.

- Proven track record of implementing process improvements and efficiencies is a plus.

- Must be willing to work full-time during US Pacific business hours



Apply here:

title: E-Commerce Customer Service VA — Shopify Experience Required
description:
We're a fast-growing brand doing 3,000+ orders/month looking for a reliable, detail-oriented Customer Service VA to independently manage daily
 support, returns processing, and order operations.

This is NOT a "copy-paste only" role. You'll handle the full customer service workflow end-to-end, including creating return labels and editing orders in Shopify. The only things you escalate are refunds and money-back decisions.



What You'll Be Doing:



— Respond to 100–150 customer
s per day using AI-drafted response templates (customize details, adjust tone, and send)

— Manage the full return process independently: screen return requests (verify 30-day window, request photos, confirm opened/unopened status), create and send return labels for qualified returns, and send denial responses for returns that don't qualify

— Edit orders in Shopify admin (address changes, cancellations before shipment)

— Look up order status, tracking info, and customer details in Shopify

— Escalate any requests involving refunds, replacements, store credits, or free resends to management — you will NOT have refund/payment access

— Flag recurring complaints, product issues, or patterns to management weekly

Requirements:

— 1+ year experience in e-commerce customer service

— Shopify admin experience REQUIRED (order editing, customer lookup, returns/label creation — if you haven't used Shopify, please do not apply)

— Experience handling 80+
s/tickets per day

— Strong written English — you'll be customizing AI-drafted responses so grammar and tone matter

— Comfortable following SOPs and scripts consistently without hand-holding after training

— Experience with
 ticketing systems (Freshdesk, Zendesk, Gorgias, or similar)

— Reliable internet connection

— Available Monday–Saturday, ~4 hours/day during US business hours (CST)



Nice to Have:

— Experience with Klaviyo, ShipStation, or similar e-commerce tools

— Worked with a DTC / direct-to-consumer brand selling physical products

— Familiar with split-shipment logistics



To Apply:

Include the word APPLY at the top of your application, then answer these five questions:



Tell me about your Shopify customer service experience — what did you do in Shopify admin specifically?



How many
s/tickets per day did you handle in your most recent CS role?



A customer
s saying they placed an order 5 days ago and haven't received tracking. What's the first thing you do?



An angry customer threatens a bad review unless they get a full refund. The product was delivered and used. What do you do?



What
 or ticketing tools have you used?

title: Graphic Designer — eCommerce Website & Marketing Graphics
description:
About Us

GroundingWell is a $100M revenue eCommerce company selling grounding and earthing health products (bedsheets, mats, shoes) to customers worldwide. We’re a remote team spanning Australia, the USA, Canada, and the Philippines.



What You’ll Do

• Design and iterate on eCommerce website layouts in Figma

• Create marketing graphics, infographics, and visual assets for ads and landing pages

• Simplify complex concepts into clean, visually compelling graphics

• Proactively suggest creative ideas for new graphics and design improvements



Requirements

• Proficient in Figma (required)

• Experience designing website layouts for eCommerce

• Extreme attention to detail

• Ability to communicate design ideas clearly (verbally and visually)

• Available to work at least 5 hours per day between 8 AM and 8 PM AEST



Why Work With Us

We pay above-market rates and offer generous bonuses for creative ideas that perform well in our marketing. We’re a direct-response advertising company, which means the effectiveness of your creative work is directly measurable by its profitability when used as paid advertising on social media. Great designers earn significantly more in performance bonuses than their base salary. Your graphics will be used across all advertising channels across the entire business. If you’re someone who constantly generates ideas and wants to be recognised and paid for it, this is the role for you.



How to Apply

Send your portfolio (or 3–5 samples of your best work) and a brief message about why you’re interested. Shortlisted candidates will be sent a short application form and then invited to a quick 5–10 minute video call.

title: Front-End Developer - React & React Native
description:
We are seeking a talented and passionate Front End Developer of senior level with expertise in React Native to join our dynamic team. This role involves developing and maintaining user interfaces for both web and mobile applications.



Our platform powers a significant portion of our logistics and warehouse operations, used both internally and by external partners across North America. You’ll work with a globally distributed engineering team (based in Canada, India, the Philippines, and Iran) in an agile, fast-paced environment, contributing to a modern, scalable, and high-performance logistics platform. 



Responsibilities: 

• Lead the design, development, and maintenance of scalable React web applications and React Native mobile apps.

• Act as a hands-on technical leader, contributing high-quality code while guiding frontend best practices and standards.

• Define and evolve frontend architecture, ensuring performance, scalability, and maintainability.

• Mentor and support frontend developers through code reviews, technical guidance, and knowledge sharing.

• Collaborate closely with product, design, and backend teams to translate requirements into well-structured frontend solutions.

• Drive frontend performance optimization, including profiling, caching strategies, and reducing render and load times.

• Implement and manage state using tools such as Redux, Zustand, Recoil, or Context API based on application needs.

• Integrate real-time data flows using WebSockets and third-party services such as Google APIs.

• Ensure consistent UI/UX by working with component-based architecture and modern styling solutions (Tailwind, Styled Components, SASS).

• Maintain and improve frontend build systems and tooling using Webpack, Vite, Babel, Jest, ESLint, and Prettier.

• Support CI/CD pipelines and ensure reliable, high-quality releases.

• Participate in agile ceremonies including sprint planning, stand-ups, retrospectives, and technical discussions.

• Communicate effectively with a globally distributed team and contribute to a collaborative engineering culture.



Qualifications:

• 5+ years of professional experience in frontend development, with strong expertise in modern JavaScript ecosystems.

• Good to have experience with React Native for building and maintaining mobile applications.

• Advanced proficiency in React, TyhspeScript, JavaScript (ES6+), HTML5, CSS3, and component-based architecture.

• Deep experience with state management tools such as Redux, Zustand, Recoil, or Context API.

• Experience with frontend performance tuning, profiling, caching, and optimizing large-scale applications.

• Familiarity with modern frontend technologies such as React Server Components, Tailwind CSS, Styled Components, or SASS.

• Experience integrating WebSockets, Google APIs, and real-time data flows.

• Strong knowledge of frontend build and tooling: Webpack, Vite, Babel, Jest, ESLint, Prettier.

• Proven leadership experience: mentoring developers, leading projects, or managing small teams.

• Experience working in agile or startup environments is highly valued.

• Excellent communication skills and comfort working with distributed teams.

• Strong English skills (written and verbal).



Tech Stack Overview: React, TypeScript, JavaScript (ES6+), React Native (Expo preferred), Redux/Zustand, WebSockets, Tailwind CSS, Styled Components, Webpack, Vite, Jest, CI/CD



Position Details

Type: Full-time, Remote

Hours: 174 hours/month (Time Doctor for time tracking)

Environment: Agile, international, product-focused, fast-paced



How to Apply:

Please send your updated resume and portfolio showcasing relevant experience to 



Important: The subject of your
 must be: “Front-End Developer - React & React Native (Remote) Application”

title: SEO SPECIALIST (WITH AI SEO EXPERIENCE)
description:
Overview

We are seeking a results-driven SEO Specialist with strong expertise across technical SEO, on-page optimization, content strategy and link building. This role will be responsible for driving organic growth, improving paid campaign performance, and strengthening the overall authority and visibility of our digital presence across search engines.



The ideal candidate combines technical expertise, creative content strategy, and analytical acumen, ensuring that both organic and paid efforts align with broader business objectives.





Key Responsibilities

1. Technical SEO + AI SEO

• Conduct comprehensive website audits to identify and resolve crawl, indexation, and site structure issues.

• Optimize Core Web Vitals, mobile performance, and overall site speed.

• Implement and maintain robots.txt, XML sitemaps, and canonical tags for proper indexation.

• Collaborate with web developers on schema markup, internal linking, and URL architecture improvements.

• Manage redirects, site migrations, and ensure minimal ranking impact post-deployment.

• Monitor and maintain search engine visibility, fixing crawl errors and monitoring coverage in Google Search Console.

• Support international SEO and multi-language site optimization where required.





2. On-Page SEO

• Conduct detailed keyword research and mapping for all priority pages.

• Optimize meta titles, descriptions, headings, and image alt text for target keywords.

• Ensure content is aligned with search intent, keyword clusters, and user engagement best practices.

• Audit and enhance internal linking structure for optimal equity flow and crawl depth.

• Conduct competitor benchmarking to identify new ranking opportunities.

• Collaborate with UX/design teams to improve landing page performance and conversions.





3. Content Strategy & Writing

• Plan, write, and edit SEO-optimized content for blogs, service pages, guides, and landing pages.

• Conduct topic and content gap analysis to expand keyword coverage and topical authority.

• Ensure all content adheres to E-E-A-T and brand voice standards.

• Collaborate with copywriters, designers, and videographers to produce high-performing content assets.

• Use performance data to optimize and refresh existing content for improved rankings and engagement.





4. Link Building & Outreach

• Develop and execute a comprehensive link-building strategy to improve domain authority and page authority.

• Identify and pursue high-quality backlink opportunities through guest posting, partnerships, digital PR, and content promotion.

• Conduct backlink audits using tools such as Ahrefs or SEMrush to identify toxic or low-quality links.

• Manage outreach campaigns to bloggers, journalists, and industry websites to secure relevant backlinks.

• Monitor anchor text distribution, backlink growth, and link quality over time.

• Collaborate with the content team to create linkable assets (e.g., infographics, research reports, case studies).







6. Analytics & Reporting

• Track organic and paid performance through Google Analytics (GA4), Google Ads, Search Console, and Looker Studio dashboards.

• Generate detailed monthly and quarterly reports with actionable insights.

• Monitor keyword movements, traffic trends, bounce rates, and conversion data.

• Evaluate the impact of SEO and SEM initiatives on overall business KPIs.

• Stay current with Google algorithm updates and implement best practices proactively.





Qualifications & Skills

• Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, IT, or a related discipline.

• 3+ years of experience in SEO (technical, on-page, content, link building) + AI SEO EXPERIENCE

• Proven track record improving organic traffic, keyword rankings, and domain authority.

• Demonstrated success managing Google Ads and Bing Ads campaigns with measurable ROI.

• Strong content writing and editing skills, with the ability to craft engaging, SEO-optimized content.

• Proficiency with industry tools: Google Analytics (GA4), Search Console, Google Ads, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Moz, Screaming Frog, and PageSpeed Insights.

• Knowledge of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript fundamentals.

• Familiarity with CMS platforms such as WordPress, Shopify, or HubSpot.

• Excellent communication, analytical thinking, and collaboration skills.

• Strong project management and time management capabilities.





Why Join Us

• Collaborative, data-driven digital marketing environment.

• Opportunity to work on diverse, high-impact SEO & SEM campaigns.

• Access to premium marketing tools and training resources.

• Competitive salary and bonus structure based on performance.

• Career growth in a fast-evolving digital team.

• International Trips for client meetings



START DATE: FEB 2026

TYPE: FULL TIME

DAYSHIFT - MELBOURNE TIME

title: Social Media Coordinator 40k START ASAP
description:
We are seeking a highly innovative, creative, and results-driven Social Media Coordinator to join our team. 



This is a full-time, work-from-home position. We aren’t just looking for someone to post pictures; we want a "platform native" who is eager to test new ideas, modify strategies based on data, and help us dominate our niche across all digital touchpoints. 



About the Role 



As our Social Media Coordinator, you will own the execution of our digital presence. You will be responsible for: 



1. Platform Management & Innovation 

•Full-Stack Execution: Managing daily operations for
, Instagram, TikTok, and Pinterest (YouTube is a major plus). 

•Creative Testing: Constantly bringing new ideas to the table, willing to test different content formats, and quickly modifying based on what the data shows. 

•KPI Focused: Planning and posting with a clear eye on performance metrics (growth, engagement, and conversion). 



2. Content Planning & Partnerships 

•Calendar Management: Developing and maintaining a robust content calendar (Stories, Reels, Photos, and Videos). 

•Influencer Relations: Collaborating with creators and suppliers on high-impact campaigns and managing partnership opportunities. 



3. Engagement & "Always-On" Presence 

•Community Moderation: Responding promptly to customer service chats and enquiries to maintain a premium brand experience. 

•Flexible Monitoring: Checking platforms and messages every 2–3 hours (outside of standard business hours and sleep) to ensure responsiveness and occasionally post timely Stories. 



4. Performance Tracking & Admin 

•Maintaining accurate records of campaigns and providing detailed performance reports. 

•Supporting the broader marketing team with general administrative duties. 



What We’re Looking For 

•Proven Experience: Either a background as a Content Creator or previous experience as a Social Media Manager. 

•Track Record: Minimum 2 years’ experience managing a 100k+ follower business account. 

•Niche Passion: A strong background or genuine interest in furniture, interiors, or fashion. 

•Language Skills: Proficiency in Australian English (spelling, tone, and cultural nuances). 

•Mindset: Highly innovative, proactive, and KPI-driven. You must be comfortable with constant testing and refining of content. 

•Availability: Ability to work flexibly, including checking messages/posting Stories throughout the day/evening. 

•Technical: Reliable high-speed internet and proficiency with Microsoft Teams. 



What We Offer 

•Competitive Monthly Remuneration. 

•The chance to work with a dynamic, high-growth Australian brand. 

•An environment that values creativity, initiative, and the "fail fast, learn faster" approach to innovation. 



How to Apply 

•If you are a creative powerhouse who lives and breathes social media, please complete our online application form here:

title: Animator, Video Editor, Graphic Designer
description:
Looking for a part-time video editor, graphic designer, and animator to help develop courses for children. May become a full-time role if interested.



Looking for someone who can create children's book style animations at scale and who can take the video we have of someone talking and layer in child-friendly video animations and images that match the voiceover. Need to be able to speak English and bring a wide set of skills to get content created across mediums.



Summary

Hi! We’re Capable Kids Collective, a growing children’s education company creating fun, meaningful courses that help kids build life skills, confidence, and capability.



We’re looking for a creative animator/designer/video editor who can help us bring our course lessons to life through engaging visuals, clean edits, and story-driven animation.



Our content is a mix of:

-Talking head footage (instructor on camera)

-Voiceover clips

-B-roll footage

-AI-generated visuals / footage

-Animated graphics + storybook-style scenes

-Occasional whiteboard/explainer segments



We want someone who can help us make our lessons feel high-quality, modern, and fun, without being overly “corporate” or boring.



Visual Style We Want



We’re aiming for a style similar to the attached reference image:

? 2D Storybook / animated illustration vibe

? Friendly, warm, kid-appropriate

? Simple, clean motion (not overly complex character animation unless needed)

? Modern but playful

? Works well with educational narration



Some lessons may also benefit from:

-Whiteboard / explainer style animation

-Kinetic typography

-Simple icon animations

-Clean motion graphics for emphasis



What You’ll Be Doing



You will help us with a mix of tasks like:

1) Video Editing

Assemble lessons using talking head + voiceover

Add B-roll (stock or provided)

Add AI-generated footage when needed

Smooth pacing, clean cuts, and strong flow

Add light music + sound effects (when appropriate)



2) Motion Graphics + Animation

Add storybook-style animated scenes or visual 
nts

Animate simple objects, icons, or characters

Create “teaching 
nts” visually (ex: diagrams, step-by-step visuals)

Add engaging on-screen elements to support learning



3) Graphic Design Support

Design simple visual assets for lessons (ex: icons, labels, illustrations)

Create reusable templates for consistency

Build visual “systems” we can use across lessons



4) Finishing / Exporting

Captions/subtitles (or prep for captions)

Export in clean formats for web delivery

Keep everything organized and easy to revise



Examples of Deliverables

-Edit a 3–6 minute lesson using talking head + b-roll + simple motion graphics

-Create a 30–60 second animated segment that visually explains an idea

-Add storybook-style animated overlays to make a lesson more engaging

-Build a short explainer/whiteboard style clip for a concept



Skills We’re Looking For



Required

-Strong video editing ability (pacing, structure, clean transitions)

-Ability to create motion graphics / animation

-Good design taste (kid-friendly + modern)

-Can follow directions and hit deadlines consistently

-Communicates clearly and is responsive



Bonus (Nice to Have)

-Storybook illustration style experience

-Whiteboard/explainer animation experience

-Experience using AI tools for visuals (Midjourney, DALL·E, Runway, etc.)

-Experience making content for kids or education

-Sound design instincts (simple SFX, music balance)



Tools / Software - We’re flexible on tools as long as the output is great. Common tools include:

-Adobe After Effects / Premiere Pro

-DaVinci Resolve

-Final Cut Pro

-Blender (if needed)

-Photoshop / Illustrator / Procreate

-Motion / Animate

-Any AI workflow you prefer (optional)



Project Type + Workload

This is a long-term role for the right person.

We will start with a small paid test project (1 short lesson edit) and if it’s a great fit, we’ll continue with consistent weekly work.



Estimated workload (initially):

10–20 hours/week



Potential to increase over time

title: Experienced B2B Cold Caller
description:
* PLEASE READ THE ENTIRE DESCRIPTION BEFORE APPLYING *





IMPORTANT:



- We are ONLY looking for candidates with previous B2B cold calling experience.

- If you have only worked warm leads, inbound calls, or appointment setting from ads, do NOT apply.



COMPANY INFO:



- My name is Jordan. I am the founder of a fast-growing company that helps small businesses never miss a call using an A.I. Receptionist.

- This is a simple, high-demand service that business owners immediately understand. We are looking for 1–2 strong cold callers to help introduce it to small business owners across the U.S.

- We are not a large corporate call center.  We are a small team with an owner focussed on helping the team get real results.



WHAT YOU WILL DO:



- Source your own B2B leads

- Cold call small business owners

- Book them for a free consultation

- Ensure they show up to the call

- That's it!  You do not close deals. Our closing team handles everything, your only job is to get them to show-up.



MUST HAVE (DO NOT APPLY IF THIS DOES NOT DESCRIBE YOU):



- Proven B2B cold calling experience

- Strong English with no heavy accent

- Reliable internet and a quiet workspace

- Comfortable making high-volume outbound calls

- Put the phrase “Dial And Smile” in your subject line so we know you read this



COMPENSATION:



-$2/hour base 

-$25 per attended show-up

- $100 per closed deal

- Monthly performance bonuses



HOURS:



- Part-time (20 hours per week) with the option to transition to full time

- Schedule: 2:00 AM – 6:00 AM Philippine Time

title: Maintenance Service Advisor
description:
We’re looking for a detail-oriented, operations-focused **Maintenance Service Advisor** to manage service tickets from intake to final billing inside a fast-growing mobile fleet maintenance company.



This role is not just dispatch support. You will own the lifecycle of a service job once it is assigned. That means interpreting technician notes, writing clear and accurate repair orders, coordinating with parts and scheduling, communicating with customers, securing approvals, and ensuring jobs are billed correctly.



You must be organized, decisive, and comfortable managing multiple active jobs at once. No loose ends. Every ticket should move forward and close cleanly.



This role requires working either Tuesday through Saturday or Sunday through Thursday.



---



## Why You’ll Want to Join



- You will be paid in **USD** (bi-monthly: every 15th and 30th)

- Up to **14 days** of Paid Time Off annually (starting Day 1)

- Observance of **Holidays** per company guidelines

- **100% remote setup** so you can work wherever you’re most productive

- Clear ownership over service workflows

- Direct impact on operational efficiency and billing accuracy

- Opportunity to grow inside a scaling fleet services company



---



## What You’ll Work On



### Ticket Ownership from Start to Finish



- Take service tickets from Dispatch and manage them through completion

- Interpret technician notes and write detailed, accurate repair orders

- Clearly document customer concern, findings, and proposed service

- Stage jobs properly before technicians roll out



### Parts and Scheduling Coordination



- Partner with Parts to ensure everything is ordered and ready

- Align technicians and timelines with Scheduling

- Monitor deadlines to keep jobs moving efficiently

- Prevent delays by proactively identifying gaps



### Customer Communication and Approvals



- Secure approvals from leasing companies, fleet managers, or direct customers

- Keep customers informed with clear and direct communication

- Provide job summaries including findings, services performed, and outcomes

- Ensure alignment before and after service execution



### Billing and Job Closure



- Finalize billing once documentation and photos are complete

- Ensure invoices are accurate and fully supported

- Follow up on repeat or unfinished jobs until they are resolved and billed

- Close the loop on every job with no open threads



---



## What You Bring



- 2 to 5+ years of experience in service writing, repair coordination, or billing operations

- Strong written communication skills with attention to detail

- Ability to interpret technical notes and translate them into clear documentation

- Comfort managing multiple active service jobs simultaneously

- Strong organizational discipline and follow-through

- Experience working with service management systems or ticketing platforms

- Clear, professional communication style



---



## Nice to Have



- Experience in fleet maintenance, automotive service, or commercial vehicle operations

- Background coordinating with parts departments and scheduling teams

- Experience working with leasing companies or fleet managers

- Familiarity with service invoicing workflows



---



## How to Apply



Please include:



1. Your **updated resume**

2. A **short 1 to 2 minute Loom video** explaining your experience managing service tickets or repair orders from intake to billing



**Only complete applications with a Loom video will be considered.**



---



If you are organized, process-driven, and capable of owning service jobs end to end without letting details slip, this role offers clear responsibility and meaningful impact inside a growing fleet operations business.

title: We’re looking for a Graphic Designer who "gets it"
description:
At Splash-N-Color, we’re obsessed with the potential of 3D printing. We truly believe the possibilities of additive manufacturing are endless, and we’re on a mission to show the rest of the world what’s possible.



To do that, we need a designer who can take "cool tech" and turn it into "I need that" visuals.



Here’s the deal: We aren’t your typical corporate machine. We care way more about your values, your eye for design, and your natural intelligence than how many years you’ve checked off on a resume. We’re a team that values empowerment over entitlement. We aren't afraid of mistakes—as long as we’re learning from them together—and we’re committed to helping you grow as a creative.



The Work:

You’ll be the visual voice for our products on Amazon. This means:

Creating high-impact "Hero" images that stand out in a crowded search.

Designing infographics that explain 3D printing benefits simply and beautifully.

Building out A+ Content that tells a story and builds trust.

Drafting and iterating on designs that push the boundaries of how 3D-printed products are perceived.

Flexible Roles

We’re looking for the right person first, and the "schedule" second. We are open to:

Full-Time

Part-Time

Project-Based



Compensation: Php 50,000.00 – 65,000.00 / month (pro-rated based on hours/scope).



Apply for this Job if this sounds like your kind of environment, we’d love to hear from you. Please send your application to 
 Basics:

:

title: Home Health Quality Assurance (QA) Specialist
description:
Job Summary:

We are looking for a detail-oriented Philippine Registered Nurse (PHRN) to join our team as a Home Health QA Specialist. You will be responsible for ensuring clinical documentation—including OASIS assessments and Plans of Care (485)—meets Medicare Conditions of Participation (CoPs) and agency standards for accuracy, compliance, and reimbursement.



Key Responsibilities:

Clinical Chart Audits: Review clinical notes (SN, PT, OT, ST) for accuracy, completeness, and medical necessity.

OASIS Review: Audit OASIS assessments for congruency with visit notes and patient condition.

Compliance Monitoring: Ensure all documentation follows Medicare guidelines and state/federal regulatory requirements.

Plan of Care (485) Oversight: Validate and review Plans of Care for compliance before physician submission.

Clinician Feedback: Provide professional feedback and education to field staff to improve documentation quality.

Reporting: Track and trend quality indicators like hospitalizations, falls, and adverse events for QAPI programs



Education: Bachelor’s Degree in Nursing with an Active PHRN License.

Experience: Minimum 1–3 years of Home Health experience; prior experience in clinical auditing or QA preferred.

Technical Skills: Proficiency with EMR systems  WellSky/Kinnser

Knowledge: Strong understanding of OASIS-E, PDGM, and ICD-10 coding.

Work Setup: Stable internet connection and a dedicated home office for a remote shift.



Competitive salary Monthly: approximately $790.00 - $970.00 per month (?45,200 - ?55,200 per month) | Hourly: approximately $5.12 per hour (?292 per hour)depending on experience and certifications like USRN)

title: Senior Bookkeeper *Superstar Only*
description:
We are looking for two experienced bookkeepers to join our finance team and take ownership of expense categorization, transaction reconciliation, accounts payable, and invoice processing across multiple legal entities.



The bookkeepers will work closely with the CFO, ensuring that all financial transactions are accurately recorded, categorized, and reconciled on a regular basis. This role is ideal for someone who is detail-oriented, organized, and comfortable managing financial data across multiple platforms — including Xero, Stripe, PayPal, Shopify, and our custom CRM.



Key Responsibilities

- Categorize all expenses and transactions in Xero, ensuring accurate classification for reporting and compliance

- Reconcile transactions across multiple payment platforms, including Stripe, PayPal, Shopify, and custom CRM tools

- Manage accounts payable, ensuring all invoices are properly reviewed, recorded, and scheduled for payment

- Assist with invoice processing, ensuring all vendor invoices are accurately documented and match purchase orders where applicable

- Work closely with the CFO to provide up-to-date financial records for monthly, quarterly, and annual reporting

title: Appointment Setter (Remote, Long-Term)
description:
Company: JOGA Soccer Academy

Location: Remote (U.S.-based company, Washington State)

Hours: Full-Time (Open to Part-Time for the right candidate)

Salary: $800 to $1,200 USD/month depending on experience, plus commission bonuses



About JOGA Soccer Academy



JOGA Soccer Academy is the premier private youth soccer training company in Washington State with three indoor training facilities and over 110 athletes ages 6 to 17. We were founded by Kevin Galiano, a former Division 1 soccer player, and we are actively expanding into new markets. We need a dedicated Appointment Setter to help us connect with more families and keep our pipeline full.



This is a long-term role with a company that values loyalty, consistency, and people who take pride in doing excellent work every single day. We do not hire to replace people every few months. If you perform well, you will have a home here and a clear path to grow into sales, client success, or operations.



What You Will Do



You will be the first voice families hear when they engage with JOGA. Your job is to contact, qualify, and book consultations for families interested in our youth soccer training programs. This is a phone-heavy role. You will be calling American parents who are making important decisions about their child's development, and you need to sound confident, clear, and professional on every call.



Your daily responsibilities include working inbound and outbound leads through phone calls using RingCentral,
 follow-ups, and CRM management in HubSpot. You will qualify leads using our discovery script, book consultations on our calendar system, and ensure every lead in the pipeline is followed up with systematically. No lead gets forgotten. No-shows get called back. Warm leads get worked until they convert or decline.



You will keep HubSpot and our Google Sheets tracking systems accurate and updated in real time. You will coordinate with our coaching and admin teams through Notion. Every week you will report on your outreach volume, contact rate, appointment rate, and show rate. The numbers tell the story, and we expect you to know yours.



Requirements (Please Read Carefully)



Excellent spoken English with a clear, neutral accent is required. You will be speaking directly with American parents on the phone daily. If your spoken English is not strong or your accent is heavy, this is not the right fit and we respectfully ask that you do not apply. We will conduct a voice/phone screening early in the hiring process.



Strong written English is also required. You will be sending
s and messages to families and your writing needs to be professional, clear, and free of errors.



Previous experience in appointment setting, outbound calling, telemarketing, lead generation, or inside sales is strongly preferred. You should be comfortable picking up the phone and making 50 or more calls per day without hesitation.



You must be highly organized, reliable, and consistent above all else. We need someone who shows up on time every day, follows the process, works the pipeline, and does not need to be chased or micromanaged. Consistency is the single most important trait we are hiring for. If you are someone who starts strong and then fades after a few weeks, this role will not work.



Familiarity with HubSpot, RingCentral, Google Sheets, Notion, ConvertKit, Wix, or Stripe is a plus. If you do not know these tools but learn quickly, that is fine.



You must have a reliable computer, stable high-speed internet, a quality headset, and a quiet workspace for making calls.



Compensation and Growth



Base pay ranges from $800 to $1,200 USD per month depending on your experience level. On top of base pay, you will earn commission bonuses for each qualified appointment that is attended. Consistent performers earn well above the base rate.



This is not a dead-end VA role. High performers will have real opportunities to move into higher-paying positions in sales, client success, or operations as JOGA continues to grow and open new locations. We promote from within and we reward people who prove themselves.



How to Apply



Submit your resume and a short cover letter (3 to 5 sentences) explaining why you are the right person for this role. Applications without a cover letter will not be reviewed.



Include a link to a 60-second voice recording of yourself (you can use Vocaroo or a Google Drive link) introducing yourself and explaining why you are a strong fit for this position. This is required. Applications without a voice recording will not move forward.



If your application meets our standards, we will reach out to schedule a paid trial task and phone interview.

title: Construction Estimator & CRM Manager
description:
We’re hiring a remote construction estimator who has experience estimating US residential projects and can help us produce accurate, organized, review-ready estimates.



This role rewards someone who is naturally detail-focused and technical. As described in our role profile, the work centers around a careful and deliberate approach to defined estimating tasks and working in a systematic and patient way with factual and technical information.



# We’re looking for a person who:



- Works with a systematic, patient pace and prefers stable methods, processes, and procedures

- Values quality over speed — “Getting it done right, with no mistakes is key”

- Communicates clearly, briefly, and factually

- Can work independently with focused time to think, verify, and document assumptions

- Is comfortable being reviewed closely (we care a lot about accuracy and consistency)



# Responsibilities:



- Perform quantity takeoffs from PDF plans (Bluebeam + our selected AI takeoff tool)

- Read and interpret architectural and structural plans and MEP sheets when provided

- Build clean, organized estimates helping us create templates and cost structure

- Populate draft estimates in Contractor Foreman (using templates and/or CSV/import workflows)

- Create and maintain bid tabs; send RFQs and track subcontractor responses

- Produce clear assumptions, exclusions, and questions for scope gaps (especially on remodels)

- Maintain strict version control and file organization for every estimate

- Deliver a consistent “handoff package” for final review (takeoff file, Excel draft, bid tab, and notes)



# Required Experience / Skills:



- Proven experience producing US construction estimates - residential remodels and custom homes

- Strong plan reading skills and ability to spot missing scope items

- Strong Excel skills (unit consistency, clean formatting, formulas, lookups)

- Bluebeam experience (or comparable PDF takeoff tools)

- Familiarity with a construction CRM:

          - Contractor Foreman preferred because its what we use

          - Buildertrend or Procore experience also acceptable

- Excellent written English and a high attention to detail



# Preferred (Nice-to-Have):



- Experience with AI takeoff/estimating tools (Kreo, Togal, STACK, etc.)

- Experience building assemblies / maintaining a cost database

- Bid leveling experience (apples-to-apples comparisons)



# Schedule:



- Remote position

- 2–4 hours overlap with US Mountain Time is a must for coordination

- 40+ hours/week doing estimating and CRM management



Compensation is based on experience and interview process



# Hiring Process (Mandatory Steps):



*Step 1 — Mandatory Assessment

Complete this assessment and
 your results to 





 subject line: Construction Estimator – Assessment Results – [Your Name]



*Step 2 — Application Materials

In the same
, include:

- Short intro + your US estimating experience (project types + trades you know best)

- Software list (Bluebeam, Excel, Contractor Foreman/Buildertrend/Procore, any AI takeoff tools)

- 1–2 example deliverables (redact private info if needed)



*Assessment link (required):

title: Video Editor & Creator
description:
Calling All Video Editors!



Can you speak and write great English (this is a requirement)?



Need some Pesos?



Want to work full time for a USA based company that has several full time Filipino employees that have worked with us for years?



If so, this is a great opportunity for you.



Do you have a passion for transforming ideas into captivating stories through the magic of video editing? Are you an Adobe Premiere Pro whiz with a keen eye for detail? If so, we want YOU on our team!



Here's the deal:

We're searching for a talented and enthusiastic Video Editor and creator to join our growing team. You'll be working with us to create and edit engaging and visually stunning videos that will grab attention and leave a lasting impression.



You must be able to speak and write good in English for this position.



-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



We're looking for an editor who can:



Speak and write good english



Technical Skills...



Video Editing Software: Proficiency in industry-standard editing software like Adobe Premiere Pro (preferred), Final Cut Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or CapCut. We will test you on Adobe so please do not apply if you do not have experience with Adobe Premier Pro.



Audio Editing: Ability to edit and mix audio tracks, including adding sound effects and music. Ensure lips match up to the sound when playing.



Color Correction and Grading: Knowledge of color correction techniques to enhance the visual quality of videos.



Motion Graphics: A plus is having experience with motion graphics software like After Effects for creating intros, outros, or other visual elements.



Soft Skills...



Strong Storytelling Skills: The ability to understand and convey a narrative through editing techniques.



Creativity and Vision: A keen eye for detail and the ability to create engaging and visually appealing videos.



Communication Skills: Excellent written and verbal communication to collaborate with clients, producers, and other creatives.



Attention to Detail: Ability to identify and fix minor errors to ensure a polished final product.



Time Management: The ability to meet deadlines and manage multiple projects efficiently.



Problem-Solving Skills: The ability to troubleshoot technical issues and find creative solutions.



Additional Qualifications...



Experience in your industry: A plus if the video editor has experience creating videos for youtube. If so please highlight that when you contact us.



Understanding of SEO (optional): If you're creating videos for online purposes, it's helpful if you have a basic understanding of SEO optimization for videos.



The tech stuff:



-A PC/Laptop with enough muscle to handle video editing:

-Intel Core i5/i7 or AMD Ryzen 5/7 (newer generations are ideal), and at least 16GB of RAM).

-A large hard drive to store all your amazing video creations (at least 1TB of storage).

-Graphics card, optional.

-A reliable and fast internet connection for uploading and downloading large video files.



-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



We help a lot of people and you will be an important part of that process and our office.



This is a full time job.



We need to hire immediately



Shift:



USA EST Mondays through Fridays - 10:00am - 6:00pm (PHI night 11:00pm to 7:00am)





Compensation and Benefits:



Base Salary: 40,000 PHP per month



Quarterly Bonus: 20,000 PHP Every 3 months (we do this in place of the 13th month).



Paid Time Off: We have paid time off and have some Philippine holidays off such as All Saints day etc.



We are very familiar with Philippine based VA's (we have 14 full time permanent) and include our Philippine friends as Pamilya, and as an important part of our staff. We have never had any of our Philippine friends quit as we treat everyone with respect and as an important part of our team. In fact, in 2022, we took our Philippine friends on all expense paid trip for two to Boracay, as a way of saying thank you. In 2023, we took our Philippine friends on another all expense paid trip for two to Alona Beach in Bohol. During the first week of April 2024, we took everyone to El Nido Palawan. March 2025, we went to Boracay again. These trips are at no cost to our Filipino friends including food, travel, and lodging, and we stay at high end 5-star resorts such as Hennan resorts.



-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



We will respond within Online Jobs PH to those we wish to interview and set up a meeting via Zoom or MS Teams. Please check back in Online jobs to look for our response.



===================================================================

To apply

===================================================================



SERIOUS APPLICANTS ONLY WITH ORIGINAL WORK SUBMITTED AS SAMPLES



Click the apply button below and type in "Video Ninja" in the subject.



1. Please send us your most recent voice recording letting us know who you are, why you want this job, and why we should pick you.



2. Please include if you have both a computer and cell phone.



3. Please include your internet capabilities.



4. Please include YOUR ORIGINAL samples of your video editing that you have completed.

title: Home Health Medical Coder (Remote)
description:
We are seeking a detail-oriented Home Health Medical Coder to accurately review clinical documentation and assign ICD-10-CM codes for our home health patients. You will ensure all OASIS assessments and Plans of Care (Form 485) are compliant with CMS guidelines and optimized for PDGM reimbursement.

Key Responsibilities

Clinical Review: Analyze physician notes, nursing documentation, and therapy assessments to capture a complete clinical picture.

OASIS & 485 Review: Prospectively review OASIS assessments and Plans of Care for accuracy, completeness, and regulatory compliance.

ICD-10 Coding: Assign and sequence appropriate ICD-10-CM codes for primary and secondary diagnoses.

Physician Queries: Coordinate with clinical staff to clarify inconsistent or incomplete documentation to ensure coding integrity.

Quality Standards: Maintain a minimum 95?curacy rate in diagnostic coding and meet daily productivity targets.



ducation: Bachelor’s degree in Nursing (PHRN) or a Medical Allied course (PT, OT, MedTech) is highly preferred.

Certification: Active CPC (AAPC) or CCS (AHIMA) certification is required. Specialized certifications like HCS-D (Home Care Coding Specialist – Diagnosis) or COS-C (Certificate for OASIS Specialist-Clinical) are strong advantages.

Experience: Minimum of 1–2 years of specific experience in Home Health coding or OASIS review.

Technical Skills: Proficiency in EMR systems such as Homecare Homebase (HCHB), Kinnser, or Axxess.

Compliance: Deep understanding of HIPAA privacy standards and CMS home health regulations.

Compensation & Benefits (Market Standards)

Monthly Salary: ?60,000 – ?80,000+ (depending on experience and certifications)

title: Sales Rep - Appointment Setter
description:
Join Our Team: Health & Wellness Sales Partner



Sarah DeVido - Empowered Health is a growing online functional nutrition practice dedicated to helping professional moms over 40 reclaim their vitality, balance their hormones, and transform their health—without restrictive diets or excessive exercise.



Our Mission:

To empower professional moms to live their most vivacious lives through science-based nutrition and holistic wellness methods that prioritize sustainable, lasting health.



We have a reputation for going deeper than surface-level solutions. We address root causes. We listen. We guide. And we genuinely care about the women we serve.



As Part of the Empowered Health Team, You'll Have Access To...



- 100% remote work with flexible scheduling

- A supportive, growth-oriented team that values collaboration and personal development

- Competitive commission-based pay with opportunities to grow your earnings

- Meaningful work that changes lives—not just another sales job



The Position

We're looking for a heart-centered, relationship-focused sales partner who understands that real transformation starts with genuine connection.

Someone who's empathetic, curious, and passionate about helping women break free from the exhausting cycle of diets that don't work and symptoms that keep getting ignored.

You're not just booking calls—you're creating bridges of hope for women who feel stuck, dismissed, and overwhelmed.



Requirements

- Ability to work within a collaborative team environment

- Willingness to problem-solve with resourcefulness and creativity

- Availability to attend weekly tea
etings

- Strong communication skills and genuine empathy for women's health struggles

- Self-motivated with a growth mindset



Responsibilities

Connect & Nurture

Reach out to potential clients through DMs,
s, and warm conversations. Build trust and rapport.



Book Discovery Calls

Guide qualified, ready-to-transform women to schedule discovery calls with our coaching team.



Follow Up with Care

Stay in touch with prospects who aren't quite ready yet. Timing matters, and sometimes the right message at the right 
nt changes everything.



Qualify Leads

Ask thoughtful questions to understand where someone is on their health journey and whether we're the right fit.



Stay Connected

Attend weekly tea
etings to stay aligned, share wins, troubleshoot challenges, and grow together.



Meet Standards

Consistently uphold our company culture, performance KPIs, and the high standard of care we're known for.



Core Values

+ Passionate Pursuit of Knowledge & Solutions +

We're lifelong learners who stay curious, ask better questions, and are always looking for ways to serve our clients more effectively.



+ Empathetic Coaching & Integrity +

We lead with compassion. We listen deeply. We honor each woman's unique journey and meet her where she is—without judgment.



+ Vivacious Health & Wellness +

We believe that true wellness isn't about perfection—it's about balance, empowerment, and helping women feel like themselves again.



How to Apply

Step 1: Send us a message with the subject line: "I'm Ready to Empower Women"

Step 2: In your message, include:



Why this mission resonates with you (3-5 sentences)



Relevant experience (sales, wellness, coaching, health, etc. Experience with Go High Level is a bonus.)



What makes you great at building relationships and connecting with people



Your availability and time zone



Step 3: Standby for an update if you've been selected for an initial interview with someone on our team.



Interviews will begin as soon as possible!



Let's help more women live their most vivacious lives—together.
