title: SOA Production & Client Services Officer
description:
SOA Production & Client Services Officer 



Location: Remote (Philippines) 

Hours: Full-time, 6:00am – 3:00pm Manila Time (aligned with Australian business hours) 

Availability: Must be online and available on Microsoft Teams during work hours 



About Us 



We are an Australian financial advice business specialising in retirement and aged care financial planning. Our work is structured, process-driven, and detail-focused. 



We are seeking a highly organised, detail-oriented tea
mber to support the preparation and quality control of financial advice documents and client records. 



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys working with numbers, following clear processes, and ensuring everything is accurate and complete. 



The Role 



You will be responsible for assembling, checking, and organising financial planning documents using our structured templates and step-by-step processes. 



You will not be giving financial advice. 



You will be executing and quality-checking within a defined system. 



Key Responsibilities 



• Input financial data accurately into templates and internal systems 

• Assist in preparing Statements of Advice and aged care strategy documents 

• Follow structured checklists to ensure accuracy and completeness 

• Review documents carefully to identify inconsistencies or missing information 

• Maintain clean and organised digital client files 

• Draft clear internal notes and summaries 

• Support Centrelink and aged care documentation preparation 

• Ensure version control and proper file naming conventions 

• Raise questions early when information is unclear or incomplete 



What We Are Looking For 



This is a high attention-to-detail role. Accuracy matters. 



You must: 



• Be extremely detail-oriented and methodical 

• Be comfortable working with numbers and financial information 

• Follow processes precisely without shortcuts 

• Have strong written English skills 

• Be organised and structured in your work 

• Be comfortable working independently while remaining responsive on Teams

title: YouTube Assistant
description:
Position: YouTube Assistant



Pay: Varies Based On Skillset | Base Pay $500 + Bonus Pay $300 upto $500 

Hours: Must be available 7am - 11am cst | Rest of tasks can be completed outside of work hours as needed. 



Company: 850 Club Credit

Type: Remote | Contract | Part-Time or Full-Time (based on experience)



How to Apply (Follow All Instructions)



Include the words “IM YOUR YOUTUBE OPS” in your subject line or message



Submit your resume and examples of YouTube work you’ve supported



Send a 1–2 minute Loom video explaining:



Your experience with YouTube operations



The type of channels you’ve worked on



How you keep content pipelines organized



Applications that do not follow instructions will not be reviewed.



About 850 Club Credit



850 Club Credit is a personal finance media company helping everyday people increase their credit scores, qualify for homeownership, secure better auto loans, access higher credit limits, and build real financial leverage.



Through high-retention YouTube content, digital products, and our private community, we simplify complex credit strategies into clear, actionable steps that work in the real world. With multiple YouTube channels and a growing media ecosystem, we are building a repeatable content machine — not a one-person show.



About the Role (Read Carefully)



This is a YouTube Operations role, not a beginner VA position.



We are looking for a detail-oriented, execution-focused YouTube operator who understands how to keep a multi-channel YouTube content pipeline moving smoothly — from idea to upload to optimization.



Your job is to own the backend of YouTube execution so the CEO and creators can focus on recording content, approvals, and strategy.



If you need constant direction, guess often, or are still learning YouTube basics, this role will not be a fit.



What Success Looks Like in This Role



The content calendar is always accurate and up to date



Editors have everything they need without chasing



Videos are uploaded, optimized, and scheduled correctly



Systems are followed consistently



Problems are escalated early — not after mistakes happen



Core Responsibilities

1. Content Development & Preparation



Research top-performing videos and trends in the credit, finance, and lending space



Generate weekly video topic ideas aligned with channel strategy



Create scripts using structured prompts and internal AI workflows



Build titles, descriptions, tags, playlists, pinned comments, and CTAs



Upload scripts and planning documents into Google Docs using required formats



2. Video Pipeline & Calendar Management



Maintain and update the YouTube content calendar across multiple channels



Track video status (planned, in edit, scheduled, published)



Prepare video folders and assets for editors



Communicate clear, step-by-step editing instructions



Ensure chapters are added to all long-form videos



Coordinate cut-downs and compilation videos when assigned



3. Uploading & Optimization



Upload videos to YouTube for internal review and scheduling



Add thumbnails, cards, end screens, playlists, and product links



Confirm affiliate links and disclosures are accurate



Ensure uploads follow platform best practices and internal standards



4. Digital Asset & Funnel Support



Assist with creation and organization of simple digital assets (PDFs, guides, checklists)



Support list-building funnels connected to YouTube content



Keep all content and product assets organized inside Google Drive



5. Analytics & Reporting



Track weekly performance metrics, retention, and topic performance



Identify patterns that inform future content decisions



Submit concise weekly summaries focused on insights, not vanity metrics



Required Skills & Experience (Non-Negotiable)



Strong written English



Hands-on experience with YouTube Studio



Experience managing or supporting multiple YouTube channels



Understanding of content calendars and production pipelines



Comfortable working with AI tools and structured prompts



Strong organizational and documentation skills



Google Drive proficiency



Ability to follow systems exactly and communicate clearly with editors



Work Expectations



Availability Monday–Friday during CST hours (exact schedule determined during hiring)



Comfortable working inside structured systems (Trello, Google Drive, Operating Hub)



Proactive communication — issues are escalated within 24 hours



Execution-focused mindset (results > effort)



Important Notes



This role is performance-based and evaluated on accuracy, timeliness, ownership, and communication



KPIs are used to measure success and are reviewed monthly



KPIs and responsibilities may evolve as the business grows



This is not a “learn YouTube from scratch” position



How to Apply (Follow All Instructions)



Include the words “IM YOUR YOUTUBE OPS” in your subject line or message



Submit your resume and examples of YouTube work you’ve supported



Send a 1–2 minute Loom video explaining:



Your experience with YouTube operations



The type of channels you’ve worked on



How you keep content pipelines organized



Applications that do not follow instructions will not be reviewed.

title: Social Media Manager
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE



I’m a Functional Nutritionist and former NIH Epigenetics Researcher helping women 40+ navigate perimenopause using lab-driven precision inside my Metabolic Breakthrough Method.



I’m looking for a long-term Social Media Manager who can take content strategy and turn it into consistent, high-quality Instagram execution.



You will not be coming up with strategy alone — we will collaborate on ideas. Your role is to bring those ideas to life, execute them, and actively engage with our audience.



This is not just a posting job.



This is a community-building and lead-generation role.



RESPONSIBILITIES



• Create and schedule Instagram posts (Reels and Carousels + captions) based on provided content ideas

• Cross post these on other platforms (i.e. YouTube and LinkedIn)

• Design simple, clean graphics when needed (Canva proficiency required)

• Post consistently to Instagram feed and Stories

• Repurpose long-form ideas into short-form content

• Write captions aligned with brand voice (warm authority + clinical precision)

• Engage with followers in comments and DMs daily

• Initiate meaningful engagement with ideal audience accounts

• Monitor analytics and suggest growth improvements

• Assist with follower growth strategy



ENGAGEMENT REQUIREMENTS



You must be available to actively engage:



• 8:00–10:00am EST

• 8:00–10:00pm EST



Engagement includes:

• Responding to comments

• Responding to DMs

• Starting conversations

• Nurturing leads toward next steps



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE



• Experience managing an Instagram account in functional medicine, nutrition, women’s health, or wellness

• Understanding of hormones, gut health, cortisol, perimenopause (basic literacy required)

• Experience growing an engaged audience (not just posting)

• Strong English writing skills (natural, conversational tone)

• Comfortable engaging in DM conversations professionally



IDEAL CANDIDATE



You are:



• Proactive and strategic

• Detail-oriented

• Not afraid of data and science

• Comfortable with premium positioning

• Familiar with high-ticket client journeys

• Long-term minded



Bonus if you have:

• Worked with functional testing brands

• Helped grow an account past 10k followers

• Experience with Instagram growth strategy



HOURS & COMPENSATION



Part-time to start (with potential to grow).



Please include:



Examples of functional medicine or wellness accounts you’ve managed



Results you helped achieve (growth, engagement, leads)



Your availability during EST hours



The word “PRECISION” at the top of your application so I know you read this fully



IMPORTANT



This role is for someone who wants to grow with a brand long-term.



We are building something bigger than content — we are building a clinical framework and movement.



If that excites you, apply.





???? SOCIAL MEDIA MANAGER APPLICATION



Please copy and paste the questions below into your response and answer thoroughly.



Full Name:



 Address:



Instagram handle (personal account):



Instagram accounts you have managed (please list links):

(Functional medicine, hormones, gut health, fitness, etc.)

(Follower growth, engagement increase, leads generated, etc.)



Have you managed Instagram DMs and comment engagement before?

If yes, describe your approach.



How would you engage with a woman who comments:

“I’ve tried everything and nothing works.”



How comfortable are you discussing topics like cortisol, perimenopause, gut health, and functional testing?



Are you available to actively engage 8:00–10:00am EST and 8:00–10:00pm EST daily?



What tools are you proficient in?

(Canva, CapCut, Meta Business Suite, Google Docs, Notion, etc.)



Describe your strategy for growing an Instagram account organically.



Why are you interested in working with a functional nutrition brand focused on women 40+?



What makes you different from other social media managers?



Please include the word “PRECISION” at the top of your application so we know you read this fully.

title: GoHighLevel + Zapier Automation Builder — Sales Funnel + Client Onboarding + Fulfillment Tracking (Deadline: March 25)
description:
We’re a Canadian wedding photo/video studio with profitable lead generation (Meta/IG) and strong close rates, but we need the backend system upgraded: clean lead routing, fast follow-ups, consult booking automation, proposal/deposit tracking, onboarding, and fulfillment tracking.



The owner is traveling starting March 23, so we need a builder who can implement and test a reliable v1 so sales keep closing and clients keep moving while we’re on the road.



Goal / Definition of Done (by March 23)

By March 23, we have a “travel-proof” system where:



Leads are captured, tagged, and routed correctly (premium vs team vs not a fit)



A 60-day SMS/email nurture runs with clean logic and stop conditions



Consult scheduling flow runs end-to-end (confirmations, reminders, pre-call intake)



Proposal/estimate stage is tracked with reminders + “pending signature/deposit” visibility



Won clients are onboarded automatically (welcome + forms + timeline/vendor info intake)



Fulfillment is tracked end-to-end (Upcoming ? Shot ? Editing ? Review ? Delivered ? Archived)



Dashboards show what’s due, what’s late, and what needs owner attention



Scope: What You’ll Build



1) Lead Intake + Routing



Standardize lead capture fields (date, location, budget range, vibe/priorities)



Auto-create opportunity + apply tags + set pipeline stage



Routing logic:



Premium (owner-led) vs Team coverage vs Not Fit



Lost lead tagging + loss reason tracking (for reporting/optimization)



2) 60-Day Sales Nurture Engine (SMS +
)



Build a 60-day experience:



day-0 speed-to-lead response



day 1/2/4/7/14/21 follow-up cadence



longer nurture for the remaining window



Separate sequences for:



Leads who booked a consult



Leads who didn’t book



Leads who received a proposal



Cold leads (light touch)



Clean stop conditions to prevent spam/overlap



3) Consult Scheduling + Pre-Call Prep



Confirmation + reminders (24h / 3h / 15 min)



Pre-call intake workflow (collect venue, priorities, timeline basics)



Generate a simple “Call Brief” note format for the owner



4) Proposals / Estimates / Deposit Tracking



Pipeline stages + automations for:



Proposal sent



Pending signature



Pending deposit



Won



Reminder logic for overdue signature/deposit



“Pending Signature / Pending Deposit” scoreboard view



5) Client Onboarding



Automated welcome + expectations + “what happens next”



Intake forms: timeline, vendor list, addresses, music preferences (if video)



Final call scheduling logic + reminders



6) Fulfillment Tracking (Operations)



Fulfillment pipeline:



Won ? Upcoming ? Shot ? Editing ? Review ? Delivered ? Archived



Simple task templates and internal alerts when items are overdue



Optional: Slack/email notifications when “Late” status is triggered



7) Documentation + Handoff



Simple SOP + Loom walkthroughs:



how the system works



tags/stages meaning



how to troubleshoot common issues



Tools (Required)



GoHighLevel (pipelines, workflows, conversations, calendars)



Zapier (filters/paths/data formatting; webhooks if needed)



Slack (or similar) for notifications



Nice-to-Haves



Appointment-setting funnel experience



Experience building “setter + closer” workflows



Experience with service businesses (agencies, studios, local services)



Timeline



Start ASAP



Stable v1 must be ready before March 23



To Apply (Answer These)



Share 1–2 examples of GoHighLevel workflows you built (screenshots or brief summary).



What are 3 common causes of broken automations in GHL and how do you prevent them?



Describe your approach to routing logic (premium vs team vs not fit).



Can you deliver a tested v1 before March 23? Yes/No.

title: Patient Care Coordinator
description:
We are looking for a highly motivated and experienced Remote Patient Services Representative based in the Philippines. The ideal candidate will manage inbound and outbound calls, assist patients with scheduling appointments, address inquiries, and perform other related tasks to ensure a seamless patient experience.



Key Responsibilities:

• Answer incoming calls promptly and professionally.

• Schedule, reschedule, and confirm patient appointments using our electronic health record (EHR) system.

• Provide accurate information regarding services, insurance, and payment options.

• Address patient inquiries and concerns with empathy and efficiency.

• Maintain and update patient records with a high degree of accuracy.

• Collaborate with the optometry team to ensure optimal patient care.



Performance Metrics:

To ensure excellence in patient service, the following performance metrics will be used to evaluate success in this role:

• Average Handle Time (AHT): The average duration of a patient interaction, including talk time, hold time, and after-call work. Efficiently managing AHT ensures timely assistance to patients while maintaining service quality. ?

• Quality Score: Assessment of call quality based on adherence to protocols, accuracy of information provided, and overall patient interaction effectiveness. High-quality scores reflect a commitment to excellence in patient care.

• Patient Satisfaction Score: A measure of patient contentment with the service provided, often gathered through post-interaction surveys. High scores indicate successful patient engagement and issue resolution.

• Service Level: The percentage of calls answered within a specified timeframe, reflecting the ability to meet patient demand promptly. Maintaining a high service level ensures patient satisfaction and loyalty. ?

• Appointment Scheduling Rate: The efficiency and accuracy in scheduling patient appointments, ensuring optimal utilization of clinic time and resources.



Qualifications:

• Proven experience in a customer service role, preferably in a medical or optometry setting.

• Exceptional verbal and written English communication skills.

• Familiarity with EHR systems and medical scheduling software is a plus.

• Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.

• Ability to work independently and manage time effectively.

• Stable internet connection and a quiet workspace conducive to professional phone conversations.



Work Schedule:

• Full-time position.

• Must be available to work U.S. business hours, including potential evening shifts to accommodate different time zones.



To Qualify, please complete the Assessment below:



1. Application form: wkf.ms/45nfpCJ

2. Complete this assessment: 
/link/index/JB-BYUGHNDRC?u=

title: Real Estate Sales & Leasing Representative
description:
Focus: US-Based Manufactured Home Communities



About Us Open Management is a high-growth property management firm specializing in manufactured home communities across the United States. We operate with a culture of Extreme Ownership and Relentless Improvement. We don't just "answer phones"—we help families find homes and drive the growth of our communities.



The Role We are looking for a high-energy, persuasive Sales Representative who thrives on the phones. You will manage the entire "Lease-to-Keys" journey: responding to inbound leads via phone/text/email, building rapport, overcoming objections, and guiding residents through the application process.



This is a fast-paced role that requires someone who is tech-savvy, highly organized, and motivated by hitting (and exceeding) leasing goals.



Key Responsibilities

Lead Conversion: Turn inbound inquiries into scheduled property showings through aggressive but professional follow-up.



CRM Mastery: Maintain 100?curate records of every interaction in our CRM. If it’s not in the CRM, it didn’t happen.



Consultative Selling: Educate prospective residents on the benefits of our communities and guide them through the approval and move-in process.



Pipeline Management: Proactively follow up with "cold" leads to bring them back into the sales funnel.



Required Skills

Exceptional English: Neutral accent with the ability to build immediate rapport with US-based callers.



Sales Instinct: 2+ years of experience in Outbound/Inbound Phone Sales (Real Estate or Property Management experience is a massive plus).



Tech Literacy: Experience with CRM systems (e.g., Salesforce, HubSpot, AppFolio) and VOIP systems.



The "Ownership" Mindset: You don't wait for leads to call you; you chase the win.



To prove your attention to detail, please include the word 'HOMES' at the very beginning of your application subject line.

title: Social Media Content Creator
description:
We run multiple high-engagement

We’re looking for a creative and reliable content creator to help us scale content production across our growing portfolio of pages. You’ll be responsible for creating scroll-stopping posts, writing compelling captions, generating AI image prompts, and adapting content across multiple languages and markets.

What You’ll Be Doing

• Creating viral-format

• Writing engaging captions using proven viral formulas: “Did You Know” facts, first-person animal narratives (“I’m a hedgehog and...”), myth-busting hooks, guilt-driven conservation angles, and emotional storytelling

• Generating detailed AI image prompts for tools like Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion — cinematic 8K nature scenes, Pixar-style animal close-ups with speech bubbles, and educational overlays

• Adapting and localizing content across US/English, German, Brazilian Portuguese, and French markets — adjusting species, cultural references, seasonal timing, and emotional hooks for each audience

• Researching trending topics, seasonal wildlife events, and backyard animal behavior to create timely, shareable content (e.g., hedgehog migration in spring, firefly decline in summer, scorpion season in Brazil)

• Scheduling and publishing posts across multiple
 pages using scheduling tools

• Tracking post performance and identifying what formats, hooks, and topics drive the highest engagement (likes, shares, saves, comments)

• Helping brainstorm new content concepts, series ideas, and viral angles based on competitor analysis and audience behavior

Must-Have

• Strong English writing skills with an engaging, conversational tone

• Experience creating social media content 
, Instagram, or TikTok)

• Familiarity with AI image generation tools (Midjourney, DALL-E, Leonardo AI, Stable Diffusion, or similar)

• Ability to write compelling hooks and captions that drive engagement (shares, saves, comments)

• Basic understanding of what makes content go viral on
 (emotional triggers, curiosity gaps, relatable formats)

• Reliable internet connection, own laptop/computer, and ability to work independently with minimal supervision

• Willingness to learn and adapt quickly — we move fast and test new ideas constantly

• Experience with Canva, CapCut, or similar tools for creating reels and visual content

• Experience managing or growing
 pages

title: Financial Controller / Accounting Operations Lead
description:
Financial Controller / Accounting Operations Lead

Full-Time | 40 Hours/Week | $2,000–$2,500 per month | Long-Term

This is not a data-entry bookkeeping job.

This is a financial ownership role.

I am the owner of a growing US-based service company.

I am looking for one person who will take complete ownership of our accounting operations so I never have to think about them again.

If you want a role where someone tells you what to do every day, this is not for you.

If you are obsessive about clean numbers, protecting cash flow, and enforcing financial discipline — keep reading.

________________________________________

What You Will Own Completely

• Accounts Receivable discipline (structured follow-up, aging review, escalation)

• Accounts Payable controls (duplicate payment checks, contract validation, overcharge prevention)

• US payroll processing (employees + contractors)

• Weekly cash flow reporting (clear, simple, decision-ready)

• Job-level expense tracking & budget monitoring

• Monthly close & owner-ready financial statements

• Process improvements to prevent financial leakage

Your job is simple:

Protect the company’s money like it is your own.

________________________________________

The Right Person

You:

• Notice financial errors before anyone else

• Double-check numbers automatically

• Do not ignore overdue invoices

• Escalate when needed

• Build systems instead of waiting for instructions

• Want a stable long-term role (5+ years)

• Take pride in financial precision

________________________________________

Required Experience

• 8+ years accounting/bookkeeping experience

• 3+ years supporting US-based clients

• Strong QuickBooks Online experience

• Experience running US payroll

• Strong Excel skills

• Excellent written and spoken English

• Stable work history (low job hopping)

________________________________________

Personality Matters

You should naturally be:

• Detail-oriented

• Structured

• Calm and consistent

• Process-driven

• Protective of company cash

If you dislike repetitive financial discipline work, this role is not for you.

________________________________________

Compensation

Full-time (40 hours/week)

$2,000–$2,200 per month depending on experience

This is a long-term position.

We are not looking for freelancers or short-term contractors.

________________________________________

To Apply

Subject line: CASHFLOW

Include:

1. A 2–3 minute Loom video introducing yourself

2. A brief explanation of how you handle 60+ day overdue invoices

3. A specific example where you caught a duplicate payment or vendor overcharge

4. Your expected monthly salary

Applications without these instructions will not be reviewed.

title: Senior Financial Operator/ Controller-Level Bookkeeper
description:
Position Summary

We are seeking a highly capable and strategic financial operator to serve as a senior-level bookkeeper/controller for our fast-paced, multi-entity real estate enterprise. This role supports our real estate brokerage team, investment and development projects, and the personal financial operations of the CEO. The ideal candidate combines technical accounting expertise with strategic insight and the ability to manage complex, multi-entity structures in a lean, high-performance environment.



Key Responsibilities

- Maintain full-cycle bookkeeping for brokerage, investment entities, and project-specific LLCs.

- Oversee job cost accounting, project-level reporting, and GAAP-compliant multi-entity financials.

- Lead monthly closes, consolidate reports, and provide variance analysis.

- Perform weekly/monthly reconciliations of all accounts and ensure books are audit-ready.

- Maintain documentation and prepare reports for CPA coordination and tax filings.

- Ensure accurate 1099 issuance and vendor W-9 compliance.

- Build rolling cash flow forecasts and participate in capital allocation decisions.

- Manage the CEO’s personal finances, including financial tracking, reporting, and investment oversight.

- Support quarterly strategy sessions with data and insight, not just numbers.



Qualifications

- Bachelor's degree in Accounting or Finance; CPA or CMA preferred.

- 5+ years experience in bookkeeping or financial management, ideally in real estate.

- Strong command of US GAAP, project accounting, and inter-entity financial structures.

- Proficiency in QuickBooks, project tracking systems, and financial dashboards.

- Strong analytical thinking, attention to detail, and communication skills.

- Experience managing personal financials for executives a strong plus.



Ideal Candidate Traits

- Strategic thinker who loves both numbers and their meaning.

- Exceptionally organized and accountable.

- Proactive problem-solver who can navigate lean operations.

- Deeply reliable and detail-oriented with a high sense of ownership.

- Comfortable with both the tactical and strategic aspects of finance.



Compensation & Benefits

- Competitive salary based on experience and qualifications.

- Flexible work environment and working remotely.

- Performance-based incentives and potential for expanded leadership role.



In your cover letter, begin with the word "focused" and include a 1 minute introduction video link telling more about yourself and share your qualifications/experiences that makes you a great fit for this role. If you fail to follow this instruction, you'll not be considered for this role.

title: Senior QuickBooks Online Specialist & Financial Systems Architect (Healthcare)
description:
We are seeking a highly experienced QuickBooks Online Specialist with financial analysis capability to fully reconstruct and architect our QBO system for CFO-level reporting.



Our 2025 books are incomplete and 2026 data has not yet been entered. We operate two divisions within one company (SV and Moab) and require clean reconstruction, structural separation, inventory tracking, and executive-level reporting.



This is not a basic bookkeeping role. We are seeking a strategic financial partner.

________________________________________

Project Scope



Phase 1 – Audit

• Review all 2025 data

• Review bank, credit card, payroll, and merchant records

• Provide written reconstruction plan with timeline



Phase 2 – Reconstruction

• Complete and reconcile all 2025 financial data

• Enter and reconcile 2026 to current

• Rebuild Chart of Accounts

• Implement Location tracking (SV / Moab)

• Implement Class tracking (service lines)

• Set up inventory tracking (quantity + COGS)



Phase 3 – CFO-Level Reporting

• Build service-line contribution margin analysis

• Build break-even per service framework

• Create cash runway model

• Create monthly executive dashboard (Excel or Google Sheets)

• Document financial SOP

________________________________________

Required Experience



• 5+ years QuickBooks Online (Advanced preferred)

• Proven experience cleaning and reconstructing broken QBO accounts

• Strong understanding of accrual accounting

• Experience with inventory and COGS tracking

• Experience building executive financial dashboards

• Strong written English communication skills

________________________________________

To Apply



Please answer the following:

1. Explain contribution margin in your own words.

2. Explain how to calculate break-even for a service-based healthcare business.

3. Describe the most complex QBO clean-up project you completed.

4. How would you allocate overhead across service lines?

5. Provide your hourly rate and estimated hours for a 12-month reconstruction project.

for a Cruise Travel Industry

title: Local SEO / GEO Growth Specialist - Australia Cosmetic Surgery Platform
description:
Before Applying- you must have stable internet connection to be available during working hours.



About Us:

We're one of the largest cosmetic surgery platforms in Australia, operating across multiple locations. As we continue to scale, we're creating a new dedicated Local SEO / GEO Growth Specialist role to accelerate our organic presence. Potential for a full time role.



What You'll Do:

- Execute comprehensive local SEO / GEO strategy for competitive cosmetic surgery keywords and queries across Australian cities we operate in

- Manage and optimize Google Business Profile

- Build and maintain local citations across Australian medical directories, forums, reddit, etc.

- Create and optimize content for procedure pages, location pages, and blog content

- Conduct keyword research specific to business

- Technical SEO audits and fixes (working with our team)

- Build high-quality backlinks from relevant Australian health and medical sources

- Monitor and report on rankings, traffic, and conversion metrics

- Stay current on Google algorithm updates and AI/LLM search trends



Requirements:

- 3+ years proven SEO experience with local SEO focus and GEO understanding

- Experience in healthcare/medical SEO highly preferred (understanding of medical advertising regulations/AHPRA guidelines a plus)

- Strong understanding of Australian search market and geography

- Must have experience working with LLMs coding agents (Claude Code Opus 4.6 is our preferred) and leverage with all your work.

- Knowledge of how AI/LLM systems are changing search and discovery

- Demonstrated results improving local rankings and organic traffic

- Experience with Google Business Profile optimization and local citation building

- Technical SEO knowledge (site speed, mobile optimization, schema markup)

- Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal)

- Experience with Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and SEO tools (Ahrefs, SEMrush, Search Atlas or similar)



Big Plus If You Have:

- Understanding of medical practice marketing and patient journey

- Content creation skills for medical/educational content



What We Offer:

- Competitive compensation with incentive structure

- Flexible work hours

- Potential for long-term position with growth opportunity to support entire team

- Support from external SEO / GEO strategist for complex challenges

- Tech focused company

- Exciting industry and remote first team



To Apply:

You must reply with:

1. Salary expectations

2. Link to your portfolio or specific examples of local SEO / GEO results you've achieved

3. Explanation of how you would approach ranking for local search term "breast augmentation Melbourne" (<400 words)

4. Experience with Claude Code and how you've applied coding agent to SEO



Start Date: Immediate

title: Technical Roof Order Entry
description:
The Company

Riverlea Group Ltd is a NZ family owned and operated manufacturer and distributor of high-quality brands. Operating successfully since 1992, we proudly manufacture a range of reputable products at our custom-built site in Hamilton, NZ.

  

Armorsteel our industry leading cladding and flashings division forms the core of our business, these are supported by a range of Duratuf sheds, lifestyle products and wheelbarrows. Providing our customers with exceptional quality products and service is what drives us and forms part of our core values.



With a down-to-earth team, great culture, and a passion for what we do. We work hard, have fun, and genuinely care about each other and our customers. Our brand is growing fast, and we’re looking for the right creative spark to help share our journey in bold, exciting ways.



Position Summary:

In our Armorsteel division we want to ensure we are delivering an unparalleled customer experience by exceeding our customers’ expectations, becoming a trusted advisor, ensuring the accurate input of data, ongoing professional interactions with customers and seamless coordination of logistics functions. We help business owners/project managers manage their projects better with fast and personal service. We live up to our promise we make to our customers as per the below:

We don’t like missing calls, but if we ever do, we will ensure we call you back within the hour

We promise accurate invoicing – no surprises

Fast flashings! 24hr express pick up option

Order in full, within spec or we make it right quick



Being one of our friendly Armorsteel Tea
mbers means, you will think and feel like our customers and remain relentlessly focussed on providing a positive experience. You will work as part of a team where we are all positive and passionate people who are committed to making it happen and continuously striving for excellence every single day in every single way. We work hard but we also like to have a lot of fun along the way and celebrate our success.



Key Responsibilities – what you’ll be doing day to day

Entering technical order specifications of flashings for operations to manufacture.

Completing double checks of orders before submitting to the factory.

Liaising with the internal team.



To successfully perform in this role, you will must have the following attributes:

Experience in New Zealand or Australian roofing and building code.

Experience with SWI, Applicad or similar would be 

Has been exposed to take offs an advantage but not essential. 

High attention to detail.

Process driven and looks for the gaps to add value 

Keeps up with building and roofing compliance in NZ

Self-motivated and has excellent time management skills.

A fast learner and comfortable with systems and processes

Have high quality interactions with our team.

Excellent organisational and coordination skills.

Strong work ethic and want to “get stuff done”.

Willingness to continuously improve and challenge the status quo.



If you feel that you have the relevant aptitude and attitude to excel in this role, we would like to hear from you. Please only apply if you are looking for a long term contract and willing to put in the work to be successful in this role. I am happy to answer any questions you have prior to your application to ensure you are applying for the right role. Thanks

title: Affiliate/Influencer Marketing Specialist
description:
Trimi Health is a fast-growing 100% online telehealth platform offering compounded semaglutide and tirzepatide for weight loss at the lowest flat prices in the U.S. ($99/mo sema, $125/mo tirz — any dose, unlimited 24/7 support). We’re on a mission to make real results accessible and are scaling aggressively to match or surpass leaders like Amble (
). Our secret weapon? A high-converting affiliate/ambassador program powered by micro-influencers who genuinely love sharing their transformation journeys.







The Role



We’re looking for a hungry, detail-oriented Affiliate Growth Intern to own the Modash-powered outreach engine that will bring in 50–150 new micro-influencers (10K–100K followers) in the first 90 days. You’ll directly contribute to patient growth by turning creators into paid partners who promote Trimi’s better-priced, higher-support GLP-1 programs.



This is not a coffee-run internship — you’ll get full access to Modash Performance, our affiliate dashboard, and real ownership of campaigns that move the needle.







Key Responsibilities (Modash-Focused)



Run daily targeted searches in Modash for micro-influencers (TikTok + Instagram) in weight-loss, GLP-1, tirzepatide/semaglutide, mom/wellness, and fitness niches (10K–100K followers, ?4% engagement).

Build and maintain a master outreach list (Google Sheets + Modash CRM), including poaching active Amble creators (#ambleptnr, #joinamble).

Execute personalized outreach sequences via Modash’s safe inbox + backup
 (Instantly.ai) — using our proven templates that highlight our $99/$125 flat pricing advantage and free starter kits.

Manage full campaign workflows: approve applications, send free product kits, track responses, and monitor first posts for FTC compliance (#ad #trimiambassador).

Update performance dashboard weekly (signups, engagement, ROI) and suggest optimizations.

Assist with inbound creator applications and comment-to-DM automations (ManyChat).

We will be offering $50 for each order places through the affiliates link we provide them.

What You’ll Learn & Gain



Hands-on expertise with Modash (one of the best influencer tools in 2026) — add it straight to your resume/LinkedIn.

Real influencer marketing + affiliate program management experience in a high-margin, high-growth health/tech niche.

End-to-end campaign ownership from discovery to first patient acquisition.

Strong reference letter + potential for full-time role or recurring stipend as we scale.

Weekly 1:1 mentorship with the founder on growth strategy.

Requirements



Currently pursuing or recently graduated with a degree in Marketing, Communications, Business, or related field (or strong self-taught equivalent).

Obsessed with social media (TikTok & Instagram especially) and genuinely interested in weight-loss / wellness content.

Experience (or fast learner) with influencer tools — Modash experience is a huge plus but we’ll train you.

Excellent written communication and attention to detail (you’ll be writing personalized DMs/emails daily).

Self-starter who can work 15–30 hours/week remotely with minimal supervision.

Must be comfortable with FTC disclosure rules for health-related promotions (we’ll provide full training).

Bonus Points



You already follow GLP-1 journey creators or have personal interest in the space.

Experience with Google Sheets, Canva, or any CRM/outreach tool.

Based in the US (for easier time-zone alignment).

Looking forward to working with one of you!

title: URGENT HIRING: Entry Level - Full Time Virtual Assistant (VA) - (Non-Voice, WFH) - No Experience Needed, Weekends Off!
description:
Public Records & Research Specialist | Non-Voice | WFH | USD-Paid | No Experience Required



Search Recorder is hiring, and we're not looking for the most impressive resume. We're looking for the right person.



If you're someone who works hard because you have people counting on you, who values stability over hype, and who takes pride in doing a job well even when no one's watching, we want to hear from you.



No experience needed. Fresh graduates and career shifters are welcome.



The Role



You'll research public records, review legal documents, and write accurate reports for US clients. Everything is done remotely. No calls, no commute, just focused and meaningful work from home.



What We're Looking For



-Strong work ethic and personal integrity

-Attention to detail and willingness to follow processes

-Good written English communication

-Comfortable with computers, MS Office, and online research

-Open to graveyard shifts and flexible schedules

-Looking for long-term, stable employment (not just a quick gig)



No prior experience in this field is required. We will train you. What we can't train is character, and that's what matters most to us.



Tech Requirements



-PC or laptop with webcam and headset

-Stable internet (minimum 30 Mbps) with a backup connection

-Printer access (for one part of the process)



Compensation and Benefits

-Fixed weekends off

-Paid training



Upon regularization:

-Incentives and allowances

-13th month pay

-Paid leaves and holiday pay

-Annual performance appraisal

-Equipment provision (performance-based)



We reward people who stay. The longer you're with us, the more we take care of you.



Hiring Process (1 to 2 months)

-Aptitude Test

-Mock Report Assessment

-Initial Interview

-Personality Assessment (written, printer required)

-Client Interview

-Job Offer and Contract Signing



About Search Recorder

This role is listed under "Search Recorder" to protect our US-based client. We know that takes a bit of trust, and we don't take that lightly. Full details are shared upon onboarding.



How to Apply

Send your resume and cover letter to

title: Executive Assistant
description:
How to Apply:

title: TikTok Ads Manager (Lead Generation – Service Business)
description:
About Us

We are a U.S.-based home inspection company generating leads through TikTok Ads. We are looking for a skilled TikTok Ads Manager who can take full ownership of our paid ad strategy, optimize performance, and consistently generate qualified leads.

We are not looking for someone to “boost posts.”

We need someone who understands performance marketing, lead generation, and conversion optimization.



Your Role

You will:

Build, launch, and manage TikTok ad campaigns

Optimize for cost per lead (CPL)

Improve CTR, CPM, and conversion rates

Create structured testing plans (creative, audiences, offers)

Monitor daily performance and adjust bidding

Report weekly on results with clear improvement plans

Advise on creative improvements

Set up tracking properly (pixel, events, lead tracking)

Build scalable systems so ads run consistently

You will own results.



Ideal Candidate

You have:

Proven experience running TikTok Ads for lead generation

Experience with service businesses (real estate, home services, local businesses preferred)

Strong understanding of:

Campaign structure

Ad group testing

Creative testing frameworks

Scaling strategies

Ability to read data and make decisions

Strong English communication skills

Reliable internet and availability for weekly check-ins



APPLICATION FILTER PROCESS (IMPORTANT)

To be considered, follow these exact steps:

Step 1:

In your subject line write:

“TikTok Growth – Alliance”

Step 2:

Answer these questions clearly:

How many TikTok ad accounts have you managed?

What was the lowest CPL you achieved for a service business?

What industries have you generated leads for?

What is your typical CTR target?

If an ad has 0.3% CTR, what do you do?

Describe your campaign structure for lead generation.

What is your scaling strategy once a campaign is profitable?

What tracking setup do you require before launching?

Step 3:

Provide:

Screenshots of results (blur sensitive data)

1 short Loom video (3–5 min) explaining:

How you would structure our TikTok account

How you would test creatives

How you would reduce wasted spend

Applications without the Loom video will not be considered.



At the end of your application, include the word:

“Inspector”

This confirms you read the entire job post.

title: Healthcare Revenue Management
description:
SERIOUS CANDIDATES ONLY - Medical Billing Experience ONLY 



**Position Overview:**

The ideal candidate will be highly skilled in USA healthcare billing and collections and have a thorough understanding of CPT and ICD-10 codes. The ability to work efficiently within a team, meet weekly deadlines, and provide phone support is essential. This is a remote position, and candidates must work during US Central Standard Time (CST) hours and have access to a Microsoft computer. This position is Part-Time to Full-Time.



**Key Responsibilities:**

- Verification of Benefits with Authorization Management

- Follow up on claim denials, rejections, and outstanding balances

- Meet weekly deadlines and provide consistent updates on account status

- Provide phone support for clients and resolve billing inquiries efficiently

- Attend weekly status meetings **mandatory**



**Skill Requirements:**

- 2+ years of healthcare billing experience (Physical therapy experience preferred)

- Strong knowledge of CPT/HCPCS and ICD-10 coding

- Attention to detail is a must

- Strong communication and customer service skills for phone support

- Must have a Microsoft computer and a reliable high-speed internet connection to the United States with VPN, a must

- An exceptional customer service attitude is a must

- Must be available to work during the US Central Standard Time (CST) hours

- Experience with either PromPT EMR/Billing or WebPT EMR is a BONUS.



**About Us:**

We are a rapidly growing company specializing in services for physical therapy practices across the USA. Our team is dedicated to providing top-tier support in billing, collections, and claims management, helping healthcare providers focus on patient care. We're looking for a qualified, experienced Healthcare Billing & Collections Specialist to join our dynamic team.



**How to Apply:**

In your response to our job posting, please include the answer to this question: "What are the 4 pillars of Success in a healthcare business?" Visit our website 
 to find the answers



Send a resume outline and highlight your medical billing experience and the software platform you used!

title: Sales Development Representative (SDR) – High-Volume Cold Calling (B2G)
description:
Remote / Work From Home | Company based in California

Full-Time | Remote | PST Hours



About Us

Bi-Rite Global is a certified small business and a trusted retailer that supplies a wide range of products to government agencies — including federal, state, and education sectors. Based in California, we are rapidly expanding and focused on delivering quality products, competitive pricing, and reliable service to our government partners.



Role Summary

We are looking for a Sales Development Representative (SDR) – High-Volume Cold Calling (B2G) that is responsible for initiating outbound calls to federal, state, and local government agencies to identify contracting opportunities, introduce company services, and qualify decision-makers involved in procurement. The role supports the business development pipeline by generating leads, setting capability briefings, and gathering intelligence on upcoming bids and purchasing needs.



Key Responsibilities

• Conduct high-volume outbound calls to government offices and departments

• Identify contracting officers, procurement specialists, and program managers

• Introduce company capabilities and differentiate services

• Qualify opportunities based on agency needs, budgets, and timelines

• Schedule capability briefings or discovery meetings for sales/business development teams

• Gather information on upcoming solicitations, RFPs, and purchasing cycles

• Maintain accurate CRM records and call notes

• Follow up via
 and phone to nurture relationships

• Track targets such as contacts reached, meetings set, and opportunities generated



Qualifications 

• Professional phone presence and clear communication skills

• Persistent and comfortable with high-volume outbound calling and rejection

• Strong research skills to identify government decision-makers

• Organized with accurate CRM documentation and time management

• Understanding of B2G (Business to Government) sales or ability to learn quickly

• Experience in lead generation, appointment setting, telemarketing, or inside sales

• Exposure to government procurement or public-sector contracting preferred

• Familiarity with RFP/RFQ processes, vendor registrations, and contract vehicles is an advantage

• Able to clearly present company capabilities and services



Work Environment

• 100% Remote (must have reliable work-from-home setup)

• Structured schedule aligned with business hours of government agencies

• Use of approved scripts and compliance-focused communication

• Calls primarily to public offices, vendors, or registered partners

• Performance tracked by call quality, accuracy, and documentation — not aggressive contracting

• Collaboration with compliance, procurement, and contracts teams

• Strict adherence to data privacy, confidentiality, and record-keeping standards

• Professional and formal communication style required

• Write "I want this job" on the
 subject line.



Technical Requirements

• Stable internet (minimum 50 Mbps download/upload on fiber connection)

• Backup internet (LTE mobile data or pocket Wi-Fi)

• Laptop or desktop with Intel i5 equivalent or higher, 8GB RAM

• Quality headset with noise-canceling microphone

• Functional webcam



What’s Next

1. Interested candidates should submit a face-to-camera, 2-minute introduction Loom video explaining why you’re the ideal fit for this role.

2. Attach your Loom URL, resume, and any relevant experience samples.

title: HIGH PAY GRC IT ANALYST & AI Real-Time Rendering Specialist
description:
he Opportunity

We are looking for a rare "Hybrid" talent—a tech wizard who is deeply knowledgeable in IT Governance, Risk, and Compliance (GRC) and simultaneously expert in Live AI Video Rendering.



This is a confidential, high-stakes project. You will initially act as a Technical Proxy in live, camera-on interviews for GRC Analyst roles. You will use real-time AI tools to mirror my identity and voice. If you can navigate a NIST framework while managing a GPU-heavy AI stream, this is the most lucrative opportunity currently available.



The Role

Technical Proxy: Represent the identity in live video interviews using real-time AI video-mirroring and voice conversion (RVC).



GRC Subject Matter Expert: Answer complex technical questions regarding ISO 27001, NIST, SOC2, HIPAA, and AI Risk Management.



AI Operator: Manage real-time AI tools (DeepFaceLive, Live-Cam, or similar) with near-zero latency and high-fidelity output.



Technical Requirements (Non-Negotiable)

GRC Expertise: Must demonstrate mastery of Risk Assessments, Gap Analysis, Vendor Risk Management, and Compliance Auditing.



AI Proficiency: Expert-level knowledge of real-time face-swapping and RVC (Voice Conversion) tools.



Hardware: Access to a PC with a high-end GPU (NVIDIA RTX 3080/4070 or higher) OR the proven ability to set up and stream via a Cloud GPU rental (RunPod, Vast.ai, etc.).



Compensation & Career Growth

Trial Phase: $10 USD per interview session (45–60 mins).



Success Bonus: $1,000 USD paid immediately ONLY upon the successful completion of the interview and my official hiring.



Full-Time Career: Once the roles are secured, this becomes a permanent, long-term partnership:



Monthly Salary: $650 USD (Approx. ?38,000 PHP).



Government Benefits: PhilHealth, SSS, and Pag-IBIG.



13th Month Pay: Guaranteed extra month of salary in December.



Future: Competitive raises and bonuses for ongoing AI/GRC work.



How to Apply

To be considered, you MUST provide the following:



Subject Line: Must include the word "GRC".



Resume: Attach your most updated CV.



Experience: A brief summary of your experience with GRC frameworks.



Hardware: Confirm your PC specs (GPU/CPU) or your experience using Cloud GPU rentals.



Voice Sample: Attach a short audio recording of you speaking in English (Professional/Corporate tone).



AI Demo (Optional): A 15-second clip of a real-time face-swap you have executed.

title: Solar Project Coordinator (Residential Rooftop Solar)
description:
Solar Project Coordinator (Residential Rooftop Solar)



Location: [Your Location or Remote]

Employment Type: Full-Time



About Us



We are a fast-growing residential rooftop solar company dedicated to delivering high-quality installations and an exceptional customer experience. With a strong reputation in the industry, we’re expanding our operations and looking for a skilled Solar Project Coordinator to manage the workflow from contract signing through installation.



Position Overview



The Solar Project Coordinator is responsible for owning the post-sale process for residential solar projects. This is not an entry-level customer service role—this position requires hands-on experience in solar operations, project progression, permitting, and interconnection. The ideal candidate has worked for a solar installer or EPC and is deeply familiar with the operational steps required to bring a project from signed contract to installation day.



You will work closely with site surveyors, design teams, utility/ AHJ permitting departments, and homeowners to keep projects moving efficiently and on schedule.



Key Responsibilities



Manage projects from agreement signing through installation scheduling.



Coordinate site surveys, engineering reviews, design revisions, and document collection.



Prepare, submit, and track permitting, utility interconnection applications, and HOA approvals.



Monitor project milestones and proactively resolve bottlenecks to maintain timelines.



Serve as the primary point of communication for customers—setting expectations, providing updates, and ensuring a smooth experience.



Work cross-functionally with sales, operations, design, and installation teams.



Maintain accurate project records in CRM and project management platforms.



Ensure all compliance requirements and technical documentation are completed correctly.



Identify opportunities to streamline processes and improve operational efficiency.



Required Experience



2+ years of experience in residential solar operations, project coordination, or solar EPC workflow.



Hands-on experience with solar permitting, utility interconnection, and AHJ requirements.



Familiarity with site surveys, plan sets, engineering, and typical residential solar installation steps.



Ability to read and interpret basic solar plan sets is a plus.



Strong communication and organization skills with experience managing multiple live projects.



Comfortable working directly with homeowners in a professional, informative, and confident manner.



Experience with solar CRMs/project software (e.g., Aurora, Solo, Salesforce, Enact, JobNimbus, etc.) preferred.



Who We’re Looking For



Someone who has been on the operations side of residential solar—not just customer support.



A proactive problem-solver who enjoys keeping complex processes on track.



A detail-oriented professional who understands solar timelines, AHJ/utility nuances, and the importance of accuracy.



A team player who thrives in a fast-paced, growing organization.

title: Solar Design and Solar Support Specialist
description:
Must have prior experience working for a residential solar company.  If not, we will not respond.

) Purpose & Role

• Serve as the “back-of-house” point of contact for customers after a solar deal is signed.

• To make all deals “Sunday direct”

• Coordinate milestones (site survey ? permitting & interconnection ? SOW ? install) and keep all parties informed.

• Maintain accurate statuses and surface blockers to the sales rep and leadership daily.

2) Communication Setup

• Channels: iMessage group text with customer, sales rep, and VA via 
 (Apple ID).

• Phone Line: Use a dedicated Massachusetts phone number on a company-issued iPhone (recommended).

o Device labeling: “SunDay Energy – VA Desk.”

o Enable iMessage + SMS, voi
 greeting, and call forwarding to backup.

3) Trigger: New Solar Deal Handoff

• Initiated by Sales Rep: Upon deal signature, the rep starts a group text with customer + VA.

• VA Intake Log: Immediately add/new row in the Deals Tracker with: Customer, Address, Utility, Sales Rep, Deal Close Date, Site Survey Date, Notes.

4) Initial Customer Touch (Welcome & Expectations)

• Timing: Within 1 business hour of group text.

• Actions:

o Introduce self as back-of-house contact.

o Confirm preferred contact channel (text/email/phone).

o Share next step: scheduling/confirming site survey window.

o Provide standard response hours (e.g., Mon–Fri 9–6 ET) and typical timeline overview.

5) Site Survey Coordination

• Schedule/Confirm:

o Confirm appointment date/time with the customer.

• Tracker Update: Set “Current Status = Site Survey Scheduled” + Date of Site Survey.

6) Post-Survey Verification with solar installation company

• Timing: Same day as survey completion (or by 10am next business day).

• Actions:

o Confirm in that solar site survey is completed and deal is fully packaged.

o If installer flags incomplete items (photos, measurements, documents, utility info):

? Update Tracker “Actions Needed.”

? Notify Sales Rep in a separate thread with the exact missing items and due-by time.

? Follow up daily until resolved; escalate if >48 hours.

7) Customer Update: Move to Interconnection

• When deal package is complete & submitted:

o Notify customer: “Your project has moved to interconnection application.”

o Clarify: Customer may receive an
 from their utility; no action is required unless we specify.

• Tracker Update: “Current Status = Interconnection Submitted” + Interconnection Submit Date.

8) Ongoing Status Management

• Cadence: Daily internal checks; customer updates at meaningful milestones or if delays arise.

• Milestones to monitor/log:

o Site Survey Scheduled ? Completed

o Design Complete / Engineering Review

o Interconnection Submitted ? Approved

o Permitting Submitted ? Approved

o Install Scheduled ? Completed

o Inspection Passed

o PTO (Permission to Operate) Submitted ? Approved

• Blockers: Document utility rejections, permit corrections, HOA needs, attic access issues, etc., and notify Sales Rep + Leadership per SLA.

9) Escalations & SLAs

• Sales Rep Response SLA: 24 hours on missing items; escalate to TM/Leadership at 24 hours.

• Customer Response SLA: Same-day acknowledgment to all inbound customer messages received before 4pm ET.

• Sunrite SLA: Confirm post-survey status within 1 business day; escalate if no system update in 48 hours.

10) Daily Leadership Report (Excel)

• Send Time: Every business day by 10AM ET to Leadership distribution list.

• Format: One Excel workbook (“Current Deals – SunDay Energy – {YYYY-MM-DD}.xlsx”).

• Sheet: “Pipeline – Active”

• Columns (suggested):

1. Customer Name

2. Service Address

3. Sales Rep

4. Utility

5. Product (PV/Battery/Roof Tie-in)

6. Current Status (picklist—see milestones)

7. Actions Needed (Yes/No)

8. Action Detail (what, who, by when)

9. Date Deal Closed

10. Site Survey Date (Sched)

11. Site Survey Date (Done)

12. Interconnection Submitted (Date)

13. Interconnection Approved (Date)

14. Permit Submitted (Date)

15. Permit Approved (Date)

16. Install Scheduled (Date)

17. Install Completed (Date)

18. Inspection Passed (Date)

19. PTO Submitted (Date)

20. PTO Approved (Date)

21. Notes / Risks

• Sheet 2: “Blockers & Escalations” (deal-by-deal list with owner and ETA).

• Sheet 3: “New Since Yesterday” (new deals + status).

11) Record-Keeping & Tools

• Tracker of Record: Excel in shared drive (or Smartsheet/Sheets if you prefer).

• System of Record: Sunrite for survey/design/interconnection timestamps.

• Messaging: iPhone (MA number) + iMessage group threads; archive transcripts weekly.

• Templates Folder: Customer update scripts, missing-items checklists, and survey prep message.

12) Quality Standards

• Use clear, friendly, time-stamped updates.

• Confirm every appointment in writing.

• Log every status change the same day it occurs.

• Proactively communicate delays with a revised ETA.

13) KPIs for the VA

• Response Time to New Handoffs: 

• Post-Survey Verification Turnaround: 

• Aging Items >48h Without Owner: 

• Daily Report On-Time Rate: 

• Customer Update Cadence: Update at each milestone; no gap >10 business days between customer touches.

title: Telemarketer (B2B Cold Calling) To Schedule Appointments
description:
* PLEASE READ THE ENTIRE DESCRIPTION BEFORE APPLYING *





IMPORTANT:



- We are ONLY looking for candidates with previous B2B cold calling experience.

- If you have only worked warm leads, inbound calls, or appointment setting from ads, do NOT apply.



COMPANY INFO:



- My name is Jordan. I am the founder of a fast-growing company that helps small businesses never miss a call using an A.I. Receptionist.

- This is a simple, high-demand service that business owners immediately understand. We are looking for 1–2 strong cold callers to help introduce it to small business owners across the U.S.

- We are not a large corporate call center.  We are a small team with an owner focussed on helping the team get real results.



WHAT YOU WILL DO:



- Source your own B2B leads

- Cold call small business owners

- Book them for a free consultation

- Ensure they show up to the call

- That's it!  You do not close deals. Our closing team handles everything, your only job is to get them to show-up.



MUST HAVE (DO NOT APPLY IF THIS DOES NOT DESCRIBE YOU):



- Proven B2B cold calling experience

- Strong English with no heavy accent

- Reliable internet and a quiet workspace

- Comfortable making high-volume outbound calls

- Put the phrase “Dial And Smile” in your subject line so we know you read this



COMPENSATION:



-$2/hour base 

-$25 per attended show-up

- $100 per closed deal

- Monthly performance bonuses



HOURS:



- Part-time (20 hours per week) with the option to transition to full time

- Schedule: 2:00 AM – 6:00 AM Philippine Time



HOW TO APPLY:



- Do not send a generic message.

- In your application, include 2 things: Your specific B2B cold calling experience AND why this role fits you

- Do not use chat GPT or similar responses, those will be rejected.  We read each application and looking for a genuine person to reach out.

title: HR & Recruiting Assistant
description:
Company: Open Management

About Open Management

Open Management is a premier property management company specializing in mobile home communities across the US. We pride ourselves on providing high-quality, affordable housing and exceptional service to our residents. We operate with a lean, high-performance team that values Extreme Ownership and Relentless Improvement. If you are a proactive problem-solver who thrives in a fast-paced environment and doesn't need to be told twice, you belong here.



Our Core Values

Trust & Integrity: We do what’s right, even when no one is looking.



Relentless Improvement: We are never satisfied with the status quo; we always find a better way.



Extreme Ownership: We own our tasks from start to finish. We don't make excuses; we find solutions.



Extreme Collaboration: We win as a team.



The Role: HR & Recruiting Engine

We are seeking a high-caliber HR & Recruiting Assistant to serve as a critical partner to our HR and Hiring Managers. This is not a "low-gear" administrative role. You will be the engine of our recruitment process for on-site maintenance and community management positions, while simultaneously handling payroll coordination and onboarding logistics.



The ideal candidate possesses high cognitive agility—you can process information rapidly, "read" people during a phone screen, and manage complex schedules without being micro-managed. We need a thinker, not just a doer.



Key Responsibilities

Recruitment Liaison: Partner with Hiring Managers to source, screen, and hire top-tier maintenance and on-site staff.



High-Volume Phone Screening: Conduct initial phone interviews. You aren't just reading a script—you are vetting for technical aptitude, reliability, and cultural fit.



ATS Mastery: Own the Applicant Tracking System (ATS). You will keep the pipeline organized, update candidate statuses in real-time, and ensure no high-quality lead "goes cold."



Onboarding & Offboarding: Manage end-to-end processes, ensuring seamless coordination across departments so new hires are ready on Day 1.



Payroll & Timekeeping: Support timekeeping administration and process payroll adjustments with 100?curacy.



Critical Problem Solving: Manage the logistics of interview scheduling. When a conflict arises, you solve it before it becomes a bottleneck.



Required Qualifications

Cognitive Agility: You are a quick learner with high "mental horsepower." You can process information rapidly and apply critical thinking to every task.



Technical Proficiency: Previous experience working within an ATS (e.g., JazzHR, Indeed, Greenhouse) and a high level of digital literacy.



Communication Mastery: Exceptional professional verbal and written communication skills.



Experience: 2+ years in an HR or Administrative role with direct experience in phone screening or recruiting support, preferably in property management or skilled trades.



Detail Obsession: A track record of managing data (like payroll or ATS records) where accuracy is paramount.



When you apply, please change the subject line of your message to 'I am the HR Engine for Open Management - [Your Name]'.

title: Behavioral Health Screening & Authorization
description:
seeking an experienced Registered Nurse (RN) to serve in a dual clinical and revenue-support role as a Behavioral Health Screening & Authorization Nurse.

This remote position will be responsible for reviewing and screening patient charts for admission appropriateness, supporting the admissions team with clinical evaluations, obtaining and managing insurance authorizations, and assisting the Revenue Cycle team with coding support using the TruBridge system.

The ideal candidate must be clinically strong, highly organized, and knowledgeable in behavioral health admissions, payer authorization processes, and basic medical coding principles.

________________________________________

Primary Responsibilities

1. Clinical Screening & Admissions Support

•	Review and analyze complete patient records including:

o	History & Physical (H&P)

o	Psychiatric evaluations

o	Past Medical History

o	Medication lists

o	Lab and diagnostic results

•	Assess su
 risk, hom
 risk, psychosis, withdrawal risk, and medical stability.

•	Determine clinical appropriateness for behavioral health admission.

•	Provide screening recommendations (Accept / Decline / Pending).

•	Communicate findings clearly to the admission team and physicians.

•	Ensure documentation meets regulatory standards (CMS, CIHQ, EMTALA).

________________________________________

2. Insurance Authorization & Utilization Review

•	Submit clinical documentation to insurance companies for prior authorization.

•	Provide medical necessity justification using payer guidelines.

•	Obtain initial and concurrent authorizations.

•	Track authorization dates and ensure weekly or concurrent review submissions.

•	Follow up proactively on pending or denied authorizations.

•	Maintain detailed documentation of payer communications.

•	Prevent authorization-related denials through timely submissions.

________________________________________

3. Coding & Revenue Cycle Support

•	Possess working knowledge of ICD-10-CM coding principles.

•	Review charts to ensure documentation supports coding accuracy.

•	Assist coding team using TruBridge program for charge capture and coding support.

•	Collaborate with Revenue Cycle team to:

o	Reduce denials

o	Identify documentation gaps

o	Support accurate reimbursement

•	Communicate with providers for clarification when needed.

________________________________________

Minimum Qualifications

•	Active, unrestricted Registered Nurse (RN) license.

•	Bachelor of Science in Nursing (BSN) required.

•	Minimum 3 years of clinical nursing experience.

•	Experience with insurance authorization and utilization review required.

•	Basic knowledge of medical coding (ICD-10-CM).

•	Experience with EMR systems and revenue cycle platforms.

•	Fluent in English (written and verbal).

•	Strong analytical and documentation skills.

•	Ability to work independently in a remote setting.

________________________________________

Preferred Qualifications

•	Experience in Behavioral Health Admissions.

•	Experience with InterQual or MCG criteria.

•	Experience using TruBridge software.

•	Coding certification (CPC or CCS) is a plus.

•	Knowledge of CIHQ standards.

•	Bilingual (Spanish) is a plus.

title: Virtual Assistant for AI Education Company
description:
*Wall Street Prompt • Remote • Full-Time*



---



## About Wall Street Prompt



Wall Street Prompt is the world's leading AI education platform for investors. We teach financial professionals—from individual investors to the world's largest asset managers and banks—how to use AI to get an edge in markets.



We're not a typical small business. We're building a category-defining company at the intersection of AI and finance—two of the most consequential forces shaping the next decade. Our clients include some of the biggest names in global finance. Our content reaches hundreds of thousands of professionals. And we're just getting started.



## About the Role



We're hiring a Virtual Assistant to support the founders and help keep the business running smoothly. You'll handle a wide range of tasks—from administrative work like booking travel and managing
s, to executing content SOPs for our social media presence.



This role reports directly to the two founders. You'll be the go-to person for ad hoc tasks and operational support, helping a lean team stay organized and efficient.



We're looking for someone smart, sharp, and adaptable. The nature of this role will evolve as our business needs change—you should thrive in that environment.



## What You'll Own



### Administrative Support



- Book flights, hotels, and travel logistics for the team

- Manage
 inboxes, drafting responses and flagging priorities

- Handle scheduling, calendar management, and meeting coordination

- Manage vendor communications and follow-ups

- Take on ad hoc administrative tasks as they arise



### Content & Social Media (SOP Execution)



- Execute content workflows following our documented SOPs

- Help manage LinkedIn and other social media channels

- Schedule posts, track engagement, and maintain content calendars

- Coordinate with tea
mbers on content production pipelines



### General Support



- Maintain organization in Notion (our system of record)

- Track and follow up on outstanding tasks and action items

- Provide daily async updates to founders on task status

- Anticipate needs and proactively surface issues before they become problems



## What We're Looking For



- Excellent written and verbal English (native or near-native level)

- Proactive mindset—you take initiative and don't wait to be told what to do

- Detail-oriented—you catch errors and follow through on every task

- Tech-savvy—you pick up new tools quickly and aren't intimidated by software

- Fast learner with a great attitude

- Comfortable with ambiguity and changing priorities

- Available during US timezone business hours



## Tools You'll Use



- Google Workspace (Gmail, Calendar, Docs, Sheets)

- Notion (for task tracking and documentation)

- Travel booking platforms

- Various other tools as needed



## What Success Looks Like



**In your first 30 days:**



- Shadow the founders and understand how the business operates

- Take over
 management and scheduling

- Learn our content SOPs and begin executing them

- Handle your first travel bookings and administrative tasks



**In your first 90 days:**



- Founders rarely think about administrative logistics—you've got it handled

- Content SOPs are running smoothly without oversight

- You're anticipating needs and proactively solving problems

- You've become an indispensable part of daily operations



## How to Apply



Apply through the job portal with your resume and a brief note on why you'd be a great fit.

title: EXECUTIVE ASSISTANT (EA) TEXAS HOURS HIGH ACCOUNTABILITY OPERATOR ROLE
description:
If you are not extremely organized, do not speak and understand English at a near native level, and are not strong willed enough to hold an executive accountable, this job is not for you.



I am hiring an Executive Assistant who will work alongside me during my business hours (Texas time most of the time, and whatever time zone I am operating in when I travel). This is not a passive admin role. This is an operator role. You will be inside my day to day workflow helping run meetings, capture notes, track tasks, protect priorities, and keep the team aligned so we deliver better and faster for clients.



I have ADHD and I can get off task easily. I need an EA who can keep the plan visible, keep me focused, and push me when needed. I want someone honest and direct, not a yes person. If I drift, you pull me back. If I am late, you press. If I am avoiding something important, you call it out.



We currently have VAs in the Philippines, so speaking Tagalog is a strong plus (not required).



WHAT I NEED FROM YOU



Near native English (written and spoken) with strong communication skills



Extremely organized, proactive, and obsessed with follow through



Able to work my hours consistently (Texas time) and be available during my workday



Honest and direct, comfortable disagreeing and giving real feedback



Strong willed accountability mindset, willing to keep me on track



Calm under pressure, fast learner, handles shifting priorities without dropping the ball



High discretion and confidentiality, you will see sensitive information



Tagalog is a big plus if you will be communicating with our Philippines based VAs



CORE RESPONSIBILITIES



Calendar and schedule control: scheduling, preventing conflicts, protecting focus time, reminders, keeping me on time



Meeting execution: joining meetings, taking clean notes, capturing action items, assigning owners, sending recaps



Task and project control: maintaining ClickUp (or our system), tracking deadlines, flagging slippage early, closing open loops



Communication support: drafting and cleaning messages, clarifying instructions, coordinating between me and the team



Team organization: follow ups with employees and VAs, keeping tasks assigned, keeping projects moving



Document and systems organization: organizing files, links, notes, SOPs, and keeping everything easy to find



Client delivery support as needed: tracking deliverables, prepping agendas, keeping timelines tight, preventing missed commitments



TOOLS THAT ARE A HUGE PLUS



GoHighLevel experience



ClickUp experience



Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Calendar)



Slack or similar team communication tools



HOW SUCCESS IS MEASURED



My schedule runs clean and on time



Every meeting ends with clear notes, clear owners, and clear next steps



Tasks do not drift and deadlines do not surprise us



The team stays aligned and projects do not stall



Fewer dropped balls, faster execution, better client delivery



TO APPLY



Send a short message with your EA experience



Include your time zone and your ability to work Texas hours



List the tools you have used (ClickUp, GoHighLevel, etc.)



Include one example of how you hold someone accountable without being rude
