title: Growth Marketing Lead
description:
We are seeking a Growth Marketing Lead responsible for turning marketing activity into measurable business growth. This role owns paid acquisition, funnel performance, conversion optimisation, and marketing attribution — ensuring that attention translates into qualified leads and revenue.



This is a strategic and execution-focused position suited for someone highly analytical, commercially minded, and motivated by outcomes rather than activity.



Key Objective:

Build a predictable, scalable demand engine that consistently generates high-quality leads while improving cost efficiency and return on marketing investment.



Key Responsibilities

Paid Media Strategy & Execution



Develop and execute paid acquisition strategies across platforms such as Meta, Google, YouTube, and LinkedIn.

Plan, launch, and optimise campaigns aligned with business goals and pipeline targets.

Continuously test creative, audiences, and bidding strategies to improve performance.

Scale winning campaigns and pivot quickly away from underperforming ones.

PPC & Paid Social



Own day-to-day management of paid search and paid social channels.

Monitor budgets, pacing, and cost efficiency.

Implement structured testing frameworks to drive ongoing improvement.

Funnel Design & Optimisation



Design and refine end-to-end funnels from lead magnet through to nurture and conversion.

Partner with content and design teams to build high-performing landing pages and user journeys.

Identify drop-off points and implement improvements to increase conversion rates.

Conversion Rate Optimisation (CRO)



Optimise landing pages, forms, calls-to-action, and
 flows.

Run A/B tests and translate insights into actionable improvements.

Ensure traffic is converted efficiently once acquired.

Attribution & Reporting



Establish clear attribution models to understand what drives pipeline and revenue.

Build dashboards that provide visibility into performance and ROI.

Translate data into recommendations that guide smarter investment decisions.

Retargeting & Lifecycle Marketing



Develop retargeting strategies that re-engage high-intent audiences.

Support lifecycle initiatives that move prospects through the buying journey.

Improve lead quality through segmentation and data-driven messaging.





Qualifications & Experience

Education



Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, Communications, Analytics, or a related field.

A Master’s degree is advantageous but not required.

Years of Experience



4–8+ years in performance marketing, growth marketing, or demand generation.

Demonstrated success managing paid media budgets and delivering measurable ROI.

Experience building and optimising marketing funnels end-to-end is strongly preferred.

Professional Certifications (Highly Regarded)



Google Ads Certification

Google Analytics Certification

Meta Blueprint Certification

HubSpot or marketing automation certifications





Technical Expertise & Tools

The ideal candidate demonstrates strong working knowledge of:

Paid Media Platforms



Meta Ads Manager

Google Ads

LinkedIn Campaign Manager

YouTube Ads

Analytics & Tracking



Google Analytics (GA4)

Google Tag Manager

Attribution tools and reporting dashboards

Marketing Automation & CRM



HubSpot, ActiveCampaign, Klaviyo, Marketo, or similar platforms

Funnel & Optimisation Tools



Landing page builders (e.g., Unbounce, Leadpages, Webflow, ClickFunnels)

A/B testing tools

Heatmapping tools such as Hotjar or Crazy Egg

Nice to Have



SQL or advanced data analysis exposure

Experience integrating CRM and marketing systems

Familiarity with API-based marketing tools





Core Competencies:



Strong commercial mindset with a clear focus on revenue impact

Analytical thinker who uses data to guide decisions

Highly proactive with a bias toward action

Comfortable operating in fast-paced, scaling environments

Excellent stakeholder management and cross-functional collaboration

High ownership mentality with strong accountability





Why This Role Matters

Design makes the brand compelling.

Strategy defines the message.

This role ensures marketing performs.

Without strong performance ownership, campaigns risk becoming activity without impact. With the right leader in place, marketing becomes a reliable and scalable growth lever for the business.



Success in This Role Looks Like



Consistent growth in qualified leads

Improved funnel conversion rates

Clear visibility into marketing ROI

Efficient allocation of paid media budgets

Data-backed decision-making across campaigns

title: Head of Finance (Group)
description:
About the Role

We are seeking a commercially driven Head of Finance (Group) to lead forecasting, financial planning, and accounting oversight across our group of Australian businesses operating in manufacturing, retail, and software.

This role is primarily focused on forward-looking financial planning, group-level forecasting, and performance analysis, supported by strong accounting discipline and full Australian tax compliance capability.



You will work directly with the Director to provide financial clarity, scenario modeling and strategic insight across multiple business models.



Primary Responsibility

1. Group Forecasting & Financial Planning (Core Focus)



-Develop rolling 12-month consolidated cash flow forecasts across all entities

-Build and maintain 3–5 year financial projections for the group

-Consolidate financial models across:

-Manufacturing (Opticare)

-Retail practice (Leichhardt Eyecare)

-Software/SaaS (Ocelot Plus)

-Service/industry network (Vision Connection)

-Conduct scenario modelling (growth, capital investment, hiring, pricing changes, expansion)

-Lead annual budgeting across all entities

-Deliver monthly forecast vs actual variance reporting

-Provide margin analysis by product, store, business unit and revenue stream

-Identify capital constraints and liquidity risks early

Support strategic decisions such as expansion, investment and pricing strategy

The expectation is that finance drives visibility and proactive decision-making across the group.



2. Accounting & Financial Control (Foundational Responsibility)



-Oversee end-to-end accounting across all entities

-Ensure accurate and timely month-end close

-Prepare consolidated group financial statements

-Maintain integrity of general ledger and reconciliations

-Oversee AP, AR and payroll processes

-Manage intercompany accounting and reconciliations

-Implement and maintain strong internal financial controls





3. Australian Tax & Compliance



-Prepare and lodge Australian company tax returns

-Oversee BAS lodgement and GST reporting

-Ensure PAYG, superannuation, and payroll tax compliance

-Maintain ASIC compliance across all entities

-Liaise with ATO and external advisors where required

-Ensure all statutory deadlines are met





4. Group Cash Flow & Working Capital Strategy



-Optimise cash allocation across entities

-Monitor inventory impact (Opticare)

-Improve debtor performance and cash conversion

-Support reinvestment planning





Required Experience:



-CPA / CA qualified (or equivalent)

-Strong knowledge of Australian tax law and compliance

-Advanced financial modelling capability

-Experience managing multi-entity consolidation

-Experience supporting Australian businesses while offshore preferred

-8–12+ years senior finance experience

-Experience across manufacturing, retail, or SaaS highly regarded





Ideal Candidate Profile:



-Strategically minded with strong modelling capability

-Commercially analytical

-Comfortable managing different business models simultaneously

-Highly accountable and detail-oriented

-Proactive decision-support partner to the Director





Success in the First 12 Months:



-Clear consolidated group financial dashboard

-Reliable rolling 12-month group cash flow forecast

-3–5 year strategic financial model in place

-Clean, timely reporting across all entities

-Zero compliance or lodgement issues

-Improved visibility on margins and capital allocation decisions

title: Elite SDR for Silicon Valley Tech Firm – High Commission (PH-based, US Hours)
description:
Want to be the SDR who actually makes US-level money, not just VA wages? At DEVGRU Networks, top performers can earn USD $3,000–$5,000+ per month (base + uncapped commissions) with the potential for five-figure bonuses on big deals. We’re a Silicon Valley–based networking firm selling into casinos, healthcare, ISPs, and large enterprises—and once prospects meet our technical CEO, our close rate is very high.

Only apply if you have near-flawless English, a clear neutral accent, and a proven track record of turning cold calls into booked meetings with US decision makers.



Who this role is NOT for

Please do NOT apply if:

* You have an accent that makes it hard for US Directors/VPs to understand you on the phone.

* You are not comfortable making 40–70 cold calls per day to US prospects.

* Your experience is mainly chat support, VA work, or non-B2B outbound.

* You cannot work US hours (night shift PH time) consistently.

* You want a job that is mostly fixed salary with little performance-based pay.

* You are looking for a temporary side gig, not a long-term, full-time role.



Who this role IS for

This role might be perfect for you if:

* You have excellent spoken and written English, with a neutral accent, and you’re confident talking to US executives.

* You have at least 1–2 years of B2B SDR / appointment-setting experience calling the US, UK, or AU.

* You know your numbers: calls/day, meetings/week, show rate, and you’ve consistently hit or exceeded targets.

* You’re excited by the idea of earning more from commissions than from base salary.

* You want to work directly with a very technical CEO and help close large, complex IT/networking deals.

* Long-term, you’d like the opportunity to lead and train other SDRs as we grow.



About DEVGRU Networks

 DEVGRU Networks is a fast-growing, US-based technology solutions provider focused on Juniper Networks, Mist Wi-Fi, data center, and AI-ready infrastructure. We work with ISPs, casinos, healthcare providers, large enterprises, and other organizations that need rock-solid networks and expert guidance.

 Our CEO, Mike, is a former Network Architect, Senior Manager, and Director based in Silicon Valley, along with some of our key engineers. We already support several large customers in Silicon Valley and across the US, and we’re growing quickly. Once prospects meet with Mike on Zoom, our close rates are very high—your mission is to get the right people onto those calls.

 We offer 13th month pay, year-end bonus, a two-week Christmas break, holidays, and flexible PTO in addition to an elite performance-based commission plan.



Role Overview

We’re looking for a Philippines-based Sales Development Representative (SDR) to own outbound prospecting into targeted account lists (provided by us), primarily in the United States.

This is a cold-calling and outbound role with support from LinkedIn Sales Navigator and
 automation tools. If you love talking to people, booking meetings, and being directly tied to revenue, you’ll love this role.



What You’ll Be Doing

Outbound calling (core of the role)

* Make daily outbound calls to IT decision makers (IT Directors, CIOs, Network Managers, owners) from our existing account lists.

* Have short, confident conversations that generate interest and book Zoo
etings with our CEO.

* Follow a proven call framework while still sounding human and natural.



LinkedIn &
 outreach

* Use LinkedIn Sales Navigator to send targeted outreach messages (from Mike’s account) to 40–50 contacts per day.

* Build and manage simple
 sequences to our account lists using tools like Yesware.

* Follow up on opens/replies and convert interest into booked meetings.



CRM & process

* Keep our CRM and spreadsheets accurate and up to date (contact details, activity, statuses).

* Track your daily/weekly activity (calls,
s, LinkedIn touches, meetings booked and held).

* Collaborate on improving scripts, sequences, and messaging based on what you’re seeing.



Marketing “nice to haves”

* Occasionally help draft short posts for LinkedIn,
, or Instagram (we’ll guide topics).

* Highlight wins, case studies, and customer quotes in simple social posts.



What Success Looks Like

After ramp-up (first 1–2 months), success looks like:

* 8–15+ qualified meetings held per month with IT decision makers.

* Meetings that Mike describes as “legit opportunities”, not just random chats.

* A growing pipeline of opportunities that turn into hardware, software, and services deals.



Top performers will have the chance to grow into a Sales Manager / SDR Team Lead role as we add more vendors (HPE, Palo Alto Networks, Arista, etc.) and hire additional SDRs.



Requirements

Must have:

* 1–2+ years of B2B outbound SDR / appointment-setting experience, ideally calling US, UK, or AU markets.

* Comfortable with cold calling and speaking to senior-level professionals.

* Excellent spoken and written English communication skills.

* Experience using a CRM and at least one outbound/email tool (e.g., HubSpot, Pipedrive, Salesforce, Apollo, Yesware, etc.).

* Reliable internet connection, backup option (hotspot), and a quiet working environment suitable for calls.

* Willing and able to work US business hours (Pacific Time overlap).



Nice to have:

* Experience calling into IT / technology / SaaS / MSP environments.

* Familiarity with terms like firewalls, switches, Wi-Fi, data center, or cloud. (Full training available and included)

* Comfort using LinkedIn Sales Navigator.



Compensation

* Base salary: USD $1,000 per month

* Meeting bonus: $25 per qualified meeting held (with IT decision makers that meet our criteria)

* Deal commission: 2% of net profit on any deal that you originate (SDR-sourced) that closes

* Tens of thousands of dollars in free training 

* 13th month pay

* 2 week Christmas vacation

* Paid holidays

* Flexible PTO

There is NO CAP on commissions. If you help generate and close larger projects, your compensation will scale with it. This is a potential dream job with potential income of  2x-10x base.



How to Apply

Please apply with:

* Your CV

* Insert “SDR DEVGRU - [Your Name]” in subject line of
.

* A sample outbound
 you would send to an IT Director at a casino or healthcare company to book a meeting.

* BONUS POINTS: A short voice recording (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself as if you were calling an IT Director at a mid-sized company to set a meeting with your “technical founder.”

* Apply points indicate your level of interest for this role

title: Experienced HR Manager / People Operations Lead for a Fast-Growing E-Commerce Company
description:
We are looking for an **experienced HR professional** to join our fast-growing **e-commerce business** and help us build, support, and strengthen our team.



Our company operates at a **nine-figure annual revenue level**, and we need someone who can take ownership of the **people side of the business** at a high level. This is not just a recruiting role — we are looking for someone who can help shape **company culture, team development, retention, performance, and overall HR operations**.



### About the Role



You will be responsible for leading and managing the core HR functions of the business, helping us attract great talent, build strong systems, and create a positive, high-performance work environment.



This role is ideal for someone who is proactive, organized, people-focused, and experienced in supporting a fast-moving remote business.



### Key Responsibilities



* Lead full-cycle recruitment and hiring

* Create and improve hiring systems, onboarding processes, and employee documentation

* Help build and maintain a strong **company culture**

* Support employee engagement, morale, and retention initiatives

* Develop HR policies, SOPs, and internal people processes

* Assist with performance management and accountability systems

* Handle team relations, conflict resolution, and employee support professionally

* Partner with leadership on organizational development and team planning

* Identify people-related issues before they become problems

* Ensure the company is hiring, developing, and retaining top talent



### Requirements



* **At least 3 years of experience** in HR, People Operations, Talent Acquisition, or a related leadership role

* Strong understanding of what a **high-level HR person** does in a growing business

* Experience supporting teams in an **e-commerce business**

* Experience working with or supporting an **e-commerce operator/business doing nine figures annually** is strongly preferred

* Proven ability to help improve **company culture**

* Strong communication and interpersonal skills

* Organized, detail-oriented, and able to handle sensitive information professionally

* Able to work independently and take initiative

* Experience in remote team management is a plus



### Compensation



* **Starting salary: $1,000/month**

* Compensation will **scale based on experience, performance, and value brought to the company**



### Who We’re Looking For



We want someone who can do more than basic admin HR tasks. We are looking for a true **HR leader** — someone who understands hiring, people management, culture-building, and operational excellence.



If you know how to help a company attract the right people, keep them engaged, and build a strong internal culture, we’d love to hear from you.



### To Apply



Please send:



1. Your resume

2. A short summary of your HR experience

3. The types of companies you’ve worked with, especially in e-commerce

4. Examples of how you helped improve hiring, team performance, or company culture

5. Your expected salary



We are excited to find the right person to help us grow our team the right way.



REPLY WITH " DETEAILS MATTER " TO SHOW you're serious and you read the whole job post

title: Remote Home Care Scheduler | Care Coordinator (US Client)
description:
Description



At Helper Heroes, we’re on a mission to provide exceptional care and support to home care agencies in the U.S. We believe in true partnership where our virtual assistants act as an extension of the care team. Our goal is to ensure a compassionate, innovative, and efficient care experience for clients and families alike. 



About You



What sets us apart is YOU. You’re not just any virtual tea
mber—you’re a Helper Hero! If you’re passionate about making a difference, have a knack for organization, and thrive in a fast-paced, mission-driven environment, you’re who we are looking for. If you’re the kind of person who loves tackling behind-the-scenes tasks with a smile, ensuring that our clients and caregivers receive the best possible support, apply today!



Position Summary



The Scheduler is responsible for coordinating and managing all client care schedules to ensure every shift is filled accurately, efficiently, and on time. This position serves as a vital link between caregivers and clients—balancing client needs, caregiver availability, and company standards to deliver seamless, high-quality care. The ideal candidate is proactive, detail-oriented,

and an excellent communicator who thrives in a fast-paced, service-oriented environment.



Key Responsibilities



Shift Management

- Review new client referrals and create shift schedules in the WellSky CRM system.

- Accurately enter, update, and maintain client and caregiver schedules.

- Ensure all client shifts are filled promptly and appropriately.

- Review and resolve any scheduling or system errors to prevent payroll delays or invoicing issues.



Caregiver Coordination

- Communicate with caregivers via phone, text, and other channels to confirm and fill open shifts.

- Refill shifts quickly in response to caregiver callouts or cancellations.

- Maintain current caregiver availability records to optimize scheduling.

- Build and maintain strong relationships with caregivers to promote engagement and reliability.



Real-Time Monitoring

- Monitor caregiver check-ins and check-outs through the WellSky system.

- Immediately follow up with caregivers who fail to clock in or out, ensuring timely resolution and documentation.

- Notify clients and internal staff of any attendance or scheduling issues.



Client Communication

- Provide timely, professional updates to clients regarding schedule changes, caregiver status, or service adjustments.

- Review client care plans to ensure caregivers are appropriately matched to client needs.

- Uphold a high standard of customer service and professionalism in all client interactions.



Administrative Support

- Maintain accurate and organized records within WellSky to ensure data integrity.

- Generate and distribute scheduling reports as needed.

- Collaborate closely with the Scheduling Manager regarding caregiver performance, availability, and scheduling challenges.



Qualifications & Skills

- Proficient in computer use and digital tools, including Gmail and ChatGPT for communication and workflow efficiency.

- Experience using WellSky or similar CRM/scheduling platforms preferred.

- Excellent verbal and written communication skills.

- Strong ability to multi-task, prioritize, and perform under pressure within tight deadlines.

- Demonstrated problem-solving and critical thinking skills with strong attention to detail.

- Self-motivated and capable of working independently while contributing to team success.

- Creative thinker with the ability to “think outside the box” to resolve scheduling challenges.

- Previous experience in home care, healthcare scheduling, or staffing coordination strongly preferred.



Work Schedule & Environment

- Full-time position; specific hours to be determined.

- Fully remote role requiring consistent access to both phone and computer systems.



Core Competencies

- Customer Service Orientation: Dedicated to delivering exceptional experiences to clients and caregivers.

- Communication & Interpersonal Skills: Demonstrates professionalism, empathy, and clarity in all interactions.

- Time Management: Efficiently prioritizes and completes tasks in a dynamic environment.

- Adaptability & Flexibility: Adjusts easily to shifting priorities and changing client needs.

- Accountability & Dependability: Takes ownership of responsibilities and follows through consistently.

* Helping leadership strengthen and protect **company culture**

* Supporting employee engagement, retention, and team health

* Creating and improving HR policies, SOPs, and internal processes

* Assisting with performance reviews, accountability systems, and team development

* Handling sensitive employee matters with professionalism and maturity

* Identifying people issues early and helping leadership solve them

* Supporting long-term organizational growth through strong people operations



### Who We’re Looking For



We are specifically looking for someone who is:



* **Highly experienced**

* **Highly organized**

* **Excellent in written and verbal English**

* Confident working directly with leadership

* Strong in judgment, communication, and discretion

* Naturally proactive and solution-oriented

* Able to balance **people care** with **high standards**

* Passionate about building a healthy, accountable, high-performance team



### Required Qualifications



* **At least 3 years of experience** in HR, recruitment, people operations, or talent management

* Experience working in an **e-commerce business**

* Strong understanding of the responsibilities of a **high-level HR professional**

* Proven experience helping improve **company culture**, team performance, or retention

* Experience in a remote work environment

* Ability to create structure, improve systems, and drive execution



### Strongly Preferred



* Experience supporting an **e-commerce operator or company doing nine figures annually**

* Experience hiring for growth-stage or performance-driven teams

* Experience working closely with founders, operators, or senior leadership

* Background in creating HR systems that scale



### Compensation



* **Starting salary: $1,000/month**

* Salary will **increase based on performance, capability, and impact**

* We are willing to reward excellence and long-term value



### Important



We are only looking for **top performers**.



If you are someone who needs constant follow-up, avoids ownership, or only knows basic HR admin work, this role is not for you.



But if you are truly excellent at what you do, take pride in your work, and want to be part of a serious e-commerce company with high standards, we want to hear from you.



### How to Apply



To be considered, send the following:



1. Your updated resume

2. A short introduction about your HR / People Ops experience

3. Your experience in e-commerce

4. Examples of how you improved hiring, culture, retention, or team performance

5. Why you believe you are a strong fit for a high-performance company

6. Your expected salary



**Subject line:** HR A-Player Application – [Your Name]



We are looking for someone exceptional — a person who can help us build not just a team, but the right team.

description:

title: Outbound Sales Rep B2B SDR BDR
description:
*** Only CV/Resumes With Track Record And Video Will Be Considered ***



Are you a proactive, results-driven individual with a passion for sales? 

We're seeking a Sales Development Representative to join our team. 



As a Sales Development Representative, you will be responsible for outreach, prospecting, and lead qualification. Your key role will be to create and implement outbound sales strategies, make effective cold calls, prepare target lists, and nurture them to convert into an appointment with one of our inside sales rep. 



The primary focus of this role is qualifying leads, from prospecting through appointment setting.



Key Responsibilities:

- Conduct cold and warm outreach to pre-qualify and schedule introductory meetings for the sales team.

- Identify, research, and qualify new prospects using Seamless.ai, LinkedIn Sales Navigator, and outbound outreach (calls and
).

- Build and maintain a targeted prospect list and active sales pipeline.

- Track all prospect interactions, outreach, and follow-ups in HubSpot CRM.

- Collaborate with the CEO to refine lead generation strategies.



Qualifications:

- Minimum of 4 years of sales and cold calling.

- Proficiency in cold calling techniques.  

- Fluent in English. 

- Flawless communication skills, both written and oral. 

- Exceptional ability to craft compelling follow-up
s that drive meeting bookings.

- Demonstrated ability to work solo as well as being a productive tea
mber, making outbound calls every day.

- Proficiency in HubSpot CRM, Seamless.ai, and LinkedIn Sales Navigator.

- Must be an excellent problem-solver and willing to collaborate in an exceedingly competitive environment.

- Work US business hours.



To Apply:

- Provide your cold calling sales track record. 

- Provide video introducing yourself answering these 3 questions: 

    1. What do you see as your 3 strongest attributes?

    2. Why are you suited for this position? (provide what has been your best cold call opener)

    3. Role play the opening of a cold call to a corporate prospect and show how you would move toward booking an introductory meeting. Their objection is: “I’m busy right now. Just send me an
.” Show how you would respond and continue the conversation!



Compensation:

- Full-time position.

- Competitive rate, ranging from $600 to $1,000 per month (40 hours per week).



*** Only CV/Resumes With Track Record And Video Will Be Considered ***



Company Overview:

We are a full-service marketing firm that serves corporate clients that need additional marketing bandwidth and experienced support. We act as an extension of internal teams, helping companies execute and scale their marketing efforts when time, resources, or specialized expertise are limited. With more than 15 years in the industry, we are proud to be a women and minority-owned business focused on helping companies grow through smart, results-driven marketing.



If you're driven, dedicated to personal growth, and thrive on building relationships with clients we encourage you to apply for this fulfilling opportunity.



*** Only CV/Resumes With Track Record And Video Will Be Considered ***

title: Research & Outreach VA (NO EXPERIENCE NEEDED) - 1
description:
TURN YOUR SOCIAL MEDIA SCROLLING INTO A REMOTE JOB (Influencer Research + DM VA)

If you spend way too much time on Instagram/TikTok checking gym creators, this might be the easiest job you ever land.



We’re a Gen-Z–run app studio building a fast-growing fitness app, and we’re hiring VAs to help us research, reach out to, and build relationships with influencers.



- No experience required.

- No resume required.

- Just strong English + good judgment + social media instincts.

- Must work NYC timezones! (in between 9am to 5pm)



If you understand gym culture, talk like a human, and type like a native English speaker, you’re already ahead of 99% of applicants.





WHAT YOU’LL DO

This role is part lead generation, part DM outreach, part relationship management.



Your daily tasks:

- Find new fitness creators (gym/lifting niche only)

- Add them to our Google Sheet with the correct info (username, followers, country,
, etc.)

- Evaluate their profile quality (are they legit, on-brand, and worth reaching out to?)

- DM influencers using our scripts

- Handle the conversation in a friendly, natural, professional way

- Answer questions, keep the convo alive, and push creators toward collaboration

- Follow up consistently

- Track responses and organize leads properly



You’ll basically be the person discovering new influencers and bringing them into the brand.

We’ll teach you everything, you just need strong English and social media instincts.





YOU’RE A FIT IF YOU

- Have very strong written English (this is the #1 requirement)

- Can communicate clearly and confidently

- Know the gym/fitness niche (huge bonus)

- Are organized and detail-oriented

- Can follow instructions EXACTLY

- Are comfortable reaching out to people on social media

- Have good judgment (can spot fake/farm accounts instantly)

- Are under 28 (our team is young)

- Want part-time remote work you can do from anywhere



We don’t care about degrees. We care about output, consistency, and attitude.





WHAT WE OFFER

- Remote work

- Fast replies, fast onboarding

- Fun Gen-Z team

- Simple tasks anyone smart can do

- Performance-based promotions

- The chance to handle creator deals + negotiations once you prove yourself





TEST 1 (WHEN APPLIYING) — Influencer Sheet Review + Research



Use this Google Sheet template (make a copy of the sheet to modify it): 
/drive/folders/1hDVQyxHEi-ZmaKfmGk1KWSzqrxKSM-Q7?usp=sharing



You must complete:

Rows 3–13 — PASS or FAIL



Look at the creators already listed and ONLY fill the PASS / FAIL column (1st column of the table).

Base your decision on:

- Fitness/gym relevance (are they a gym influencer?)

- Their country (our target audience is North American countries and 1st world countries)

- High number of views (100 000 median views minimum)

*Little tip, less than 50% are good :)*



Rows 14–23 — Add 10 New Fitness Creators (based on the same criterias that were used for rows 3-13)

Add:

- Username

- Instagram profile link

- Number of followers

- Median views per reel (approximately)

- Full name

-
 (if public)

- Country



These must be real gym/lifting creators. No deep digging. Just fast and accurate.





TEST 2 (AFTER YOU GOT SELECTED FOR THE 2ND ROUND) — 1-3 Minutes Introduction Video



Record a simple phone video (no editing needed) and answer:

- Who you are

- Any experience with customer support jobs, social media or research

- How comfortable you are chatting with influencers through DMs

- Why you’re a good fit for this role



Just speak clearly and naturally.





HOW TO APPLY

Reply to this job post with:

A Google Drive link containing:

- Your completed Google Sheet (for TEST 1 tasks)



Answers to these short questions (in text form in the message you send when applying):

- How many hours/day or week can you work?

- Are you comfortable with NYC TIME hours full-time?

- Are you comfortable handling DM conversations?



Applications missing either test 1 OR answers to the questions will be ignored automatically.

Write “Philippines #1” at the end of your last question's answer so we know you actually read this :)

title: Finance Specialist
description:
Overview:

We, at STR Cribs, are seeking a highly organized and proactive Finance Specialist to manage a variety of recurring tasks and assist with one-off projects in a fast-paced work environment. The ideal candidate will handle daily, weekly, and monthly finance and operations-related responsibilities, ensuring smooth financial operations and supporting the team in various administrative tasks. This role requires excellent communication skills, attention to detail, and the ability to manage multiple priorities efficiently.



Responsibilities:



Financial Operations & Billing

Assist the Finance Manager with day-to-day financial activities

Review and process payment requests, including running automated approval or rejection workflows

Support billing activities, including deposits, progress billings, final payments, and change order deposits

Review and bill for change order deposits as needed

Monitor accounts receivable (A/R) and perform follow-ups as required

Extract and prepare daily A/R aging reports



Project & System Setup

Set up new projects with accurate data entry

Ensure proper integration and data flow between CRM systems and the accounting system

Prepare daily payment and new project status reports for leadership



Vendor & Payment Management

Onboard vendors through Buildertrend and payment platforms as required

Review credit card transactions and ensure proper allocation to the correct QuickBooks categories



Communication & Administrative Support

Monitor and manage incoming
s and Slack messages, responding to inquiries and requests in a timely and professional manner

Handle finance-related calls with vendors and internal stakeholders as needed



Compliance & Process Support

Support finance-related compliance activities, including adherence to internal policies and regulatory requirements

Assist with documentation, recordkeeping, and coordination of required filings





Requirements:

Strong organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple tasks and prioritize effectively.

Strong spreadsheets and data management skills; experience with ERP or construction project management software highly preferred.

Comfortable handling calls related to finance, vendors, and internal coordination in a professional and timely manner.

Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal.

Attention to detail and accuracy in processing financial data and managing tasks.

Ability to work independently and take initiative on both recurring and one-off tasks.

Familiarity with finance tools such as Buildertrend, Slack, and automated workflows.

Experience in project management and financial operations is preferred

Willing to work on night shift - EST





Compensation & Benefits

Competitive salary based on experience

Paid time off and holidays

Professional growth and career advancement opportunities



Company: STR Cribs



Please send your CV, assessment (link below) and a 5-7mins Loom video explaining your assessment answer to 
 as well as answer the Google form linked here: 



Assessment Link:

title: WEB DEVELOPER – FULL STACK
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE



We're looking for a versatile web developer to build and maintain client-facing websites, e-commerce stores, and custom web applications. You'll work across the full stack — owning everything from WordPress theme development to third-party API integration. No two days look the same.



REQUIREMENTS



- 3+ years of professional web development experience

- Expert-level WordPress development (themes, plugins, Gutenberg/block editor)

- Strong WooCommerce experience — custom checkout flows, payment gateways, product configurations, and performance optimization

- Proficient in PHP (OOP), MySQL, HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript

- Comfortable working with REST APIs and version control (Git)

- Strong communication skills and ability to work independently



TECH STACK



Primary: WordPress · WooCommerce · PHP · JavaScript · MySQL

Frameworks: React · Vue.js · Next.js · Node.js

Other: REST APIs · GraphQL · Sass/SCSS · Tailwind CSS · Docker · AWS · Linux/CLI



RESPONSIBILITIES



- Build and maintain WordPress websites and WooCommerce stores for clients

- Develop custom themes and plugins from scratch

- Integrate payment gateways, shipping providers, and third-party APIs

- Optimize site speed, Core Web Vitals, SEO, and accessibility

- Collaborate with designers and project managers on deliverables

- Participate in code reviews, sprint planning, and technical discussions

- Troubleshoot bugs, security issues, and hosting/server concerns



Nice to Have



- Headless WordPress experience (WPGraphQL + React/Next.js)

- Familiarity with Elementor, ACF, or Bricks Builder

- CI/CD pipelines and server-side caching (Redis, Varnish)

- WordPress multisite network experience

If you understand gym culture, talk like a human, and type like a native English speaker, you’re already ahead of 99% of applicants.





WHAT YOU’LL DO

This role is part lead generation, part DM outreach, part relationship management.



Your daily tasks:

- Find new fitness creators (gym/lifting niche only)

- Add them to our Google Sheet with the correct info (username, followers, country,
, etc.)

- Evaluate their profile quality (are they legit, on-brand, and worth reaching out to?)

- DM influencers using our scripts

- Handle the conversation in a friendly, natural, professional way

- Answer questions, keep the convo alive, and push creators toward collaboration

- Follow up consistently

- Track responses and organize leads properly



You’ll basically be the person discovering new influencers and bringing them into the brand.

We’ll teach you everything, you just need strong English and social media instincts.





YOU’RE A FIT IF YOU

- Have very strong written English (this is the #1 requirement)

- Can communicate clearly and confidently

- Know the gym/fitness niche (huge bonus)

- Are organized and detail-oriented

- Can follow instructions EXACTLY

- Are comfortable reaching out to people on social media

- Have good judgment (can spot fake/farm accounts instantly)

- Are under 28 (our team is young)

- Want part-time remote work you can do from anywhere



We don’t care about degrees. We care about output, consistency, and attitude.





WHAT WE OFFER

- Remote work

- Fast replies, fast onboarding

- Fun Gen-Z team

- Simple tasks anyone smart can do

- Performance-based promotions

- The chance to handle creator deals + negotiations once you prove yourself





TEST 1 (WHEN APPLIYING) — Influencer Sheet Review + Research



Use this Google Sheet template (make a copy of the sheet to modify it): 
/drive/folders/1hDVQyxHEi-ZmaKfmGk1KWSzqrxKSM-Q7?usp=sharing



You must complete:

Rows 3–13 — PASS or FAIL



Look at the creators already listed and ONLY fill the PASS / FAIL column (1st column of the table).

Base your decision on:

- Fitness/gym relevance (are they a gym influencer?)

- Their country (our target audience is North American countries and 1st world countries)

- High number of views (100 000 median views minimum)

*Little tip, less than 50% are good :)*



Rows 14–23 — Add 10 New Fitness Creators (based on the same criterias that were used for rows 3-13)

Add:

- Username

- Instagram profile link

- Number of followers

- Median views per reel (approximately)

- Full name

-
 (if public)

- Country



These must be real gym/lifting creators. No deep digging. Just fast and accurate.





TEST 2 (AFTER YOU GOT SELECTED FOR THE 2ND ROUND) — 1-3 Minutes Introduction Video



Record a simple phone video (no editing needed) and answer:

- Who you are

- Any experience with customer support jobs, social media or research

- How comfortable you are chatting with influencers through DMs

- Why you’re a good fit for this role



Just speak clearly and naturally.





HOW TO APPLY

Reply to this job post with:

A Google Drive link containing:

- Your completed Google Sheet (for TEST 1 tasks)



Answers to these short questions (in text form in the message you send when applying):

- How many hours/day or week can you work?

- Are you comfortable with NYC TIME hours full-time?

- Are you comfortable handling DM conversations?



Applications missing either test 1 OR answers to the questions will be ignored automatically.

Write “Philippines #1” at the end of your last question's answer so we know you actually read this :)

title: Client Experience Specialist
description:
The Client Experience Specialist is an independent contractor role responsible for answering phone calls to the main line and managing Client
s for an assigned portfolio.    



This is a fully remote position is only open to Philippines-based contractors with competitive pay at $5.50 USD/hour. Standard hours are Monday–Thursday, 8:00 AM–5:00 PM PST, and 8:00 AM–3:00 PM PST on Fridays. 

 

Key Responsibilities:

• At the start of business and throughout the day, review the assigned inboxes and flag
s to reflect who would handle them – the Client Experience Specialist or the Community Association Manager,

• Monitor the Client
 inboxes throughout the day, replying to all general messages within 24 business hours, 

• Document communication history in Caliber, 

• Answer the main phone line, responding to all general inquiries, and escalating others as appropriate, 

• Attend regular meetings with Community Association Managers to understand Client needs, and 

• Handle special projects as requested. 



Qualifications:

• Excellent verbal and written communication skills,

• Excellent customer service skills, 

• Excellent organizational skills and attention to detail,

• Excellent time management skills with a proven ability to work independently and seek out resources and information,

• Familiarity with the structure of community associations, governing documents, and applicable law, and 

• Proficient with Microsoft Office Suite.



Hardware & Internet Requirements:

• 16GB RAM or higher

• Intel® Core i3, AMD Ryzen 3 or higher processor 

• 256GB Solid State Drive (SSD) storage or larger

• Microsoft® Windows 11 Home Operating System

• Reliable 10 Mbps+ internet with backup connection and power

• Noise-canceling headset and high-quality webcam



Contractors:

• Are not eligible for employee benefits such as paid time off (PTO), health insurance, or retirement plans, 

• Bill and are compensated only for hours worked, with no eligibility for overtime pay. The hourly rate remains consistent regardless of the number of hours worked, and

• Do not receive pay during company closures (e.g., holidays) unless they perform pre-approved work during those periods. We observe 14 holidays annually.

 

To reflect these differences, we are offering a higher hourly rate than that of a regular employee. This is intended to help offset costs such as health insurance and retirement and provide flexibility for unpaid time off.

title: Looking for a Shortform editor
description:
Requirements:

• Proven experience editing short-form content for YouTube Shorts, TikTok, or Instagram Reels

• Strong understanding of pacing, hooks, retention, and viral-style editing

• Ability to add dynamic captions, motion graphics, sound effects, and background music

• Must be able to produce 6 short-form videos per day

• Fast turnaround times and ability to maintain consistent daily output

• Comfortable following clear editing guidelines and brand style

• Must be willing to complete a short sample edit before hiring

• Organized, responsive, and reliable with communication

• Can start ASAP

• Applicants without a relevant portfolio will be ignored.



IMPORTANT:

• Do not apply if you do not have short-form editing experience

• Must provide links to 3–5 relevant short-form samples

• Selected applicants will be asked to complete a short test edit



Role Overview:

• Edit short-form videos (30–60 seconds) designed for high retention and engagement

• Turn long-form content or raw clips into engaging short-form videos

• Add captions, zooms, cuts, sound effects, and visual elements to maximize watch time

• Follow clear instructions, templates, and brand guidelines

• Produce 6 short-form videos per day consistently

• Complete a short sample edit to demonstrate skill and style fit



To Apply:

Send a short message with links to your best short-form edits. Include details about your turnaround time, availability, and the tools you use. If shortlisted, you will receive a short sample task to complete.



Also, we've had issues with bot applications lately. To help us filter, please start your message with a fruit that's yellow when ripe, and if you enjoy baking, feel free to share a quick recipe for something preferably something Georgian or your personal favorite!

title: Social Media Ads/Campaign Manager
description:
About Black Millennial Cafe (BMC)



Black Millennial Cafe (BMC) is a consulting practice and data resource center that provides insights and tools to empower the Black church and its broader community. We specialize in helping faith-based organizations and businesses enhance their cultural competency and engage with the faith-driven market.



The Role



We're hiring a full-time Ad Campaign Manager to lead our digital advertising efforts. You will be fully responsible for the entire ad strategy, from concept to execution, to effectively reach our unique audience of Black Christian leaders, clergy, and pastors. This is a great opportunity for someone who is passionate about both digital marketing and our mission.



Key Responsibilities:



Strategy and Design: Develop and implement comprehensive ad strategies. Designing both static and video ads are preferred but not required.



Ad Management: Set up and manage multiple campaigns on social media platforms like
 and Instagram.



Technical Implementation: Set up and manage pixels, including conversion tracking, to analyze and optimize campaign performance.



Audience Segmentation: Create highly targeted audience segments to reach Black Christian leaders, clergy, and pastors.



Performance Analysis: Monitor and analyze ad performance, providing regular reports and recommendations to leadership.



What We're Looking For:



Proven experience in managing successful ad campaigns with a focus on targeted and retargeted advertising.



Expertise in pixel and conversion tracking is mandatory.



Strong understanding of unique audience segmentations, specifically for the Black Christian community.



Ability to work independently and manage multiple projects at once.



Experience with video editing and design is preferred but not required.



SEO preferred, not required.



If you are a creative, data-driven professional who understands the unique nuances of this audience, we want to hear from you.

title: Social Media Designer and Content Creator
description:
Black Millennial Cafe is seeking a talented and creative Social Media Designer and Content Creator to join our team. We are dedicated to empowering Black churches with resources and strategies to thrive in today's evolving landscape. The ideal candidate will possess strong video editing and graphic design skills, with a passion for storytelling and visual communication. This role involves both designing content based on provided materials and creating original content concepts.

Responsibilities:

* Design and create visually appealing and informative content for social media platforms 
, Instagram, LinkedIn, etc.).

* Edit videos to create engaging reels, posts, and stories, incorporating B-roll footage, effects, and creative elements beyond basic trimming.

* Develop eye-catching thumbnails/covers for videos, optimized for different platforms.

* Incorporate clear and effective calls to action (CTAs) in content to guide viewers on the next step.

* Conceptualize and create original social media content that aligns with our brand and objectives.

About Black Millennial Cafe:

Black Millennial Cafe is committed to equipping Black churches for effective ministry in the 21st century. We provide data-driven insights, practical resources, and expert coaching to help churches grow, strengthen their communities, and navigate the complexities of modern faith leadership. We offer a range of assessments, training programs, and consulting services designed to empower churches to thrive.

Hiring Exercise Information:

We understand that completing hiring exercises requires time and effort, and some individuals may prefer not to participate in this stage. However, to ensure we identify candidates with the specific skills and creative abilities necessary for this role and to move forward with our hiring process as efficiently as possible, we require the completion of the following exercises. We appreciate your understanding and look forward to reviewing your submissions.





Exercises: To help us swiftly move through the hiring process and identify candidates with the specific skills and creative abilities necessary for this role, please complete the following exercises to showcase your skills:



Exercise #1: Reel Post - "Thriving or Surviving"

1. Video: Edit the provided video "13. Thriving or Surviving.mp4" to create an engaging reel post suitable for Instagram,
, and LinkedIn. Demonstrate your ability to incorporate B-roll, effects, and creative editing techniques beyond simple trimming. The video discusses how black churches are dealing with unprecedented times and introduces an assessment store for black churches.

2. Thumbnails: Design three interest-piquing thumbnails/covers for the video, optimized for each platform's dimensions 
, Instagram, and LinkedIn). Draw inspiration from Brady Shearer's style.

3. Call to Action (CTA): Add a clear call to action at the end of the video, directing viewers to the assessment store: 
.

Exercise #2: Social Media Content - Webinar Promotion

1. Webinar Information: Create social media content to promote an upcoming webinar, using information from 
/webinars. The webinars offer training and data-driven solutions for churches, covering topics like digital discipleship and hybrid ministry.

2. Carousel and Copy: Design a carousel post suitable for Instagram,
, and LinkedIn, including engaging copy and a call to action (CTA) to register for the webinar. Draw inspiration from Brady Shearer's style for the visual elements.

Screener Questions:

Please answer the following questions in your application:

1. Please describe your experience with video editing for social media platforms (e.g., Instagram Reels, TikTok,
 Videos, LinkedIn Videos). What software do you primarily use, and can you elaborate on your experience incorporating B-roll and effects?

2. Can you share examples of social media graphics you have designed, particularly those that are attention-grabbing and effective in conveying a message? Please include a link to your portfolio if available.

3. How familiar are you with optimizing content for different social media platforms (e.g., dimensions, best practices for Instagram,
, and LinkedIn)?

4. Describe your understanding of incorporating calls to action in social media content to drive desired results across different platforms.

5. Are you familiar with the work of Brady Shearer? Please also share two other social media content creator or brand pages that inspire your work, particularly those known for engaging and effective content. Explain what aspects of their style you find influential.

title: Looking for Video Editors
description:
Requirements:

• Proven experience editing long-form YouTube videos (10–30+ minutes)

• Strong storytelling, pacing, and retention-focused editing skills

• Ability to add graphics, subtitles, music, and basic sound design

• 2-day maximum turnaround per video (or sooner)

• Comfortable editing videos with an average length of 15 minutes

• Fast communication and ability to follow clear instructions

• Comfortable receiving feedback and making revisions

• Can start ASAP

• Applicants without a relevant portfolio will be ignored.



IMPORTANT:

• This is long-form content only (no shorts)

• Average video length is 15 minutes

• Strict 2-day turnaround (or faster) is required for each video

• Payment is fixed at $1 per finished minute of video

• Consistent workflow and reliability are required

• Must be able to match retention-style editing common in YouTube educational/commentary content



Role Overview:

• Edit long-form YouTube videos from raw footage into engaging, retention-optimized content

• Cut dead space, improve pacing, and enhance clarity

• Add relevant b-roll, light motion graphics, zooms, and visual enhancements where needed

• Sync audio, clean up sound, and balance music levels

• Deliver final videos within 2 days or sooner while maintaining consistent quality



Pay:

$1 per finished minute of video.



To Apply:

Send your portfolio with examples of long-form YouTube content you’ve edited. Briefly describe your editing workflow and confirm you can consistently meet a 2-day (or faster) turnaround for 15-minute videos.



Also, we've had issues with bot applications lately. To help us filter, please start your message with a fruit that's yellow when ripe, and if you enjoy baking, feel free to share a quick recipe for something preferably something Georgian or your personal favorite!

title: Senior Manager
description:
We’re looking for a reliable, hands-on Senior Manager to run the day-to-day operations of our high-energy nightclub.

ANSWER QUESTIONS BELLOW USING VIDEO - to be considered 

MUST BE AVAILABLE MONDAY THROUGHT FRIDAY FROM 8am-5PM CTS US time. Have reliable computer and internet 



1)Tell me about a time you noticed something important that your boss hadn’t seen yet and you fixed it before they asked.

2)Give me an example of when you took full ownership of a project or task that wasn’t officially assigned to you.

3)Describe your system for making sure nothing falls through the cracks when managing multiple clients and tasks.

4)Tell me about a difficult client situation you turned around. How did you handle it?

5)Walk me through a time when you had multiple urgent requests coming in at the same time. How did you prioritize?

s, and multiple projects without missing anything?

Manage and schedule staff (bartenders, security, hosts, and cleaners)

Deliver excellent customer service and handle guest issues

Maintain safety, security, and compliance with all laws and regulations

Control inventory, costs, and vendor relationships

Monitor sales and work with the team to hit revenue targets

title: Shopify & Ecomm Expert
description:
Outdoor TV Australia, the countries leading supplier in outdoor AV equipment, is looking to grow its Ecommerce marketing team.



This role would be working directly with the General Manager in order to implement and execute the Ecommerce plan over the next 12 months. The role will be dynamic and exciting hands on work, and will also have realistic growth opportunity within the company. 



We are looking for a dedicated and long term staff member who takes ownership of the role, enjoys being part of the team culture and is looking for a career rather than a short term job.



A few key highlights of what we will be executing over the next 12 months:

- Front end website architecture redesign

-
 marketing improvements including both content & flows

- Website and product page CRO

- Automation within marketing, sales & admin where applicable

- Working closely with the SEO & PPC team to ensure all content is optimised

- Working closely with head of marketing to ensure the overall structure, branding & messaging is consistent

Annual salary increases

title: Data BaseExcel & Business Intelligence Automation Specialist (Full-Time | Long-Term)
description:
Excel & Business Intelligence Automation Specialist (Full-Time | Long-Term)



ABOUT US



We are a fast-growing U.S.-based eCommerce company in the painting and home improvement space. We sell professional tools nationwide and are expanding into a 25,000 sq ft warehouse.



We are building a powerful internal data and automation system to support inventory, purchasing, and financial visibility — and we’re looking for a high-level Excel & automation expert to lead it.



This is NOT a basic data entry job. We are looking for a systems thinker.



YOUR MISSION



Build and manage advanced Excel-based systems that track:



Inventory levels



SKU-level cost and margins



Landed costs (freight, tariffs, packaging)



Reorder points



Inventory turns



Vendor performance



Executive dashboards



Then layer automation and AI tools on top to reduce manual work and improve decision-making.



RESPONSIBILITIES



Build advanced Excel models (Power Query, Power Pivot, dynamic formulas)



Clean and structure messy datasets



Create executive dashboards with KPIs



Automate reporting workflows



Connect data from eCommerce platforms (Shopify, Amazon, etc.)



Improve inventory forecasting systems



Recommend process improvements



REQUIRED SKILLS (MUST HAVE)



Advanced Excel (Power Query, Pivot Tables, XLOOKUP, INDEX/MATCH)



Experience building dashboards



Strong data organization and structuring skills



Understanding of inventory and cost tracking



Experience with automation tools (Zapier, Make, Power Automate, or similar)



Strong English communication



STRONGLY PREFERRED



Power BI experience



VBA or macro experience



Python experience



AI tool integration experience



eCommerce or warehouse operations experience



COMPENSATION



Full-time position (40 hours per week)



Pay range:

$800 – $1,200 USD per month depending on experience and skill level.



We are willing to pay more for true experts who can build scalable systems.



This is a long-term opportunity with performance-based increases.



HOW TO APPLY (IMPORTANT – READ CAREFULLY)



To be considered, include:



A short description of the most complex Excel system you have built.



A Loom video (5 minutes max) explaining a dashboard or automation you created.



Answer this question: What is the difference between a calculated column and a measure in Power Pivot?



If you do not include these, your application will not be reviewed.



Subject line:

Excel Automation Pro – Your Name



WHY JOIN US?



Stable long-term opportunity



Growing U.S. company



Opportunity to build systems from the ground up



Direct communication with decision-makers



Performance-based raises



We value skill, initiative, and systems thinking.



If you love building clean data systems and automating complexity, we want to meet you.

title: Commission-Based Sales Closer (Remote) – Supplement Brand
description:
Commission-Based Sales Closer (Remote) – Supplement Brand

Uncapped Commission | 6 Days/Week | High Earning Potential | Remote



Are you a confident sales closer who thrives on fast-paced conversations, objection handling, and turning warm prospects into paying customers?



We’re a fast-growing, U.S.-based supplement brand. Our products are trusted by thousands of loyal customers, and we continue to scale rapidly.



We’re expanding our Sales Team and looking for driven, commission-focused closers who want to earn based purely on performance — not capped salaries.



If you’re hungry to sell and love getting paid for results, this role is for you.



What You’ll Do

Your only focus: sell and close.



You will:

Speak with inbound prospects who have shown interest

Make outbound calls to warm leads

Recommend the right supplement bundles and offers

Handle objections confidently and professionally

Close sales and increase order value

Deliver a strong, positive customer experience





???? No support tickets

???? No retention tasks

???? No admin distractions

Just selling.





Daily Activity Targets

120+ outbound calls

Fast lead follow-up

Consistently hit and exceed sales targets



Compensation

100% Commission-Based

Uncapped earnings

Performance bonuses

High income potential for top performers



The more you close, the more you earn.



This role is ideal for sales agents who prefer unlimited upside over fixed salary limits.



Requirements

2+ years of sales or closing experience (phone sales preferred)

Strong persuasion and objection-handling skills

Confident, energetic communication style

Clear/neutral English accent (C1 proficiency preferred)

Competitive, target-driven mindset

Reliable 50+ Mbps internet

Backup internet connection

High-quality microphone and working webcam

Ability to handle high call volumes consistently





How to Apply



Please complete the application form through this link: Only candidates who submit the form will be considered. 



In the Portfolio section of the application form, please include:

A link or screenshot of your EF SET English Test result (minimum C1 level preferred).

Take the free test here: 



Bonus: You may also attach or share a link to a short self-introduction recording discussing:

Why you’re qualified for this role

Your retention and sales experience

Key accomplishments with measurable results



If attachments or links do not work in the form, you may
 your EF SET certificate and/or recording to:

???? 

Subject Line: Retention Specialist Application – [Your Full Name]



?? Make sure you have completed the application form before sending any
 submissions.



Shortlisted candidates will be contacted for an initial interview.

If you thrive on saving customers, hitting targets, and earning bonuses — we’d love to meet you.

title: Contract Instructional Designer (5-Week Project for March)
description:
Contract Instructional Designer (5-Week Project)



The Global Training Association is seeking an experienced Instructional Designer for a 5-week contract to support the development of high-quality eLearning modules. The designer will build learning experiences in **Articulate Rise 360** and translate course outlines or storyboards into polished, learner-centered modules.



The ideal candidate is highly skilled in Rise 360 and comfortable creating bold, visually engaging course layouts that align with a provided brand guide. This role requires strong graphic design instincts, including the ability to create clean visuals, use icons effectively, and maintain consistent branding throughout the learning experience.



The designer should be able to work independently, adhere to design standards, and deliver visually strong learning modules that are clear and engaging for learners.

title: Video Editor
description:
Video Editor – Contractor Kingdom

About Contractor Kingdom

Contractor Kingdom helps skilled trades business owners grow their companies through strategic content marketing and lead generation systems.

Our audience is primarily contractors and home service business owners doing $500K–$3M+ in revenue who are looking for more predictable lead flow and growth in their local markets.

Our content focuses on educating contractors on topics such as:

• Lead generation systems

• Local market dominance

• Digital presence and authority

• Business growth and scaling

• Building predictable revenue

The goal of our content is to build authority and convert contractors into qualified leads for our services.



Position Overview

We are hiring a Video Editor to support consistent content production across our social platforms.

This role focuses on editing educational business content for contractors.

This is not influencer-style or entertainment editing.

The purpose of the content is to educate contractors, build authority, and generate leads.



Core Responsibilities

Short-Form Video Editing

Edit short-form content designed to attract contractors and drive engagement.

Responsibilities include:

• Editing Instagram Reels and
 short-form videos

• Editing TikTok videos optimized for reach within contractor audiences

• Creating short-form content used in paid ads for lead generation

• Adding captions and text emphasis for clarity and engagement

• Structuring videos with strong hooks to maximize retention

• Repurposing long-form content into short-form clips



Long-Form Video Editing

Edit YouTube content focused on contractor business education.

Responsibilities include:

• Clean editing of educational talking-head videos

• Maintaining strong pacing to keep viewers engaged

• Adding text highlights or callouts for key teaching points

• Structuring videos for YouTube performance and retention

Content topics may include:

• Contractor marketing strategy

• Lead generation systems

• Business growth frameworks

• Case studies and real-world examples



Visual Enhancements

Editors should be able to add simple visual elements that improve clarity and engagement.

Responsibilities include:

• Captions and on-screen text

• Lower thirds and callouts

• Basic motion graphics

• Thumbnails designed to improve click-through rates

The editing style should prioritize clarity, authority, and professionalism.



Content Growth Awareness

Editors should understand how content performs online.

Responsibilities include:

• Structuring edits to maximize viewer retention

• Highlighting key insights and teaching 
nts

• Editing content that encourages engagement and lead generation

The goal of content is authority and business growth, not entertainment.



Weekly Expectations

Content Volume

Approximately 5 videos per week

These will include a mix of:

• Short-form social media clips

• Longer-form YouTube content

Turnaround Time

• Typically 24–48 hours per video, depending on complexity



Required Skills

Editing Software

Editors must be proficient in:

• CapCut OR Adobe Premiere Pro

Bonus if experienced with:

• After Effects

• Photoshop (for thumbnails)



Experience

• 1–2 years of video editing experience

• Experience editing short-form social content

• Ability to edit educational or business-style content



Portfolio Requirements

Applicants must submit:

• Examples of short-form content they have edited

• Examples of longer-form content if available

Content showing strong engagement or retention is preferred.



Ideal Candidate

The ideal editor:

• Understands business and educational content

• Can edit content that teaches clearly and keeps viewers engaged

• Works quickly and communicates well

• Is interested in helping build a fast-growing brand

Bonus if you have experience editing content related to:

• Contractors

• Home services

• B2B businesses

• Business education



How to Apply

Please submit:

    1    Your portfolio

    2    Examples of short-form content you have edited

    3    Examples of long-form content if available

    4    A short note explaining why you’re a good fit for this role

title: CUSTOMER EXPERIENCE COORDINATOR (FAMILY EXPERIENCE TEAM | ATTIO PREFERRED)
description:
ABOUT RELATIONAL MINDS



Relational Minds is an Australian child and family mental health organisation delivering relationship-focused, evidence-informed programs to parents, children, educators, and leaders. Our philosophy is grounded in relationship-first approaches, compassionate communication, and trauma-informed, evidence-based practice.



THE OPERATIONAL CONTEXT



We coordinate complex assessment and treatment pathways involving multiple clinicians and strict timelines. Our Family Experience Team ensures every family’s journey is organised, visible, and followed through.



We are transitioning from spreadsheet-based tracking to a modern relationship management system using Attio CRM. Attio will serve as our central system for managing family journeys, lifecycle stages, and service coordination.



WHY WORK WITH US

	•	Values: We value kindness, clarity, and reliable teamwork.

	•	Culture: We offer a calm, respectful, emotionally intelligent work environment.

	•	Leadership: You will work with supportive Australian leadership that values initiative and good judgement.

	•	Growth: This is a meaningful long-term role where you will help shape how our systems evolve as the organisation grows.



THE ROLE



You will coordinate the end-to-end journey for families, acting as the operational guide who ensures their progress through our service stays organised and on schedule.



This is a coordination role requiring assertive communication, structured thinking, and strong system management.



You will work primarily within Attio CRM, helping maintain a clear view of where each family sits in their journey, ensuring tasks are completed on time, and identifying risks before delays occur.



You will work within a small Customer Experience team and report to the Customer Experience Manager.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

	•	Manage the family journey

Track each family’s progress from intake through assessment, treatment blocks, and follow-up using Attio pipelines and lifecycle stages.

	•	Maintain data integrity

Ensure Attio remains the central “source of truth” for family records, service stages, and communication history.

	•	Coordinate timelines

Monitor clinician and administrative tasks and follow up when deadlines are approaching or overdue.

	•	System management

Maintain clean, structured CRM records including custom fields, tags, and views that allow the team to quickly see where attention is needed.

	•	Risk identification

Identify delays, missing information, or stalled cases and escalate to the Customer Experience Manager.

	•	Documentation coordination

Ensure consents, reports, and key documents are correctly linked and stored within our Microsoft 365 environment.



REQUIRED SKILLS AND EXPERIENCE

	•	Strong CRM experience

Experience using a CRM to manage customer or client journeys across multiple stages.

	•	Attio CRM experience strongly preferred

Familiarity with Attio pipelines, custom fields, views, and workflow organisation.

	•	Structured data management

Experience maintaining accurate records and ensuring systems remain clean and reliable.

	•	Workflow coordination

Proven ability to coordinate multiple stakeholders and follow up professionals to ensure timelines are met.

	•	Professional written communication

Strong written English and the ability to communicate calmly with Australian families.

	•	Experience working with Australian companies

Understanding Australian professional expectations and communication style.



HIGHLY REGARDED

	•	Experience in Australian healthcare, allied health, or NDIS-related services

	•	Experience implementing or managing CRM systems during organisational growth

	•	Familiarity with automation tools such as Zapier, Power Automate, or CRM workflow automation

	•	Background in operations coordination, client success, or service delivery



WHAT THIS ROLE IS NOT

	•	Not a general Virtual Assistant role

	•	Not a passive data-entry position

	•	Not a call centre role



You will actively coordinate workflows and ensure families and clinicians stay on track.



WORK DETAILS

	•	Remote position (work from home)

	•	Full-time, long-term role

	•	Work aligned with Australian Eastern Standard Time (AEST) business hours

	•	Direct collaboration with an Australian leadership team



HOW TO APPLY



Please include in your application:

	•	A summary of your experience using CRM systems to track customer or client journeys

	•	Your experience using Attio CRM or similar platforms

	•	Your experience working with Australian companies

	•	One example of how you followed up with professionals to keep a workflow on schedule



Shortlisted candidates will complete a short practical task demonstrating how they would structure and manage a client journey within a CRM system.

title: Automation Specialist
description:
About Us

We are a growing sports organization operating multiple basketball entities, including the 902 Hoops League, the 902 Elite Youth League, the Truro Tidal Queens, and our parent company, 902 Hoops Corporation Ltd. We are looking to scale our operations, streamline our workflows, and leverage cutting-edge AI technology to run our leagues and teams as efficiently as possible.



We already have a fantastic tea
mber from the Philippines managing our podcast editing, and we are looking to expand our remote team with an AI and automation expert.



The Role

We are looking for a proactive AI Automation Specialist to build custom AI agents and automate repetitive tasks across our entire organization. You will be responsible for connecting our existing software, building smart chatbots for player/fan interactions, and creating automated pipelines for our marketing, content, and league operations.



Key Responsibilities



Workflow Automation: Design and deploy automated workflows using 
 and Zapier to connect our databases,
, CRM, and social media platforms.



AI Agent Development: Build custom AI agents (using frameworks like Voiceflow, Botpress, or custom code) to handle league registrations, customer service inquiries, and internal data retrieval.



Content Pipelines: Build systems that take our edited podcast audio/video and automatically generate transcripts, show notes, and social media clips using AI tools.



System Integration: Connect APIs from various platforms to ensure seamless data flow across 902 Hoops Corporation Ltd. and its subsidiaries.



Continuous Improvement: Proactively identify bottlenecks in our current operations and propose AI-driven solutions.



Required Skills & Experience



Expert-level knowledge of 
 (strongly preferred) or Zapier.



Proven experience building functional AI chatbots and agents using tools like Voiceflow, Flowise, or similar platforms.



Strong understanding of LLMs (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini) and advanced prompt engineering.



Experience working with APIs and Webhooks.



Basic to intermediate programming skills (Python or JavaScript) for custom API scripts and data manipulation.



Excellent English communication skills. You must be able to explain technical concepts clearly.



Bonus Points If You Have:



Experience with advanced agentic frameworks like LangChain or CrewAI.



A passion for basketball or sports management.



How to Apply

To ensure you have read this entire post, please make the subject line of your application: "902 AI Agent - [Your Name]". In your application, please include:



A brief summary of the most complex automation or AI agent you have built.



The tools you used to build it.



A link to your portfolio or examples of your past work.
